12.2.2.2 Proposition: Let \(\pi: X \to Y\) is a continuous surjection. Then \(\pi\) is the Kolmogorov quotient map iff \(Y\) is \(\mathrm{T}_0\) and \(\mathcal{T}\) is the initial topology generated by \(\pi\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.2.2.2 命题：设 \(\pi: X \to Y\) 是一个连续满射。则 \(\pi\) 是柯尔莫哥洛夫商映射，当且仅当 \(Y\) 是 \(\mathrm{T}_0\) 空间且 \(\mathcal{T}\) 是由 \(\pi\) 生成的初始拓扑。




Proof: By the definition of the initial topology, any open set in \(\mathcal{T}\) is \(\pi\)-saturated. The complete proof is an exercise. \(\blacksquare\)






12.2.2.3 Proposition: Let \(\pi_{\text{KQ}}\) be the Kolmogorov quotient map on \(X\). Then a bijection \(f: X \to X\) with \(\pi_{\text{KQ}} \circ f = \pi_{\text{KQ}}\) is a homeomorphism.


[点击展开翻译]

12.2.2.3 命题：设 \(\pi_{\text{KQ}}\) 为 \(X\) 上的柯尔莫哥洛夫商映射。则满足 \(\pi_{\text{KQ}} \circ f = \pi_{\text{KQ}}\) 的双射 \(f: X \to X\) 是一个同胚。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \(Y\) be the Kolmogorov quotient of \(X\). Note that every open set \(U\) in \(\mathcal{T}\) is invariant under \(f\) when \(\pi_{\text{KQ}} \circ f = \pi_{\text{KQ}}\), since it is \(\pi_{\text{KQ}}\)-saturated, and \[U = \pi_{\text{KQ}}^{-1}(\pi_{\text{KQ}}(U)) = f^{-1}(\pi_{\text{KQ}}^{-1}(\pi_{\text{KQ}}(U))) = f^{-1}(U). \quad (176)\] In particular, \(f\) is continuous and analogously \(f^{-1}\) is continuous. \(\blacksquare\)



12.2.3 Lebesgue spaces as Kolmogorov quotients. | 勒贝格空间作为柯尔莫哥洛夫商。
12.2.3.1 Example: The \(L^p\)-space.

title: SEPARATION
text:
12.3 Frechét spaces. | 弗雷歇空间。

12.3.1 Frechét spaces. | 弗雷歇空间。
SEPARATION AXIOMS IN NLAB AND [10, THEOREMS 5.3-5.5]






12.3.1.1 Proposition: A topological space \(X\) is \(\mathrm{T}_1\)

iff every point in \(X\) is closed;
iff every point in \(X\) is the intersection of all its neighborhoods;
iff the topology on \(X\) is finer than the cofinite topology on \(X\);
iff there is no continuous injection \(f: (\{0, 1\}, \mathcal{T}_{\text{Sier}}) \to X\).



[点击展开翻译]

12.3.1.1 命题：一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 是 \(\mathrm{T}_1\) 空间

当且仅当 \(X\) 中的每个点都是闭的；
当且仅当 \(X\) 中的每个点都是其所有邻域的交集；
当且仅当 \(X\) 上的拓扑比 \(X\) 上的余有限拓扑更细；
当且仅当不存在连续单射 \(f: (\{0, 1\}, \mathcal{T}_{\text{Sier}}) \to X\)。







[点击展开证明]

Proof: The space \(X\) is \(\mathrm{T}_1\) iff for any \(p \in X\), the set \(X \setminus \{p\}\) is a neighborhood of every \(q \neq p\) which is equivalent to the openness of \(X \setminus \{p\}\) in \(X\). If every point is closed, then \(\{p\} \subseteq \bigcup_{q \in X \setminus \{p\}} X \setminus \{q\} = \{p\}\). If the intersection of all the neighborhoods of \(p\) is \(\{p\}\), then for any \(q \neq p\) there is an open set \(U_q \ni p\) with \(q \notin U_q\), which precisely says \(X\) is \(\mathrm{T}_1\). \(\blacksquare\)







12.3.1.2 Proposition: Every totally disconnected space is \(\mathrm{T}_1\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.3.1.2 命题：每个完全不连通空间都是 \(\mathrm{T}_1\) 空间。




Proof: In a totally disconnected space, every point is a component and is therefore closed. \(\blacksquare\)






12.3.1.3 Proposition: If \(X\) is a \(\mathrm{T}_1\) space and \(p\) is a limit point of \(A \subseteq X\), then for any \(U \in \mathcal{N}_p\), \(|U \cap A| = \infty\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.3.1.3 命题：如果 \(X\) 是一个 \(\mathrm{T}_1\) 空间且 \(p\) 是 \(A \subseteq X\) 的一个极限点，那么对于任意 \(U \in \mathcal{N}_p\)，都有 \(|U \cap A| = \infty\)。




Proof: Suppose for the sake of contradiction if \(U \in \mathcal{N}_p\) and \(|U \cap A| < \infty\) then \(B = U \cap A \setminus \{p\}\) is closed by \(\mathbf{T}_1\). In this case, \(U \setminus B \in \mathcal{N}_p\) but \((U \setminus B) \cap A = \{p\}\) contradicting \(p\) being a limit point of \(A\). \(\blacksquare\)






12.3.1.4 Proposition: A topological space \(X\) is \(\mathrm{T}_1\) iff every subset of \(X\) is the intersection of all its neighborhoods.


[点击展开翻译]

12.3.1.4 命题：一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 是 \(\mathrm{T}_1\) 空间，当且仅当 \(X\) 的每个子集都是其所有邻域的交集。







12.3.2 The specialisation order. | 特化序。






12.3.2.1 Definition: Let \(X\) be a topological space and let the specialisation order \(\leq\) be a relation on \(X\) defined by \(p \leq q\) iff \(p \in \mathrm{Cl}(\{q\})\); we say that \(p\) is a specialisation of \(q\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.3.2.1 定义：设 \(X\) 为一个拓扑空间，并在 \(X\) 上定义一个关系称为特化序 (specialisation order) \(\leq\)，定义为 \(p \leq q\) 当且仅当 \(p \in \mathrm{Cl}(\{q\})\)；我们称 \(p\) 是 \(q\) 的一个特化 (specialisation)。










12.3.2.2 Proposition: In any topological space \(X\) the specialisation order \(\leq\) is a preorder, that is, a reflexive and transitive relation, by the fact that \(p \leq q\) iff \((\forall U \in \mathcal{T}_X)((p \in U) \implies (q \in U))\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.3.2.2 命题：在任意拓扑空间 \(X\) 中，由于 \(p \leq q\) 当且仅当 \((\forall U \in \mathcal{T}_X)((p \in U) \implies (q \in U))\) 这一事实，特化序 \(\leq\) 是一个预序，即一个自反且传递的关系。










12.3.2.3 Proposition: In a topological space \(X\) the specialisation order \(\leq\) is a partial order iff \(X\) is \(\mathrm{T}_0\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.3.2.3 命题：在拓扑空间 \(X\) 中，特化序 \(\leq\) 是一个偏序，当且仅当 \(X\) 是 \(\mathrm{T}_0\) 空间。










12.3.2.4 Proposition: In a topological space \(X\) the specialisation order \(\leq\) is the equality iff \(X\) is \(\mathrm{T}_1\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.3.2.4 命题：在拓扑空间 \(X\) 中，特化序 \(\leq\) 就是等号关系，当且仅当 \(X\) 是 \(\mathrm{T}_1\) 空间。

title: SEPARATION
section: 12.4 Hausdorff spaces | 豪斯多夫空间
text:
12.4 Hausdorff spaces | 豪斯多夫空间

12.4.1 Hausdorff spaces | 豪斯多夫空间






12.4.1.1 Proposition: A topological space \(X\) is \(\mathrm{T}_2\)

iff the diagonal map \(\Delta: X \to X \times X, p \mapsto (p,p)\) is a closed map;
iff the diagonal \(\Delta(X)\) is a closed subset of \(X \times X\);
iff every point in \(X\) is the intersection of all its closed neighborhoods.



[点击展开翻译]

12.4.1.1 命题：一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 是 \(\mathrm{T}_2\) 空间

当且仅当对角映射 \(\Delta: X \to X \times X, p \mapsto (p,p)\) 是闭映射；
当且仅当对角线 \(\Delta(X)\) 是 \(X \times X\) 的闭子集；
当且仅当 \(X\) 中的每个点是其所有闭邻域的交集。







[点击展开证明]

Proof: The space \(X\) is \(\mathrm{T}_2\) iff for any \((p, q) \notin \Delta(X)\) there are \(U \in \mathcal{N}_p\) and \(V \in \mathcal{N}_q\) such that \(U \cap V = \emptyset\) which is equivalent to \(\mathcal{N}_{(p,q)} \ni U \times V \subseteq \Delta(X)^\complement\), and therefore, it is equivalent to \(\Delta(X)^\complement\) being open in \(X \times X\). By the above lemma, the first and second items are equivalent. Let \(p, q \in X\) with \(p \neq q\). If \(X\) is \(\mathrm{T}_2\), then there are \(U \in \mathcal{N}_p\) and \(V \in \mathcal{N}_q\) such that \(U \cap V = \emptyset\), and then \(q \notin \overline{U} \supseteq \bigcap_{U \in \mathcal{N}_p} \overline{U}\). If \(\{p\} = \bigcap_{U \in \mathcal{N}_p} \overline{U}\), then there is \(U \in \mathcal{N}_p\) with \(q \notin \overline{U}\), and then \(\mathrm{Ext}(U) \in \mathcal{N}_q\) is disjoint from \(U\). \(\blacksquare\)







12.4.1.2 Theorem: In a \(\mathrm{T}_2\) space, the limit of a convergent sequence is unique.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.1.2 定理：在 \(\mathrm{T}_2\) 空间中，收敛序列的极限是唯一的。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \((p_n)_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) be a sequence in a \(\mathrm{T}_2\) space \(X\) that converges to both \(q_0\) and \(q_1\) in \(X\). Suppose for the sake of contradiction that \(q_0 \neq q_1\). By Hausdorffness, there are \(U_0 \in \mathcal{N}_{q_0}\) and \(U_1 \in \mathcal{N}_{q_1}\) such that \(U_0 \cap U_1 = \emptyset\). By convergence of the sequence, there is an \(N_i \in \mathbb{N}\) such that \(n \geq N_i \implies p_n \in U_i\), for \(i \in \{0, 1\}\). In particular, when \(n \geq \max(N_0, N_1)\), it is a contradiction that \(p_n \in U_0 \cap U_1 = \emptyset\). \(\blacksquare\)







12.4.1.3 Remark: Therefore, it is appropriate to write \(\lim_{n \to \infty} p_n = q\) only in a Hausdorff space, not in a general topological space.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.1.3 备注：因此，只有在豪斯多夫空间中写 \(\lim_{n \to \infty} p_n = q\) 才是合适的，在一般拓扑空间中则不然。










12.4.1.4 Theorem: Let \(f_0, f_1: X \to Y\) be continuous maps with \(Y\) Hausdorff. Then the coincidence set \(C(f_0, f_1) = \{p \in X : f_0(p) = f_1(p)\}\) is closed.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.1.4 定理：设 \(f_0, f_1: X \to Y\) 为连续映射，且 \(Y\) 是豪斯多夫空间。则重合集 \(C(f_0, f_1) = \{p \in X : f_0(p) = f_1(p)\}\) 是闭集。




Proof: For \(p \in X\) with \(f_0(p) \neq f_1(p)\) by the Hausdorffness of \(Y\), there are \(V_0 \in \mathcal{N}_{f_0(p)}\) and \(V_1 \in \mathcal{N}_{f_1(p)}\) such that \(V_0 \cap V_1 = \emptyset\). Let \(U = f_0^{-1}(V_0) \cap f_1^{-1}(V_1) \in \mathcal{N}_p\), and then for any \(q \in U_0 \cap U_1\), \(f_0(q) \in V_0\) is not equal to \(f_1(q) \in V_1\). Therefore the \(X \setminus C(f_0, f_1)\) is open. \(\blacksquare\)






12.4.1.5 Corollary: If \(A\) is a dense subset of a topological space \(X\) and \(Y\) is a Hausdorff space, then for any continuous map \(f: A \to Y\) its continuous extension \(g: X \to Y\) is unique if there is one.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.1.5 推论：如果 \(A\) 是拓扑空间 \(X\) 的稠密子集，且 \(Y\) 是豪斯多夫空间，那么对于任意连续映射 \(f: A \to Y\)，其连续扩张 \(g: X \to Y\) 如果存在则是唯一的。




Proof: Let \(g_i: X \to Y\), \(i \in \{0, 1\}\), be continuous maps extending \(f: A \to Y\). The coincidence set \(C(g_0, g_1) = X\) since it is closed and contains the dense subset \(A\) of \(X\), and therefore \(g_0 = g_1\). \(\blacksquare\)






12.4.1.6 Theorem: Let \(\mathcal{F} = \{f_j: X \to Y_j\}_{j \in J}\) be a family of maps between topological spaces with the initial topology on \(X\) induced by \(\mathcal{F}\) which separates points in the sense that for any distinct \(p, q \in X\) there is \(i \in J\) with \(f_i(p) \neq f_i(q)\). If \(Y_j\) is \(\mathrm{T}_2\) for any \(j \in J\) then \(X\) is \(\mathrm{T}_2\). In particular, a subspace of a \(\mathrm{T}_2\) space is \(\mathrm{T}_2\); a product of \(\mathrm{T}_2\) spaces is \(\mathrm{T}_2\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.1.6 定理：设 \(\mathcal{F} = \{f_j: X \to Y_j\}_{j \in J}\) 为拓扑空间之间的映射族，\(X\) 上赋予由 \(\mathcal{F}\) 诱导的初始拓扑。该拓扑在以下意义上分离点：对于任意相异点 \(p, q \in X\)，存在 \(i \in J\) 使得 \(f_i(p) \neq f_i(q)\)。如果对于任意 \(j \in J\)，\(Y_j\) 都是 \(\mathrm{T}_2\) 空间，那么 \(X\) 也是 \(\mathrm{T}_2\) 空间。特别地，\(\mathrm{T}_2\) 空间的子空间是 \(\mathrm{T}_2\) 的；\(\mathrm{T}_2\) 空间的乘积是 \(\mathrm{T}_2\) 的。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \(p, q \in X\) be two distinct points. Since \(f_i(p) \neq f_i(q)\) and \(Y_i\) is \(\mathrm{T}_2\), there are \(U_i \in \mathcal{N}_{f_i(p)}\) and \(V_i \in \mathcal{N}_{f_i(q)}\) such that \(U_i \cap V_i = \emptyset\). By the definition of the initial topology on \(X\), we have \(f_i^{-1}(U_i) \in \mathcal{N}_p\), \(f_i^{-1}(V_i) \in \mathcal{N}_q\), and \(f_i^{-1}(U_i) \cap f_i^{-1}(V_i) = \emptyset\). Thus \(X\) is \(\mathrm{T}_2\). \(\blacksquare\)



12.4.2 Hausdorff quotients. | 豪斯多夫商。
This subsection is adapted from Bachelor thesis The Hausdorff Quotient by Bart van Munster on June 9, 2014 at Mathematisch Instituut, Universiteit Leiden.






12.4.2.1 Remark: Consider any topological space \(X\) and an equivalence relation \(\sim\) on \(X\). Denote the equivalence class of any \(x \in X\) by \([p]\). Then \(X / \sim\) is assumed to have the quotient topology with respect to the (quotient) map \(q: X \to X / \sim, p \mapsto [p]\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.1 备注：考虑任意拓扑空间 \(X\) 及其上的等价关系 \(\sim\)。将任意 \(x \in X\) 的等价类记为 \([p]\)。假设 \(X / \sim\) 赋予了关于（商）映射 \(q: X \to X / \sim, p \mapsto [p]\) 的商拓扑。










12.4.2.2 Proposition: Let \(q: X \to Q\) be a quotient map of topological spaces. Let \(Y\) be a topological space and \(f: X \to Y\) such that \(q(a) = q(b) \implies f(a) = f(b)\) holds for all \(a, b \in X\). Then there is a unique map \(\tilde{f}: Q \to Y\) such that \(f = \tilde{f} \circ q\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.2 命题：设 \(q: X \to Q\) 为拓扑空间的商映射。设 \(Y\) 为拓扑空间，\(f: X \to Y\) 满足对所有 \(a, b \in X\) 都有 \(q(a) = q(b) \implies f(a) = f(b)\)。则存在唯一的映射 \(\tilde{f}: Q \to Y\) 使得 \(f = \tilde{f} \circ q\)。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Define \(\tilde{f}: Q \to Y, q(x) \mapsto f(x)\). Then \(\tilde{f}\) is well-defined, since for all \(x, y \in X\) with \(q(y) = q(x)\), we have \(f(y) = f(x)\). This \(\tilde{f}\) satisfies \(f = \tilde{f} \circ q\). It is also continuous, because for any open \(U \subset Y\), \(q^{-1}(\tilde{f}^{-1}(U)) = f^{-1}(U)\) is open. By definition of the quotient topology on \(Q\), this means that \(\tilde{f}^{-1}(U)\) is open and therefore \(\tilde{f}\) is continuous. It is unique, since all \([p]\) should be sent to \(f(x)\) in order to get \(f = \tilde{f} \circ q\). \(\blacksquare\)







12.4.2.3 Corollary: Let \(X, Y, Z\) be topological spaces and \(f: X \to Y, g: X \to Z\) quotient maps such that for all \(a, b \in X\), \(f(a) = f(b) \iff g(a) = g(b)\). Then there is a unique homeomorphism \(h: Y \to Z\) such that \(g = h \circ f\). This \(h\) sends \(f(x)\) to \(g(x)\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.3 推论：设 \(X, Y, Z\) 为拓扑空间，\(f: X \to Y, g: X \to Z\) 为商映射，且满足对于所有 \(a, b \in X\)，\(f(a) = f(b) \iff g(a) = g(b)\)。则存在唯一的同胚 \(h: Y \to Z\) 使得 \(g = h \circ f\)。此 \(h\) 将 \(f(x)\) 映射到 \(g(x)\)。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: By proposition 2.4, there is unique \(\tilde{g}: Y \to Z\) such that \(g = \tilde{g} \circ f\). This \(\tilde{g}\) sends \(f(x)\) to \(g(x)\). By proposition 2.4, there is also a map \(\tilde{f}: Z \to Y\), \(g(x) \mapsto f(x)\). We can see that \(\tilde{f}\) is the inverse map of \(\tilde{g}\). Hence, \(\tilde{g}\) is a homeomorphism. For any quotient map \(f: X \to Y\) of topological spaces, one can define an equivalence relation \(\sim_f\) on \(X\) such that \(a \sim_f b \iff f(a) = f(b)\) for all \(a, b \in X\). Corollary 2.5 tells us that we could just as well say that \(Y\) is the unique quotient \(X / \sim_f\). \(\blacksquare\)
Since \(\mathrm{diag}(X)\) is the trivial equivalence relation, this corollary motivates the question whether the equivalence relations \(R\) on \(X\) such that \(X/R\) is Hausdorff are exactly the closed equivalence relations. We will see that only one implication holds.







12.4.2.4 Lemma: let \(R\) be an equivalence relation on \(X\) such that \(X/R\) is Hausdorff. Then \(R\) is closed as a subset of \(X \times X\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.4 引理：设 \(R\) 为 \(X\) 上的等价关系，使得 \(X/R\) 是豪斯多夫空间。则 \(R\) 作为 \(X \times X\) 的子集是闭的。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \(q: X \to X/R\) be the quotient map and let \((a, b) \in R^\complement\). Then \(q(a) \neq q(b)\) and since \(X/R\) is Hausdorff, there are open \(U, V \subset X/R\) such that \(q(a) \in U, q(b) \in V\) and \(U \cap V = \emptyset\). By definition, \(q^{-1}(U)\) and \(q^{-1}(V)\) are open in \(X\), so \(q^{-1}(U) \times q^{-1}(V)\) is open in \(X \times X\). Now we have \((a, b) \in q^{-1}(U) \times q^{-1}(V)\) and because \(U \cap V = \emptyset\), we obtain \((q^{-1}(U) \times q^{-1}(V)) \cap R = \emptyset\). So for any \((a, b) \in R^\complement\), there is an open neighbourhood of \((a, b)\) that is a subset of \(R^\complement\). Therefore \(R^\complement\) is open and hence \(R\) is closed. \(\blacksquare\)
The following example shows that a closed equivalence relation on a topological space does not necessarily yield a quotient that is Hausdorff.

12.4.2.5 Example: Let \(X_1 = \mathbb{Q} \cap [0, 1]\), \(X_2 = ]0, 1]\) and \(X_3 = ([0, 1] \setminus \mathbb{Q}) \cup \{0\}\). Let \(X = X_1 \coprod X_2 \coprod X_3\). Let \(R\) be the equivalence relation on \(X\) given by \[(x, i) R (y, j) \iff (x = y \land (x, y > 0 \lor i = j)). \qquad (177)\]






12.4.2.6 Lemma: There is a topological space \(X\) and an equivalence relation \(R\) on \(X\) such that \(R\) is closed and \(X/R\) is not Hausdorff.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.6 引理：存在拓扑空间 \(X\) 及其上的等价关系 \(R\)，使得 \(R\) 是闭的且 \(X/R\) 不是豪斯多夫空间。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \(((x, i), (y, j)) \in R^\complement\). If \(x \neq y\), we can find disjoint open neighbourhoods \(U \ni x\) and \(V \ni y\) in \([0, 1]\). For such \(U, V \subset [0, 1]\), it is true that \((U \cap X_i) \times (V \cap X_j) \cap R = \emptyset\) and \(((x, i), (y, j)) \in (U \cap X_i) \times (V \cap X_j)\). Now suppose \(x = y\). Then \(x = y = 0\) and \(i \neq j\) because \(((x, i), (y, j)) \in R^\complement\). Without loss of generality we can assume \(i = 1\) and \(j = 3\). Now observe that \(((0, 1), (0, 3)) \in X_1 \times X_3\) and \((X_1 \times X_3) \cap R = \emptyset\). Also notice that \(X_1 \times X_3\) is an open set. So every point in \(R^\complement\) has an open neighbourhood that is a subset of \(R^\complement\), so \(R^\complement\) is open. Therefore, \(R\) is closed. Let \(\pi: X \to X/R\) be the classification map. It will be shown that \(\pi(0, 1)\) and \(\pi(0, 3)\) cannot be separated by open sets, although \(\pi(0, 1) \neq \pi(0, 3)\). Let \(U, V\) be open neighbourhoods of \(\pi(0, 1)\) resp. \(\pi(0, 3)\). Then \(F = \pi^{-1}(U)\) and \(G = \pi^{-1}(V)\) are saturated open neighbourhoods of \((0, 1)\) and \((0, 3)\), respectively. So \(F\) contains \(([0, \delta_1[ \cap X_1) \times \{1\}\) for some \(\delta_1 > 0\) and \(G\) contains \(([0, \delta_3[ \cap X_3) \times \{3\}\) for some \(\delta_3 > 0\). Because they are saturated, \(F\) contains \(((0, \min(\delta_1, \delta_3)) \cap \mathbb{Q}) \times \{2\}\) and \(G\) contains \(((0, \min(\delta_1, \delta_3)) \setminus \mathbb{Q}) \times \{2\}\). We can see that any open set \(S \subset ]0, 1[\) containing \(((0, \min(\delta_1, \delta_3)) \cap \mathbb{Q})\) must contain some element of \(((0, \min(\delta_1, \delta_3)) \setminus \mathbb{Q})\), so \(F \cap G \neq \emptyset\). Therefore, \(U \cap V \neq \emptyset\), and \(X/R\) is not Hausdorff. \(\blacksquare\)







12.4.2.7 Definition: Let \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\) and let \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) be the equivalence relation on \(X\) defined by \(p_0 \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}} p_1\) iff for any \(Y \in \mathbf{Haus}\) and continuous map \(f: X \to Y\) we have \(f(p_0) = f(p_1)\). Let \(H(X) = X / \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) denote the quotient space, called the Hausdorff quotient of \(X\), and the classification map is denoted by \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}: X \to H(X)\), called the Hausdorff quotient map of \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.7 定义：设 \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\)，并设 \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 为 \(X\) 上的等价关系，定义为 \(p_0 \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}} p_1\) 当且仅当对于任意 \(Y \in \mathbf{Haus}\) 及连续映射 \(f: X \to Y\) 都有 \(f(p_0) = f(p_1)\)。记商空间 \(H(X) = X / \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)，称为 \(X\) 的豪斯多夫商 (Hausdorff quotient)，其分类映射记为 \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}: X \to H(X)\)，称为 \(X\) 的豪斯多夫商映射 (Hausdorff quotient map)。










12.4.2.8 Theorem: For any continuous map \(f: X \to Y\) from \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\) to \(Y \in \mathbf{Haus}\), there is a unique \(\tilde{f}: H(X) \to Y\) such that \(\tilde{f} \circ \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}} = f\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.8 定理：对于从 \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\) 到 \(Y \in \mathbf{Haus}\) 的任意连续映射 \(f: X \to Y\)，存在唯一的 \(\tilde{f}: H(X) \to Y\) 使得 \(\tilde{f} \circ \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}} = f\)。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: For any Hausdorff space \(Y\) and any continuous maps \(f: X \to Y\), we have that \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_0) = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_1)\) implies \(f(p_0) = f(p_1)\). Then, \(\tilde{f}: H(X) \to Y\), \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p) \mapsto f(p)\) is the required unique map. Now let \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_0), \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_1) \in H(X)\) with \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_0) \neq \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_1)\). Then there is a Hausdorff space \(Y\) and a continuous map \(f: X \to Y\) such that \(f(p_0) \neq f(p_1)\). Choose open neighbourhoods \(U \ni f(p_0)\) and \(V \ni f(p_1)\) such that \(U \cap V = \emptyset\). Then \(\tilde{f}^{-1}(U) \ni \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_0)\) and \(\tilde{f}^{-1}(V) \ni \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_1)\) are disjoint open sets, which proves that \(H(X)\) is Hausdorff. \(\blacksquare\)







12.4.2.9 Proposition: The equivalence relation \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) from Definition 12.4.2.7 is the smallest equivalence relation \(S\) on \(X\) such that \(X/S\) is Hausdorff. In other words, \[\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \bigcap \{ S \subset X \times X : S \text{ is an equivalence relation and } X/S \text{ is Hausdorff} \}. \qquad (178)\]


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.9 命题：定义 12.4.2.7 中的等价关系 \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 是 \(X\) 上使得 \(X/S\) 为豪斯多夫空间的最小等价关系 \(S\)。换句话说， \[\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \bigcap \{ S \subset X \times X : S \text{ 是一个等价关系且 } X/S \text{ 是豪斯多夫空间} \}. \qquad (178)\]




Proof: On one hand, \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is itself an equivalence relation and \(H(X) = X / \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is Hausdorff. On the other hand, for any equivalence relation \(S\) on \(X\) with \(X/S\) Hausdorff, \(X \to X/S\) factors through \(X / \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) and hence \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq S\). \(\blacksquare\)
We can define of \(H(X)\) and \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) in an alternative and more constructive way. The idea of this construction is based on the StackExchange answer\(^5\).


[点击展开翻译]

我们可以用另一种更具构造性的方式来定义 \(H(X)\) 和 \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)。此构造的思想基于 StackExchange 上的回答\(^5\)。







12.4.2.10 Definition: For \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\), define an equivalence relation \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) on \(X\) generated by \(\overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.10 定义：对于 \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\)，定义 \(X\) 上的一个等价关系 \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)，它由 \(\overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\) 生成。










12.4.2.11 Proposition: We have \(a \overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} b\) iff there is a sequence \((p_k)_{k=0}^N\) in \(X\) such that \(a = p_0, b = p_n\), and for any \(k \in \{0, \dots, n-1\}\) we have \((p_k, p_{k+1}) \in \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.11 命题：我们有 \(a \overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} b\) 当且仅当在 \(X\) 中存在序列 \((p_k)_{k=0}^N\) 使得 \(a = p_0, b = p_n\)，且对于任意 \(k \in \{0, \dots, n-1\}\) 都有 \((p_k, p_{k+1}) \in \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\)。










12.4.2.12 Proposition: In general, \(\overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\) itself is not transitive.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.12 命题：一般而言，\(\overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\) 本身不是传递的。




12.4.2.13 Example: Let \(X = \{1, 2, 3, 4, 5\}\) and define a topology on \(X\) by the basis \(\{\{1, 2\}, \{2\}, \{2, 3, 4\}, \{4\}, \{4, 5\}\}\). Then \(1\) and \(5\) can be separated by open sets, so it follows that \((1, 5) \notin \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\). However, \((1, 3) \in \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\) and \((3, 5) \in \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\) do hold.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.13 例：设 \(X = \{1, 2, 3, 4, 5\}\)，并通过基 \(\{\{1, 2\}, \{2\}, \{2, 3, 4\}, \{4\}, \{4, 5\}\}\) 在 \(X\) 上定义一个拓扑。那么 1 和 5 可以由开集分离，因此得出 \((1, 5) \notin \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\)。然而，\((1, 3) \in \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\) 和 \((3, 5) \in \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\) 确实成立。







12.4.2.14 Lemma: A topological space \(X\) is Hausdorff iff \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is the trivial equivalence relation.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.14 引理：一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 是豪斯多夫空间，当且仅当 \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 是平凡的等价关系。




Proof: By definition, \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is trivial iff \(\overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)} = \mathrm{diag}(X)\), so \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is trivial iff \(X\) is Hausdorff. \(\blacksquare\)






12.4.2.15 Proposition: For any topological space \(X\), the inclusion \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) holds.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.15 命题：对于任意拓扑空间 \(X\)，包含关系 \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 成立。




Proof: Since \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is reflexive, we have \(\mathrm{diag}(X) \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). Since \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is closed, we have \(\overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)} \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). The inclusion then follows. \(\blacksquare\)
12.4.2.16 Example: Let \(X\) be an infinite topological space with the cofinite topology, i.e. \(U \subset X\) is open iff \(U = \emptyset\) or \(U^\complement\) is finite. Then there are no points that can be separated by open sets, so \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = X \times X\). Since \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\), this means that \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}} = X \times X\) and \(H(X)\) is a singleton.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.16 例：设 \(X\) 为赋予余有限拓扑的无限拓扑空间，即 \(U \subset X\) 是开集当且仅当 \(U = \emptyset\) 或 \(U^\complement\) 是有限的。那么不存在可以由开集分离的点，因此 \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = X \times X\)。因为 \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)，这意味着 \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}} = X \times X\) 且 \(H(X)\) 是一个单元素集。







12.4.2.17 Definition: Let \(X\) be a topological space. For each ordinal number \(\alpha\), define a topological space \(H^\alpha(X)\), an equivalence relation \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) on \(X\) and a map \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}^\alpha : X \to H^\alpha(X)\) in the following way: when \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is defined, we let \(H^\alpha(X) = X / \overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) with quotient map \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}^\alpha : X \to H^\alpha(X)\). With this convention, define \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) recursively: \[\overset{0}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \mathrm{diag}(X);\] \[\overset{\alpha+1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \left\{ (a, b) \in X \times X : \left( \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}^\alpha(a), \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}^\alpha(b) \right) \in \overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}, H^\alpha(X)} \right\} \text{ for all } \alpha \in \mathbf{Ord}; \qquad (179)\] \[\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \bigcup_{\beta < \alpha} \overset{\beta}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \quad \text{if } \alpha \text{ is a limit.}\] Here \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}, H^\alpha(X)}\) is the Hausdorff equivalence relation for \(H^\alpha(X)\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.17 定义：设 \(X\) 为一个拓扑空间。对于每一个序数 \(\alpha\)，按以下方式定义一个拓扑空间 \(H^\alpha(X)\)、\(X\) 上的一个等价关系 \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 以及一个映射 \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}^\alpha : X \to H^\alpha(X)\)：当 \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 已定义时，我们令 \(H^\alpha(X) = X / \overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)，其商映射为 \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}^\alpha : X \to H^\alpha(X)\)。按照这一约定，递归地定义 \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)： \[\overset{0}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \mathrm{diag}(X);\] \[\overset{\alpha+1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \left\{ (a, b) \in X \times X : \left( \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}^\alpha(a), \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}^\alpha(b) \right) \in \overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}, H^\alpha(X)} \right\} \text{ 对所有 } \alpha \in \mathbf{Ord}; \qquad (179)\] \[\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \bigcup_{\beta < \alpha} \overset{\beta}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \quad \text{如果 } \alpha \text{ 是极限序数。}\] 这里 \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}, H^\alpha(X)}\) 是 \(H^\alpha(X)\) 的豪斯多夫等价关系。




Notice that \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \overset{\beta}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) holds for any \(\alpha, \beta \in \mathbf{Ord}\) with \(\alpha < \beta\), provided that all \(\overset{\gamma}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) with \(\gamma < \beta\) are well-defined equivalence relations. So inductively it follows that \(\overset{\beta}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is an equivalence relation for any limit \(\beta\), since it is a union of an ascending chain of equivalence relations. Therefore, all \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) are well-defined equivalence relations. Since \(\overset{0}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is trivial, \(H^0(X) = X\) and hence \(H^1(X) = X / \overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). For any two ordinals \(\alpha, \beta\) with \(\alpha < \beta\), \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \overset{\beta}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) holds, so there is a unique map \(f_{\alpha, \beta} : H^\alpha(X) \to H^\beta(X)\) such that \(\pi^\beta_{\mathrm{Haus}} = f_{\alpha, \beta} \circ \pi^\alpha_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). Furthermore, \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, H^\alpha(X)} \circ \pi^\alpha_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is a quotient map, so there is a unique homeomorphism \(g : H^{\alpha+1}(X) \to H^1(H^\alpha(X))\) such that \(g \circ \pi^{\alpha+1}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, H^\alpha(X)} \circ \pi^\alpha_{\mathrm{Haus}}\).


[点击展开翻译]

注意，对于满足 \(\alpha < \beta\) 的任意 \(\alpha, \beta \in \mathbf{Ord}\)，只要所有满足 \(\gamma < \beta\) 的 \(\overset{\gamma}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 都是良定义的等价关系，那么 \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \overset{\beta}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 就成立。因此，通过归纳法可知，对于任意极限序数 \(\beta\)，\(\overset{\beta}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 也是一个等价关系，因为它是一个递增等价关系链的并集。所以，所有 \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 都是良定义的等价关系。 由于 \(\overset{0}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 是平凡的，有 \(H^0(X) = X\)，从而 \(H^1(X) = X / \overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)。对于满足 \(\alpha < \beta\) 的任意两个序数 \(\alpha, \beta\)，因为 \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \overset{\beta}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 成立，所以存在唯一的映射 \(f_{\alpha, \beta} : H^\alpha(X) \to H^\beta(X)\) 使得 \(\pi^\beta_{\mathrm{Haus}} = f_{\alpha, \beta} \circ \pi^\alpha_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)。此外，\(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, H^\alpha(X)} \circ \pi^\alpha_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 是一个商映射，因此存在唯一的同胚 \(g : H^{\alpha+1}(X) \to H^1(H^\alpha(X))\) 使得 \(g \circ \pi^{\alpha+1}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, H^\alpha(X)} \circ \pi^\alpha_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)。







12.4.2.18 Proposition: Let \(X\) be a topological space. For any \(\alpha \in \mathbf{Ord}\), \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.18 命题：设 \(X\) 为一个拓扑空间。对于任意 \(\alpha \in \mathbf{Ord}\)，都有 \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: We prove by induction. For \(\alpha = 0\) it is clear. Now let \(\alpha + 1\) be a successor such that \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). The map \(X \to H(X)\) factors through \(H^\alpha(X)\). The resulting map \(H^\alpha(X) \to H(X)\) factors through \(H(H^\alpha(X))\) and since \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\), \(H^\alpha(X) \to H(X)\) also factors through \(H^\alpha(X) / \overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}, H^\alpha(X)} \cong H^{\alpha+1}(X) = X / \overset{\alpha+1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). Thus \(\overset{\alpha+1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) holds. Let \(\alpha\) be a limit ordinal and assume that \(\overset{\beta}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) for all \(\beta < \alpha\). Then \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \bigcup_{\beta < \alpha} \overset{\beta}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). \(\blacksquare\)







12.4.2.19 Lemma: There is some ordinal \(\alpha\) such that \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \overset{\alpha+1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.19 引理：存在某个序数 \(\alpha\) 使得 \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \overset{\alpha+1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \(\beta \in \mathbf{Ord}\) such that \[|\beta| > |\mathcal{P}(X \times X)| \geq \left| \left\{ \overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} : \alpha < \beta \right\} \right|. \qquad (180)\] There must be some \(\alpha < \gamma < \beta\) such that \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \overset{\gamma}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). Since \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \overset{\alpha+1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \overset{\gamma}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\), this yields \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \overset{\alpha+1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). \(\blacksquare\)







12.4.2.20 Definition: Let \(\alpha\) be the smallest ordinal such that \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \overset{\alpha+1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). By definition of \(\overset{\alpha+1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\), \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is trivial. Hence \(H^\alpha(X)\) is Hausdorff. Thus, \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\), and then \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). So, \(H(X) = H^\alpha(X)\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.20 定义：设 \(\alpha\) 为使得 \(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \overset{\alpha+1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 的最小序数。根据 \(\overset{\alpha+1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 的定义，\(\overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 是平凡的。因此 \(H^\alpha(X)\) 是豪斯多夫空间。从而，\(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}} \subseteq \overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)，进而 \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \overset{\alpha}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)。所以，\(H(X) = H^\alpha(X)\)。




The following lemma might be useful for explicitly computing Hausdorff quotients.


[点击展开翻译]

下面的引理可能对显式计算豪斯多夫商有用。







12.4.2.21 Lemma: Let \(X\) be a topological space such that all equivalence classes of \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) are finite and there are only finitely many equivalence classes with more than one element. Then \(H(X) = H^1(X)\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.21 引理：设 \(X\) 为一个拓扑空间，使得 \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 的所有等价类都是有限的，并且只有有限多个包含多于一个元素的等价类。则 \(H(X) = H^1(X)\)。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \(a, b \in X\) such that \(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(a) \neq \pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(b)\). For any \(p \in X\), let \([p]_1\) be the equivalence class of \(p\) with respect to \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). Let \(Y\) be the union of all equivalence classes \([p]_1\) with more than one element such that \(\{a, b\} \cap [p]_1 = \emptyset\). For each \(q \in Y\) and each \(p \in [a]_1\), there is an open neighbourhood \(U_{p,q}\) of \(p\) such that \(q \notin U_{p,q}\), because \((p, q) \notin \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\). Now \(U = \bigcup_{p \in [a]_1} \bigcap_{q \in Y} U_{p,q}\) is an open neighbourhood of \([a]_1\) such that \(Y \cap U = \emptyset\). Similarly, there is an open neighbourhood \(V\) of \(B\) such that \(Y \cap V = \emptyset\). Each pair of elements \(p_1, q_1\) with \(p_1 \in [a]_1\) and \(q_1 \in [b]_1\) can be separated by open neighbourhoods \(U_{p_1, q_1}\) and \(V_{p_1, q_1}\), because \((p_1, q_1) \notin \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\). Therefore, \([a]_1\) and \([b]_1\) can be separated by open neighbourhoods \(S := \bigcap_{q_1 \in [b]_1} \bigcup_{p_1 \in [a]_1} U_{p_1, q_1}\) and \(T := \bigcup_{q_1 \in [b]_1} \bigcap_{p_1 \in [a]_1} V_{p_1, q_1}\). Now \(a\) and \(b\) are separated by the open saturated neighbourhoods \(U \cap S\) and \(V \cap T\). Therefore, \(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(a)\) and \(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(b)\) are separated by the open neighbourhoods \(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(U \cap S)\) and \(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(V \cap T)\). Hence \(H^1(X)\) is Hausdorff and \(H(X) = H^1(X)\). \(\blacksquare\)







12.4.2.22 Corollary: If \(X\) is a finite topological space, then \(H(X) = H^1(X)\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.22 推论：如果 \(X\) 是一个有限拓扑空间，则 \(H(X) = H^1(X)\)。




12.4.2.23 Example: Let \(X = (\mathbb{R} \times \{0, 1\}) / \sim\), where \(\sim\) is an equivalence relation on \(\mathbb{R} \times \{0, 1\}\) such that \((x, 0) \sim (x, 1)\) for all \(x \in \mathbb{R} \setminus \{0\}\). Then \(X\) can be considered as the real line with a double origin and \(\{(x, 0), (x, 1)\}\) is the only equivalence class of \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) that has more than one element. So \(H(X) = H^1(X) \cong \mathbb{R}\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.23 例：设 \(X = (\mathbb{R} \times \{0, 1\}) / \sim\)，其中 \(\sim\) 是 \(\mathbb{R} \times \{0, 1\}\) 上的一个等价关系，满足对于所有 \(x \in \mathbb{R} \setminus \{0\}\) 都有 \((x, 0) \sim (x, 1)\)。那么 \(X\) 可以被看作是带有双原点的实直线，并且 \(\{(x, 0), (x, 1)\}\) 是 \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 中唯一一个包含多于一个元素的等价类。所以 \(H(X) = H^1(X) \cong \mathbb{R}\)。

In general, \(H(X) = H^1(X)\) does not hold.


[点击展开翻译]

一般而言，\(H(X) = H^1(X)\) 并不成立。

12.4.2.24 Example: Let \(X = \mathbb{N} \cup \{\infty\}\) with the topology given by a basis that consists of all sets of the form \(\{2n - 1\}, \{2n - 1, 2n, 2n + 1\}\), or \([2n - 1, \infty]\), with \(n \in \mathbb{N}\). Since \((n, n + 1) \in \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\) and \((n, \infty) \notin \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\) for each \(n \in \mathbb{N}\), the equivalence classes of \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) are \(\mathbb{N}\) and \(\{\infty\}\). However, the latter is not open in \(X\), so 1 and \(\infty\) cannot be separated by saturated open neighbourhoods (with respect to \(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)). Therefore, \(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(1)\) and \(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(\infty)\) cannot be separated by open sets, whereas \(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(1) \neq \pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(\infty)\). Hence \(H^1(X)\) is not Hausdorff and \(H^1(X) \neq H(X)\). In this case, \(H^2(X) = H(X)\) does hold since \(H^1(X)\) is finite.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.2.24 例：设 \(X = \mathbb{N} \cup \{\infty\}\)，其拓扑由形如 \(\{2n - 1\}, \{2n - 1, 2n, 2n + 1\}\) 或 \([2n - 1, \infty]\) 的所有集合构成的基给出，其中 \(n \in \mathbb{N}\)。因为对于每个 \(n \in \mathbb{N}\) 都有 \((n, n + 1) \in \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\) 且 \((n, \infty) \notin \overline{\mathrm{diag}(X)}\)，所以 \(\overset{1}{\sim}_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 的等价类为 \(\mathbb{N}\) 和 \(\{\infty\}\)。然而，后者在 \(X\) 中不是开集，因此 1 和 \(\infty\) 无法由饱和的开邻域（关于 \(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}\)）分离。因此，\(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(1)\) 和 \(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(\infty)\) 无法由开集分离，尽管 \(\pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(1) \neq \pi^1_{\mathrm{Haus}}(\infty)\)。故 \(H^1(X)\) 不是豪斯多夫空间且 \(H^1(X) \neq H(X)\)。在这种情况下，\(H^2(X) = H(X)\) 确实成立，因为 \(H^1(X)\) 是有限的。



12.4.3 The category Haus. | \(\mathbf{Haus}\) 范畴。
One may form the category of all small Hausdorff spaces or of all small compact Hausdorff spaces.


[点击展开翻译]

我们可以构造所有小豪斯多夫空间的范畴，或者所有小紧豪斯多夫空间的范畴。

12.4.3.1 Example: By \(\mathbf{Haus}\) we denote the category with objects all small Hausdorff spaces with morphisms all continuous functions.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.3.1 例：我们用 \(\mathbf{Haus}\) 表示以所有小豪斯多夫空间为对象、以所有连续函数为态射的范畴。

The category \(\mathbf{Haus}\) is a large but locally small category. The category \(\mathbf{Haus}\) is a reflective and full sub-category of \(\mathbf{Top}\). The fullness of \(\mathbf{Haus}\) in \(\mathbf{Top}\) is trivial. We have to prove the reflectivity.


[点击展开翻译]

范畴 \(\mathbf{Haus}\) 是一个大但局部小的范畴。 范畴 \(\mathbf{Haus}\) 是 \(\mathbf{Top}\) 的一个反射且完全的子范畴。\(\mathbf{Haus}\) 在 \(\mathbf{Top}\) 中的完全性是平凡的。我们需要证明其反射性。







12.4.3.2 Proposition: For any \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\) the Hausdorff quotient map \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is a reflection from \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\) to \(H(X) \in \mathbf{Haus}\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.3.2 命题：对于任意 \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\)，豪斯多夫商映射 \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) 是从 \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\) 到 \(H(X) \in \mathbf{Haus}\) 的一个反射。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \(Y\) be a Hausdorff space and \(f: X \to Y\) a continuous map. If \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_0) = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_1)\), then, by definition of the equivalence relation \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\), \(f(p_0) = f(p_1)\). Consequently, any \(f: X \to Y\) is compatible with \(\sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) and by consequence, there exists a unique function \(\tilde{f}: X / \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}} \to Y\) such that \(\tilde{f} = f \circ \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}\). We have to show that \(\tilde{f}\) is a continuous map and that \(X / \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) is a Hausdorff space. Recall that \(U\) is an open subset of \(X / \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) iff \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}^{-1}(U)\) is an open subset of \(X\). Let \(V\) be an open subset of \(Y\), then \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}^{-1}(\tilde{f}^{-1}(V)) = f^{-1}(V)\) is an open set of \(X\). We deduce that \(\tilde{f}^{-1}(U)\) is an open set of \(X / \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\) and as a consequence, \(\tilde{f}\) is continuous. If \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_0) \neq \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_1)\), then there is a Hausdorff space \(Y\) and a continuous map \(f: X \to Y\) such that \(f(p_0) \neq f(p_1)\). By the Hausdorffness, there are two disjoint open subsets \(V_0\) and \(V_1\) of \(Y\) such that \(f(p_0) \in V_0\) and \(f(p_1) \in V_1\). It implies that \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_0) \in \tilde{f}^{-1}(V_0)\) and \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}}(p_1) \in \tilde{f}^{-1}(V_1)\). The subsets \(\tilde{f}^{-1}(V_0)\) and \(\tilde{f}^{-1}(V_1)\) are clearly disjoint open subsets of \(X / \sim_{\mathrm{Haus}}\), which is thus a Hausdorff space. \(\blacksquare\)







12.4.3.3 Proposition: In \(\mathbf{Haus}\) the monomorphisms are the continuous injections, the epimorphisms are the continuous maps with dense image, and the bimorphisms are continuous injections with dense image.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.3.3 命题：在 \(\mathbf{Haus}\) 中，单态射是连续单射，满态射是具有稠密像的连续映射，双态射是具有稠密像的连续单射。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \(f: X \to Y\) be a morphism in \(\mathbf{Haus}\), namely a continuous map. If \(f\) is monic, then it is left-cancellable. For any \(p_0, p_1 \in X\) with \(f(p_0) = f(p_1)\), we consider the constant maps \(c_{p_0}: * \to X\) and \(c_{p_1}: * \to X\) sending the singleton to \(p_0\) and \(p_1\), respectively; then we have \(f \circ c_{p_0} = f \circ c_{p_1}: X \to Y\). Cancelling \(f\) on the left we have \(c_{p_0} = c_{p_1}\), which implies that \(p_0 = p_1\) and \(f\) is an injection. If \(f\) is injective, then let \(h_0, h_1: Z \to X\) be continuous maps such that \(f \circ h_0 = f \circ h_1\). For any \(r \in Z\), we have \(f(h_0(r)) = f(h_1(r))\), and by injectivity we have \(h_0(r) = h_1(r)\), this implies that \(h_0 = h_1\). Then, \(f\) is left-cancellable and is a monomorphism. If \(f\) is epic, … \(\blacksquare\)



12.4.4 The Hausdorff quotient functor. | 豪斯多夫商函子。
In this section, the general construction of \(H(X)\) from a topological space \(X\) will be extended to a functor \(H: \mathbf{Top} \to \mathbf{Haus}\).


[点击展开翻译]

在本节中，从拓扑空间 \(X\) 构造 \(H(X)\) 的一般构造将被推广为一个函子 \(H: \mathbf{Top} \to \mathbf{Haus}\)。







12.4.4.1 Definition: The functor \(H: \mathbf{Top} \to \mathbf{Haus}\) sends for any \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\) to its Hausdorff quotient \(H(X)\), and any \(f: X \to Y\) in \(\mathbf{Top}\), to \(H(f)\) be the unique continuous map \(H(X) \to H(Y)\) such that \(H(f) \circ \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X} = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y} \circ f\). This map exists and is unique, since \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y} \circ f: X \to H(Y)\) is a map from \(X\) to a Hausdorff space.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.4.1 定义：函子 \(H: \mathbf{Top} \to \mathbf{Haus}\) 将任意 \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\) 映射到其豪斯多夫商 \(H(X)\)，并将 \(\mathbf{Top}\) 中的任意 \(f: X \to Y\) 映射为 \(H(f)\)，即满足 \(H(f) \circ \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X} = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y} \circ f\) 的唯一连续映射 \(H(X) \to H(Y)\)。该映射存在且唯一，因为 \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y} \circ f: X \to H(Y)\) 是从 \(X\) 到豪斯多夫空间的映射。




It needs to be checked that this \(H\) is indeed a functor. It is clear that it sends identity morphisms to identity morphisms, since \(\mathrm{id}_{H(X)}\) is the unique map \(h: H(X) \to H(X)\) such that \(h \circ \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}} \circ \mathrm{id}_X\) for all \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\). So \(H(\mathrm{id}_X) = \mathrm{id}_{H(X)}\). Composition is also preserved by \(H\). Let \(X, Y, Z \in \mathbf{Top}\) with morphisms \(f: X \to Y, g: Y \to Z\) in \(\mathbf{Top}\). Then \((H(g) \circ H(f)) \circ \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X} = H(g) \circ (\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y} \circ f) = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Z} \circ (g \circ f)\). Hence, \(H(g) \circ H(f)\) is the unique map \(h: H(X) \to H(Y)\) such that \(h \circ \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X} = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Z} \circ (g \circ f)\). So \(H(g) \circ H(f) = H(g \circ f)\). The following main question that will be answered is whether the Hausdorff Functor preserves homotopy.


[点击展开翻译]

我们需要验证这个 \(H\) 确实是一个函子。显然它将恒等态射映射为恒等态射，因为 \(\mathrm{id}_{H(X)}\) 是使得对于所有 \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\) 都有 \(h \circ \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}} = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}} \circ \mathrm{id}_X\) 的唯一映射 \(h: H(X) \to H(X)\)。所以 \(H(\mathrm{id}_X) = \mathrm{id}_{H(X)}\)。\(H\) 也保持复合运算。设 \(X, Y, Z \in \mathbf{Top}\) 且在 \(\mathbf{Top}\) 中有态射 \(f: X \to Y, g: Y \to Z\)。那么 \((H(g) \circ H(f)) \circ \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X} = H(g) \circ (\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y} \circ f) = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Z} \circ (g \circ f)\)。因此，\(H(g) \circ H(f)\) 是满足 \(h \circ \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X} = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Z} \circ (g \circ f)\) 的唯一映射 \(h: H(X) \to H(Y)\)。所以 \(H(g) \circ H(f) = H(g \circ f)\)。 接下来的一个主要问题是豪斯多夫函子是否保持同伦，我们将会回答这个问题。







12.4.4.2 Theorem: Let \(X, Y\) be topological spaces. There is a continuous bijection \[H(X \times Y) \to H(X) \times H(Y),\] \[\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X \times Y}(p, q) \mapsto (\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(p), \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y}(q)). \qquad (181)\]


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.4.2 定理：设 \(X, Y\) 为拓扑空间。存在一个连续双射 \[H(X \times Y) \to H(X) \times H(Y),\] \[\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X \times Y}(p, q) \mapsto (\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(p), \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y}(q)). \qquad (181)\]






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Consider the following maps: \[\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X} \circ \pi_1: X \times Y \to H(X), \quad (p, q) \mapsto \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(p)\] \[\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y} \circ \pi_2: X \times Y \to H(Y), \quad (p, q) \mapsto \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y}(q). \qquad (182)\] By the universal property of the product \(H(X) \times H(Y)\), this induces a map \(N: X \times Y \to H(X) \times H(Y), (p, q) \mapsto (\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(x), \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y}(y))\). Since \(H(X) \times H(Y)\) is Hausdorff as a product of two Hausdorff spaces, this map factors through \(H(X \times Y)\), so there is a map \(\tilde{N}: H(X \times Y) \to H(X) \times H(Y)\) that sends \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X \times Y}(p, q)\) to \((\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(p), \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y}(q))\). Because \(N\) is surjective, \(\tilde{N}\) is also surjective. Now let \(p_0, p_1 \in X, q_0, q_1 \in Y\) be such that \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(p_0) = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(p_1)\) and \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y}(q_0) = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y}(q_1)\) and let \(f: X \times Y \to Z\) with \(Z\) Hausdorff. Consider these maps \[g: X \to X \times Y, a \mapsto (a, q_0)\] \[h: Y \to X \times Y, b \mapsto (p_1, b). \qquad (183)\] It follows that \[
\begin{aligned}
f(p_0, q_0) &= (f \circ g)(p_0) = (f \circ g)(p_1) = f(p_1, q_0) \\
&= (f \circ h)(q_0) = (f \circ h)(q_1) = f(p_1, q_1). \qquad (184)
\end{aligned}
\] So \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X \times Y}(p_0, q_0) = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X \times Y}(p_1, q_1)\). Therefore, \(\tilde{N}\) is injective and hence a bijection. \(\blacksquare\)







12.4.4.3 Corollary: Let \(X, Y\) be topological spaces such that \(H(X \times Y)\) is compact. Then \(\tilde{N}: H(X \times Y) \to H(X) \times H(Y)\), \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X \times Y}(p, q) \mapsto (\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(p), \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y}(q))\) is a homeomorphism.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.4.3 推论：设 \(X, Y\) 为拓扑空间且使得 \(H(X \times Y)\) 为紧致空间。那么 \(\tilde{N}: H(X \times Y) \to H(X) \times H(Y)\), \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X \times Y}(p, q) \mapsto (\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(p), \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y}(q))\) 是一个同胚。




Proof: Being a continuous bijection from a compact space to a Hausdorff space, \(\tilde{N}\) is a homeomorphism. \(\blacksquare\)






12.4.4.4 Corollary: Let \(X, Y\) be compact topological spaces. Then \(\tilde{N}: H(X \times Y) \to H(X) \times H(Y)\), \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X \times Y}(p, q) \mapsto (\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(x), \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y}(y))\) is a homeomorphism.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.4.4 推论：设 \(X, Y\) 为紧拓扑空间。那么 \(\tilde{N}: H(X \times Y) \to H(X) \times H(Y)\), \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X \times Y}(p, q) \mapsto (\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(x), \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, Y}(y))\) 是一个同胚。




Proof: The space \(H(X \times Y) = \pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X \times Y}(X \times Y)\) is compact, because it is a continuous image of the compact space \(X \times Y\). Therefore, \(\tilde{N}\) is a homeomorphism. \(\blacksquare\)
In the rest of this section we denote the unit interval \([0, 1]\) by \(I\). The following lemma can be found in a more general form in [6].


[点击展开翻译]

在本节的其余部分，我们将单位区间 \([0, 1]\) 记为 \(I\)。下面的引理可以在 [6] 中找到其更一般的形式。







12.4.4.5 Lemma: Let \(f: X \to Y\) be a quotient map of topological spaces. Then \(F: X \times I \to Y \times I\), \((p, t) \mapsto (f(p), t)\) is a quotient map.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.4.5 引理：设 \(f: X \to Y\) 为拓扑空间的商映射。那么 \(F: X \times I \to Y \times I\), \((p, t) \mapsto (f(p), t)\) 也是一个商映射。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \(U \subseteq X \times I\) be a saturated open set and let \((p, t) \in U\). Since \(U\) is open, there is a basic open neighbourhood \(V \times W \subseteq U\) of \((p, t)\). But there is also a closed interval \(W^\prime \subseteq W\) that is a neighbourhood of \(t\). Define the set \(V^\prime = \{ v \in X : \{v\} \times W^\prime \subseteq U \}\). Let \(a \in V^\prime\) and \(b \in X\) with \(f(a) = f(b)\). For any \(w \in W^\prime\), we have \(F(b, w) = F(a, w)\), so \((b, w) \in U\) because \(U\) is saturated. Therefore we get \(\{b\} \times W^\prime \subseteq U\) and hence \(b \in V^\prime\), and \(V^\prime\) is saturated with respect to \(f\). Let \(a \in V^\prime\). Because \(\{a\} \times W^\prime \subseteq U\), there is an open neighbourhood \(A_w \times B_w\) of \((a, w)\) for each \(w \in W^\prime\). The set of all \(B_w\) now covers \(W^\prime\). Since \(W^\prime\) is compact, it has a finite subcover \(\{ B_j : j \in J \}\) for some finite \(J \subseteq W^\prime\). We see that \(\left(\bigcap_{j \in J} A_j\right) \times W^\prime \subset \left(\bigcap_{j \in J} A_j\right) \times \left(\bigcup_{j \in J} B_j\right) \subseteq U\) holds. So, \(v \in V^\prime\) holds for all \(v \in \bigcap_{j \in J} A_j\). Hence \(a\) has an open neighbourhood \(\bigcap_{j \in J} A_j \subseteq V^\prime\), so \(V^\prime\) is open. Now observe that \(V^\prime \times W^{\prime \circ} \subseteq U\) is a saturated open neighbourhood of \((p, t)\). Thus \(U\) is a union of basic open sets as \(U = \bigcup_{u \in U} (A_u \times B_u)\), where \(A_u \times B_u\) is an open neighbourhood of \(u\) and all \(A_u\) are saturated. Therefore \(F(U) = F\left(\bigcup_{u \in U} (A_u \times B_u)\right) = \bigcup_{u \in U} (f(A_u) \times B_u)\), which is open. So \(F\) sends saturated open sets to open sets and is hence a quotient map. \(\blacksquare\)







12.4.4.6 Theorem: Let \(X\) be a topological space. The canonical map \(C: H(X \times I) \to H(X) \times I\), \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X \times I}(p, q) \mapsto (\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(p), q)\) is a homeomorphism.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.4.6 定理：设 \(X\) 为一个拓扑空间。典范映射 \(C: H(X \times I) \to H(X) \times I\), \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X \times I}(p, q) \mapsto (\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(p), q)\) 是一个同胚。




Proof: Since \(I\) is Hausdorff, \(H(I) = I\) holds. So, \(C\) is a well-defined bijective continuous map. Because of the lemma, \(X \times I \to H(X) \times I, (p, t) \mapsto (\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}(p), t)\) is a quotient map. By the corollary, \(C\) is a homeomorphism. \(\blacksquare\)
We prove that the Hausdorff Functor preserves homotopy. This can be stated otherwise by introducing the homotopy category and saying that \(H\) induces a functor in this category.


[点击展开翻译]

我们证明豪斯多夫函子保持同伦。换句话说，通过引入同伦范畴，我们可以说 \(H\) 在该范畴中诱导了一个函子。







12.4.4.7 Proposition: The functor \(H\) induces a functor in the homotopy category. That is, whenever \(f, g: X \to Y\) are homotopic maps of topological spaces, then \(H(f)\) and \(H(g)\) are also homotopic.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.4.7 命题：函子 \(H\) 在同伦范畴中诱导了一个函子。即，每当 \(f, g: X \to Y\) 是拓扑空间的同伦映射时，\(H(f)\) 和 \(H(g)\) 也是同伦的。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \(F: X \times I \to Y\) be a homotopy between \(f\) and \(g\). It easily follows that \(H(F): H(X \times I) \to H(Y)\) is a homotopy between \(H(f)\) and \(H(g)\), after identifying \(H(X \times I)\) with \(H(X) \times I\). Now let \([f]\) denote the homotopy class of any morphism \(f\) in \(\mathbf{Top}\). Since \([H(f)] = [H(g)]\) whenever \(f \simeq g\), we can define a functor \(H_h\) in the homotopy category by \(H_h(X) = H(X)\) for all \(X \in \mathbf{Top}\) and \(H_h([f]) = [H(f)]\) for all morphisms \(f\) in \(\mathbf{Top}\). \(\blacksquare\)







12.4.4.8 Corollary: A topological space \(X\) is Hausdorff iff \(X\) and \(H(X)\) are homeomorphic.


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.4.8 推论：一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 是豪斯多夫空间，当且仅当 \(X\) 与 \(H(X)\) 同胚。




Proof: As \(\mathbf{Haus}\) is a full subcategory of \(\mathbf{Top}\), one can use the proposition I.4.20 of [adamek]. \(\blacksquare\)
The epimorphisms of \(\mathbf{Haus}\) are image-dense morphisms.


[点击展开翻译]

\(\mathbf{Haus}\) 的满态射是像稠密的态射。







12.4.4.9 Proposition: Let \(f: X \to Y\) be an epimorphism in \(\mathbf{Haus}\), then \(\overline{f(X)} = Y\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.4.4.9 命题：设 \(f: X \to Y\) 为 \(\mathbf{Haus}\) 中的一个满态射，则 \(\overline{f(X)} = Y\)。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \(\pi: Y \to Y / \overline{f(X)}\) be the quotient map and \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}: Y / \overline{f(X)} \to H(Y / \overline{f(X)})\) be the Hausdorff quotient map. We have \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X} \circ \pi \circ f\) is constant and as \(f\) is an epimorphism of \(\mathbf{Haus}\), then \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X} \circ \pi\) is constant. So, either \(\pi\) is constant or \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}\) is constant. If \(\pi\) is constant, then \(Y = \overline{f(X)}\). Suppose that \(Y \neq \overline{f(X)}\) and \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}\) is constant. Let \(q \in Y \setminus \overline{f(X)}\). As \(\overline{f(X)}\) is a closed subset of \(Y\), then there exists an open subset \(V\) of \(Y\) such that \(q \in V \subset Y \setminus \overline{f(X)}\). By definition of \(\pi\), for \(q_0\) and \(q_1\) in \(V\), \(\pi(q_0) = \pi(q_1)\) iff \(q_0 = q_1\). It implies that \(\pi^{-1}(\pi(V)) = V\) and \(\pi(V)\) is a Hausdorff open subset of \(Y / \overline{f(A)}\). We deduce that \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X} \circ \pi(V)\) has at least one point which is different from \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X} \circ \pi\left(\overline{f(A)}\right)\). Consequently, \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}\) takes at least two different values; this fact is contradictory with \(\pi_{\mathrm{Haus}, X}\) constant. \(\blacksquare\)

title: SEPARATION
section: 12.5 Regular and normal spaces. | 正则空间与正规空间。
text:
12.5 Regular and normal spaces. | 正则空间与正规空间。

12.5.1 Regular spaces. | 正则空间。
SEPARATION AXIOMS IN NLAB AND [10, THEOREMS 5.3-5.5]






12.5.1.1 Proposition: A topological space \(X\) is \(\mathbf{T}_3\)

iff every neighborhood of a point in \(X\) contains a closed neighborhood;
iff any disjoint point and closed set in \(X\) are separated by closed neighborhoods.



[点击展开翻译]

12.5.1.1 命题：一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 是 \(\mathbf{T}_3\) 空间

当且仅当 \(X\) 中一点的每个邻域都包含一个闭邻域；
当且仅当 \(X\) 中任意不相交的点和闭集由闭邻域分离。







12.5.2 Normal spaces. | 正规空间。






12.5.2.1 Proposition: A topological space \(X\) is \(\mathbf{T}_4\)

iff every neighborhood of a closed set contains a closed neighborhood;
iff any disjoint closed sets in \(X\) are separated by closed neighborhoods;
iff any disjoint closed sets in \(X\) are separated by a function.



[点击展开翻译]

12.5.2.1 命题：一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 是 \(\mathbf{T}_4\) 空间

当且仅当一个闭集的每个邻域都包含一个闭邻域；
当且仅当 \(X\) 中任意不相交的闭集由闭邻域分离；
当且仅当 \(X\) 中任意不相交的闭集由函数分离。





Proof: The third item is the Urysohn’s lemma. \(\blacksquare\)


12.5.3 Urysohn’s lemma and Tietze extension theorem. | 乌雷松引理与蒂茨扩张定理。
[10, SECTION 5.3]






12.5.3.1 Lemma: Any closed subset \(F_0\) and open subset \(U_1\) of a \(\mathbf{T}_4\) space \(X\) with \(F_0 \subseteq U_1\) could be extended to a family \((U_s)_{s \in [0,1]}\) of open subsets and a family \((F_s)_{s \in [0,1]}\) of closed subsets of \(X\) such that \(U_0 = \emptyset\), \(F_1 = X\), and for any \(s_0, s_1 \in [0, 1]\) with \(s_0 < s_1\) we have \(U_{s_0} \subseteq F_{s_0} \subseteq U_{s_1} \subseteq F_{s_1}\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.5.3.1 引理：设 \(X\) 为 \(\mathbf{T}_4\) 空间，\(F_0\) 为闭集，\(U_1\) 为开集且 \(F_0 \subseteq U_1\)，则可以将其扩张为 \(X\) 的开集族 \((U_s)_{s \in [0,1]}\) 和闭集族 \((F_s)_{s \in [0,1]}\)，使得 \(U_0 = \emptyset\)，\(F_1 = X\)，并且对于任意 \(s_0, s_1 \in [0, 1]\) 且满足 \(s_0 < s_1\)，我们有 \(U_{s_0} \subseteq F_{s_0} \subseteq U_{s_1} \subseteq F_{s_1}\)。










12.5.3.2 Urysohn’s lemma: In a \(\mathbf{T}_4\) space any two disjoint closed subsets are separated by a function.


[点击展开翻译]

12.5.3.2 乌雷松引理 (Urysohn’s lemma)：在 \(\mathbf{T}_4\) 空间中，任意两个不相交的闭子集由函数分离。










12.5.3.3 Tietze extension theorem: Let \(A\) be a closed subset of a \(\mathbf{T}_4\) space \(X\). Then any continuous function \(f: A \to \mathbb{R}\) has an extension \(g: X \to \mathbb{R}\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.5.3.3 蒂茨扩张定理 (Tietze extension theorem)：设 \(A\) 是 \(\mathbf{T}_4\) 空间 \(X\) 的闭子集。则任意连续函数 \(f: A \to \mathbb{R}\) 都有一个扩张 \(g: X \to \mathbb{R}\)。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Urysohn’s lemma implies Tietze extension theorem in the case when \(A\) has exactly two components and \(f\) is locally constant. In other cases, see Exercise 12.6.3.2. \(\blacksquare\)

title: SEPARATION
section: 12.6 Properties of separation axioms. | 分离公理的性质。
text:
12.6 Properties of separation axioms. | 分离公理的性质。

12.6.1 Counterexamples of implications. | 蕴含关系的反例。






12.6.1.1 Proposition: Let \(\mathcal{T}\) be the topology on \(\mathbb{R}\) generated by \(\mathcal{T}_{\mathbb{R}} \cup \mathcal{T}_{\text{coc}}\). Then \((\mathbb{R}, \mathcal{T})\) is Hausdorff but not regular.


[点击展开翻译]

12.6.1.1 命题：设 \(\mathcal{T}\) 为由 \(\mathcal{T}_{\mathbb{R}} \cup \mathcal{T}_{\text{coc}}\) 生成的 \(\mathbb{R}\) 上的拓扑。则 \((\mathbb{R}, \mathcal{T})\) 是豪斯多夫空间但不是正则空间。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Since \(\mathcal{T}\) is finer than a Hausdorff topology \(\mathcal{T}_{\mathbb{R}}\), it is itself Hausdorff. We leave as an exercise that \(U \subseteq \mathbb{R}\) is open under the topology \(\mathcal{T}\) iff it is written as \(U = V \cap W\) for \(V \in \mathcal{T}_{\mathbb{R}}\) and \(W \in \mathcal{T}_{\text{coc}}\). Now \(B = \mathbb{Q}\) is closed whose only open neighborhood is \(\mathbb{R}\), and then it violates the assumption of the \(\mathbf{T}_3\) axiom with any \(p \in \mathbb{R} \setminus \mathbb{Q}\). \(\blacksquare\)

12.6.1.2 Example: Let \(H = \mathbb{R} \times ]0, \infty[\) be the upper half plane and \(\overline{H} = \mathbb{R} \times [0, \infty[\) be the closed upper half plane. Let \[\mathcal{B} = \mathcal{B}_H \cup \{B_{(x,y)}(y) \cup \{(x,0)\} : (x,y) \in H\}. \qquad (198)\] The Moore plane is \((\overline{H}, \mathcal{T}(\mathcal{B}))\).






12.6.1.3 Proposition: The Moore plane is regular but not normal.


[点击展开翻译]

12.6.1.3 命题：摩尔平面是正则的但不是正规的。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: The Moore plane \((\overline{H}, \mathcal{T}_{\text{Moore}})\) satisfies the \(\mathbf{T}_1\) axiom since every point is closed. For the \(\mathbf{T}_3\) axiom it remains to check that for any \(x \in \mathbb{R}\) and \(r > 0\) the set \(B_{(x,r)}(r) \cup \{(x, 0)\}\) contains a closed neighborhood \(D_{(x,\frac{r}{2})}(\frac{r}{2}) = \mathrm{Cl}(B_{(x,\frac{r}{2})}(\frac{r}{2}) \cup \{(x,0)\})\) of \((x, 0)\). Thus the Moore plane is regular. We claim that for any \(A \subseteq \mathbb{R}\), the set \(A \times \{0\}\) is closed in \((\overline{H}, \mathcal{T}_{\text{Moore}})\). In fact, taking the union of open sets \(H\) and \(B_{(x,1)}(1) \cup \{(x, 0)\}\) for \(x \in \mathbb{R} \setminus A\) we obtain the complement of \(A \times \{0\}\) in \(\overline{H}\). Note that \(Q = \mathbb{Q} \times (\mathbb{Q} \cap ]0, \infty[)\) is dense in \((\overline{H}, \mathcal{T}_{\text{Moore}})\), and if assuming the \(\mathbf{T}_4\) axiom we have the injection \[\mathrm{Map}(\mathbb{R} \times \{0\}; [0, 1]) \to C((\mathbb{R} \times \{0\}, \mathcal{T}_{\text{disc}}); [0, 1]) \to C((\overline{H}, \mathcal{T}_{\text{Moore}}); [0, 1]) \to \mathrm{Map}(Q; [0, 1]) \qquad (199)\] where \(\mathrm{Map}(\cdot; \cdot)\) is the set of maps and \(C(\cdot; \cdot)\) is the set of continuous maps. The first arrow is the identity since every map from a discrete space is continuous, the second arrow is by Tietze extension theorem, the third arrow is injective by the denseness of \(Q\). However comparing cardinalities \[|\mathrm{Map}(\mathbb{R} \times \{0\}; [0, 1])| = |[0, 1]| ^{|\mathbb{R} \times \{0\}|} = |\mathbb{R}|^{|\mathbb{R}|},\] \[|\mathrm{Map}(Q; [0, 1])| = |[0, 1]| ^{|Q|} = |\mathbb{R}|^{|\mathbb{N}|}. \qquad (200)\] Then \(|\mathbb{R}|^{|\mathbb{R}|} > |\mathbb{R}|^{|\mathbb{N}|}\) would lead to a contradiction and then the Moore plane is not normal. To see the inequality above one could use \(|\mathbb{R}|^{|\mathbb{R}|} \geq 2^{|\mathbb{R}|} > |\mathbb{R}| = |\mathbb{R}|^{|\mathbb{N}|}\) but actually \(|\mathbb{R}|^{|\mathbb{R}|} = 2^{|\mathbb{R}|}\) since \(|\mathbb{R}|^{|\mathbb{R}|} \leq (2^{|\mathbb{R}|})^{|\mathbb{R}|} = 2^{|\mathbb{R}| \cdot |\mathbb{R}|} = 2^{|\mathbb{R}|}\). \(\blacksquare\)

12.6.1.4 Example: Let \(\overline{H}_* = \overline{H} \cup \{\infty\}\) and let \[\mathcal{T}_{\text{Moore}}^* = \mathcal{T}_{\text{Moore}} \cup \{(\mathbb{R} \setminus F) \times \{0\} \cup \{\infty\} : F \subseteq \mathbb{R}, |F| < \infty\}. \qquad (201)\] Then \((\overline{H}_*, \mathcal{T}_{\text{Moore}}^*)\) is a topological space.






12.6.1.5 Proposition: The space \((\overline{H}_*, \mathcal{T}_{\text{Moore}}^*)\) is normal but contains the Moore space as a subspace.


[点击展开翻译]

12.6.1.5 命题：空间 \((\overline{H}_*, \mathcal{T}_{\text{Moore}}^*)\) 是正规的，但包含摩尔空间作为其子空间。










12.6.1.6 Definition: A subset of a topological space \(X\) is \(G_\delta\) if it is the intersection of countably many open sets; it is \(F_\sigma\) if it is the union of countably many closed sets.


[点击展开翻译]

12.6.1.6 定义：拓扑空间 \(X\) 的一个子集如果是可数个开集的交，则称为 \(G_\delta\) 集；如果是可数个闭集的并，则称为 \(F_\sigma\) 集。




Every open subset is trivially a \(G_\delta\)-subset, while every closed subset is a \(F_\sigma\)-subset.






12.6.1.7 Theorem: In a \(\mathbf{T}_4\) space any two disjoint \(G_\delta\) closed subsets are precisely separated by a function. In particular, a \(\mathbf{T}_4\) space is perfectly \(\mathbf{T}_4\) iff all closed subsets are \(G_\delta\).


[点击展开翻译]

12.6.1.7 定理：在 \(\mathbf{T}_4\) 空间中，任意两个不相交的 \(G_\delta\) 闭子集由函数精确分离。特别地，一个 \(\mathbf{T}_4\) 空间是完美 \(\mathbf{T}_4\) 空间，当且仅当所有闭子集都是 \(G_\delta\) 集。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: We observe that \(\mathbb{R}\) has the property that all closed subsets are \(G_\delta\) (equivalently, all open subsets are \(F_\sigma\)). Then for any continuous \(f: X \to \mathbb{R}\), the \(f\)-saturated closed subsets of \(X\) are \(G_\delta\). In particular, if \(f\) precisely separates two closed subsets \(A\) and \(B\) of \(X\), then \(A = f^{-1}(0)\) and \(B = f^{-1}(0)\) must be \(G_\delta\). Now suppose \(A\) and \(B\) are two \(G_\delta\) closed subsets of \(X\); then there are decreasing families \((V_j)_{j \in \mathbb{N}}\) and \((W_j)_{j \in \mathbb{N}}\) of open subsets of \(X\) such that \(A = \bigcap_{j=1}^\infty V_j\) and \(B = \bigcap_{j=1}^\infty W_j\). By the above lemma we achieve a tuple \(([0, 1], (U_s)_{s \in [0, 1]}, (F_s)_{s \in [0, 1]})\) satisfying certain monotonicity properties. The amended tuple \[\left([0, 1], (\tilde{U}_s \cap V_j)_{s \in [0, 1]}, (\tilde{F}_s)_{s \in [0, 1]}\right), \quad \tilde{U}_s = U_s \cap V_{\lfloor \frac{1}{s} \rfloor}, \tilde{F}_s = F_s \cap W_{\lfloor \frac{1}{s} \rfloor}^\complement \qquad (202)\] satisfies the same properties, and the Urysohn function \(\tilde{f}\) is generated from the amended tuple. \(\blacksquare\)



12.6.2 Hereditariness of separation axioms. | 分离公理的遗传性。






12.6.2.1 Theorem: The \(\mathbf{T}_0\), \(\mathbf{T}_1\), \(\mathbf{T}_2\), and \(\mathbf{T}_3\) axioms are hereditary. The \(\mathbf{T}_4\) axiom is closed-hereditary but not hereditary.


[点击展开翻译]

12.6.2.1 定理：\(\mathbf{T}_0\)、\(\mathbf{T}_1\)、\(\mathbf{T}_2\) 和 \(\mathbf{T}_3\) 公理是遗传的。\(\mathbf{T}_4\) 公理是闭遗传的但不是遗传的。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: The \(\mathbf{T}_0\), \(\mathbf{T}_1\), and \(\mathbf{T}_2\) axioms are hereditary since a neighborhood restricted to a subspace is still a neighborhood. Let \(A\) be a subspace of \(X\). For the \(\mathbf{T}_3\) axiom, if \(p \in A\) and closed \(B \subseteq A\) are disjoint, then there is a closed \(B_1 \subseteq X\) such that \(B_1 \cap A = B\). In particular, \(p \notin B_1\), and if \(X\) is \(\mathbf{T}_3\), then \(p\) and \(B_1\) are separated by neighborhoods \(U_1\) and \(V_1\) in \(X\), and then \(p\) and \(B\) are separated by neighborhoods \(U_1 \cap A\) and \(V_1 \cap B\) in \(A\). This argument does not work for \(\mathbf{T}_4\) as if \(C\) and \(B\) are disjoint closed subset of \(A\) we may not find closed subsets \(C_1\) and \(B_1\) of \(X\) with \(C_1 \cap A = C\) and \(B_1 \cap A = B\) that are still disjoint; it works when \(A\) is closed in \(X\). In this case, the \(\mathbf{T}_4\) axiom could be applied directly to \(C\) and \(B\) in \(X\). For counterexample of the hereditary of \(\mathbf{T}_4\) see the Moore plane with an extra point. \(\blacksquare\)







12.6.2.2 Theorem: Two nonempty topological spaces are \(\mathrm{T}_2\) iff their disjoint union is and iff their product is.


[点击展开翻译]

12.6.2.2 定理：两个非空拓扑空间是 \(\mathrm{T}_2\) 空间，当且仅当它们的不交并是 \(\mathrm{T}_2\) 空间，且当且仅当它们的乘积是 \(\mathrm{T}_2\) 空间。










12.6.2.3 Theorem: A product of regular spaces is regular, but a product of normal spaces is not necessarily normal.


[点击展开翻译]

12.6.2.3 定理：正则空间的乘积是正则的，但正规空间的乘积不一定是正规的。




Proof: For the counterexamples see the product of two real lines with the lower limit topology (Exercise 12.6.3.6). \(\blacksquare\)

title: IDENTIFYING AND ATTACHING SPACES
text: pixiv@SoyChicken

title: IDENTIFYING AND ATTACHING SPACES
text:
10.1 Constructions | 构造
In what follows we will introduce many very concrete geometric ways to get quotient spaces from known spaces.

10.1.1 Squeezing, identifying, and attaching spaces | 压缩、等同与附加空间
Let \(A\) be a subset of a topological space \(X\). We may define an equivalence relation on \(X\) by identifying all points of \(A\). In the quotient space, we “squeeze” all points in \(A\) to one point, which is denoted by \(X/A\).






10.1.1.1 Definition: Let \(A\) be a subset of a topological space \(X\). Then the quotient space \(X/A\) of \(X\) by squeezing \(A\) is by the equivalence relation \[
p \sim q \iff (p = q) \lor (p, q \in A). \quad (129)
\]


[点击展开翻译]

10.1.1.1 定义： 设 \(A\) 是拓扑空间 \(X\) 的一个子集。那么通过压缩 \(A\) 得到的 \(X\) 的商空间 \(X/A\) 是由以下等价关系给出的： \[
p \sim q \iff (p = q) \lor (p, q \in A). \quad (129)
\]










10.1.1.2 Proposition: The following diagram commutes \[
\begin{array}{ccc}
A & \xrightarrow{\iota_{A,X}} & X \\
\downarrow & & \downarrow\pi \\
* & \xrightarrow{} & X/A
\end{array}
\]


[点击展开翻译]

10.1.1.2 命题： 以下图表交换 \[
\begin{array}{ccc}
A & \xrightarrow{\iota_{A,X}} & X \\
\downarrow & & \downarrow\pi \\
* & \xrightarrow{} & X/A
\end{array}
\]




Let \(X\) be a topological space. We may “identify” the points \(a\) and \(b\) in \(X\) by the equivalence relation with \(a \sim b\). Given a map from a subset \(A\) to a subset \(B\) of \(X\) by identifying each point in \(A\) to a specific point in \(B\).






10.1.1.3 Definition: Let \(h: A \to B\) be a continuous map between disjoint subspaces of \(X\). Then the quotient space \(X/h\) of \(X\) by identifying the domain with the range of \(h\) is by the equivalence relation \[
p \sim_h q \iff (p = q) \lor (p \in A, q = h(p) \in B). \quad (130)
\]


[点击展开翻译]

10.1.1.3 定义： 设 \(h: A \to B\) 是 \(X\) 的两个不交子空间之间的连续映射。那么通过将 \(h\) 的定义域和值域等同而得到的 \(X\) 的商空间 \(X/h\) 是由以下等价关系给出的： \[
p \sim_h q \iff (p = q) \lor (p \in A, q = h(p) \in B). \quad (130)
\]




Let \(X\) and \(Y\) be topological spaces. We may “attach” one space to another along a given map. Namely, if \(f: A \to X\) a continuous map from a subspace of \(X\). Then we identifying each point \(a \in A\) with \(h(a) \in f(A)\) in \(X \sqcup Y\).






10.1.1.4 Definition: Let \(h: A \to Y\) be an embedding of topological spaces and \(A\) be a subspace of \(X\). Then the attaching space \(X \cup_h Y\) of \(X\) by the attaching map \(h\) is the quotient space of \(X \sqcup Y\) by the equivalence relation \[
p \sim_h q \iff (p = q) \lor (p \in A, q = h(p) \in Y). \quad (131)
\]


[点击展开翻译]

10.1.1.4 定义： 设 \(h: A \to Y\) 为拓扑空间的嵌入，且 \(A\) 是 \(X\) 的子空间。那么通过附加映射 \(h\) 得到的 \(X\) 的附加空间 \(X \cup_h Y\) 是 \(X \sqcup Y\) 的商空间，由以下等价关系给出： \[
p \sim_h q \iff (p = q) \lor (p \in A, q = h(p) \in Y). \quad (131)
\]






10.1.2 Products and coproducts of pointed spaces.
The construction of products and coproducts can be done to pointed sets (Definition 4.3.2.1), as well as to pointed topological spaces which yields natural topologies. The product of pointed topological spaces is called the smash product, and in particular, the coproduct of pointed topological spaces, called the wedge sum, preserves the connectedness.






10.1.2.1 Definition: Let \((X, p)\) and \((Y, q)\) be pointed sets. Their wedge sum is the pointed set \((X \lor Y, r)\) where \[
X \lor Y = X \sqcup Y / \{p, q\}, \quad r = \{p, q\}. \quad (132)
\]


[点击展开翻译]

10.1.2.1 定义： 设 \((X, p)\) 和 \((Y, q)\) 为带点集合。它们的楔和是带点集合 \((X \lor Y, r)\)，其中 \[
X \lor Y = X \sqcup Y / \{p, q\}, \quad r = \{p, q\}. \quad (132)
\]










10.1.2.2 Proposition: Let \((X, p)\) and \((Y, q)\) be pointed sets with topologies on \(X\) and \(Y\), then the wedge sum \((X \lor Y, r)\) is equipped with a natural topology.


[点击展开翻译]

10.1.2.2 命题： 设 \((X, p)\) 和 \((Y, q)\) 为带点集合，且在 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 上赋予了拓扑，那么楔和 \((X \lor Y, r)\) 配备有一个自然拓扑。










10.1.2.3 Definition: The wedge sum of two pointed topological spaces \((X, p)\) and \((Y, q)\) is the pointed topological space \((X \lor Y, r)\) equipped with the natural topology.


[点击展开翻译]

10.1.2.3 定义： 两个带点拓扑空间 \((X, p)\) 和 \((Y, q)\) 的楔和是配备有自然拓扑的带点拓扑空间 \((X \lor Y, r)\)。




More generally, given a family of pointed spaces \(\{(X_\alpha, p_\alpha)\}_{\alpha \in A}\), we may form the wedge sum \(\bigvee_\alpha X_\alpha\) by attaching all \(X_\alpha\)’s at the point \(p_\alpha\)’s.






10.1.2.4 Definition: Let \((X, p)\) and \((Y, q)\) be pointed sets. Their smash product is the pointed set \((X \land Y, r)\) where \[
X \land Y = X \times Y / X \lor Y, \quad r = X \lor Y. \quad (133)
\]


[点击展开翻译]

10.1.2.4 定义： 设 \((X, p)\) 和 \((Y, q)\) 为带点集合。它们的砸积是带点集合 \((X \land Y, r)\)，其中 \[
X \land Y = X \times Y / X \lor Y, \quad r = X \lor Y. \quad (133)
\]










10.1.2.5 Proposition: Let \((X, p)\) and \((Y, q)\) be pointed sets with topologies on \(X\) and \(Y\), then the smash product \((X \land Y, r)\) is equipped with a natural topology.


[点击展开翻译]

10.1.2.5 命题： 设 \((X, p)\) 和 \((Y, q)\) 为带点集合，且在 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 上赋予了拓扑，那么砸积 \((X \land Y, r)\) 配备有一个自然拓扑。










10.1.2.6 Definition: The smash product of two pointed topological spaces \((X, p)\) and \((Y, q)\) is the pointed topological space \((X \land Y, r)\) equipped with the natural topology.


[点击展开翻译]

10.1.2.6 定义： 两个带点拓扑空间 \((X, p)\) 和 \((Y, q)\) 的砸积是配备有自然拓扑的带点拓扑空间 \((X \land Y, r)\)。




More generally, given a family of pointed spaces \(\{(X_\alpha, p_\alpha)\}_{\alpha \in A}\), we may form the smash product \(\bigwedge_\alpha X_\alpha\), too.


10.1.3 Cone spaces and suspensions | 锥空间与悬挂






10.1.3.1 Definition: Let \(X\) and \(Y\) be topological spaces. Then

the cone of \(X\) is the squeezing space \(CX = X \times [0, 1] / X \times \{0\}\);
the suspension of \(X\) is the quotient space \(SX\) of \(X \times [0, 1]\) given by squeezing \(X \times \{0\}\) to one point, and also squeezing all points in \(X \times \{1\}\) to another point;
the join of \(X\) and \(Y\) is the the quotient space \(X \star Y\) given by \(X \times Y \times [0, 1] / \sim\), where the equivalence is \[
(x, y_1, 0) \sim (x, y_2, 0), (x_1, y, 1) \sim (x_2, y, 1), \quad x, x_1, x_2 \in X; y, y_1, y_2 \in Y. \quad (134)
\]



[点击展开翻译]

10.1.3.1 定义： 设 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 为拓扑空间。那么

\(X\) 的锥是压缩空间 \(CX = X \times [0, 1] / X \times \{0\}\)；
\(X\) 的悬挂是 \(X \times [0, 1]\) 的商空间 \(SX\)，由将 \(X \times \{0\}\) 压缩为一点，同时也将 \(X \times \{1\}\) 中的所有点压缩为另一点给出；
\(X\) 和 \(Y\) 的联接是由 \(X \times Y \times [0, 1] / \sim\) 给出的商空间 \(X \star Y\)，其中等价关系为 \[
(x, y_1, 0) \sim (x, y_2, 0), (x_1, y, 1) \sim (x_2, y, 1), \quad x, x_1, x_2 \in X; y, y_1, y_2 \in Y. \quad (134)
\]






锥空间 (Cone, \(CX\))


物理动作：把空间 \(X\) 向上拉伸出一个柱子 \(X \times [0, 1]\)，然后把顶端的整个盖子（\(X \times \{0\}\)）捏缩成一个点。
直觉：如果你拿一个圆（\(S^1\)）做底，向上拉成一个圆柱，再把圆柱的顶面捏成一个点，你得到的就是一个完美的圆锥体。这就是它名字的由来。
拓扑意义：任何空间的锥必定是可缩的 (contractible)，即可以连续形变成一个点（沿着母线滑向顶点即可）。


悬挂 (Suspension, \(SX\))


物理动作：把空间 \(X\) 向上拉伸出一个柱子，然后把顶端的盖子捏成一个点（北极），同时把底端的盖子也捏成另一个点（南极）。
直觉：如果你拿一个圆（\(S^1\)）做赤道，向上捏出一个北极，向下捏出一个南极，你得到的就是一个二维球面（\(S^2\)）！
公式推导：\(S(S^n) = S^{n+1}\)。悬挂操作是拓扑学里最标准的“升维机器”，它能把低维球面精确地升级为高一维的球面。


连接 (Join, \(X \star Y\))


物理动作：这个稍微抽象一点。假设空间 \(X\) 在左边，空间 \(Y\) 在右边。你在 \(X\) 里的每一点 \(x\)，和 \(Y\) 里的每一点 \(y\) 之间，都拉一根线段 \([0,1]\) 连接起来。
公式解读：\(X \times Y \times [0, 1]\) 就是所有这些线段的集合。等价关系 \((x, y_1, 0) \sim (x, y_2, 0)\) 表示在线段的 \(0\) 端（左端），所有的线段都汇聚在 \(X\) 的点 \(x\) 上（忽略了 \(Y\) 的差异）；同理，在 \(1\) 端（右端），所有的线段都汇聚在 \(Y\) 的点 \(y\) 上。
直觉：两个点的 Join 是一条线段；点和线段的 Join 是一个实心三角形；两条不相交线段的 Join 是一个实心四面体。



10.1.4 Mapping cylinders, cones and tori | 映射柱、映射锥与映射环面






10.1.4.1 Definition: Let \(f: X \to Y\) be a continuous map between topological spaces. Then

the mapping cylinder of \(f\) is the attaching space \(M_f = (X \times [0, 1]) \sqcup_{\tilde{f}} Y\) and \(\tilde{f}: X \times \{0\} \to Y\), \((x, 0) \mapsto f(x)\);
the mapping cone of \(f\) is the quotient space \(C_f = M_f / \sim\) where \[
(x_1, 1) \sim (x_2, 1), (x, 0) \sim f(x), \quad x, x_1, x_2 \in X; \quad (135)
\]
if \(f: X \to X\) is a homeomorphism, the mapping torus of \(f\) is the quotient space \(T_f = X \times [0, 1] / (1, x) \sim (0, f(x))\).



[点击展开翻译]

10.1.4.1 定义： 设 \(f: X \to Y\) 是拓扑空间之间的连续映射。那么

\(f\) 的映射柱是附加空间 \(M_f = (X \times [0, 1]) \sqcup_{\tilde{f}} Y\)，且 \(\tilde{f}: X \times \{0\} \to Y\), \((x, 0) \mapsto f(x)\)；
\(f\) 的映射锥是商空间 \(C_f = M_f / \sim\)，其中 \[
(x_1, 1) \sim (x_2, 1), (x, 0) \sim f(x), \quad x, x_1, x_2 \in X; \quad (135)
\]
如果 \(f: X \to X\) 是一个同胚，那么 \(f\) 的映射环面是商空间 \(T_f = X \times [0, 1] / (1, x) \sim (0, f(x))\)。











10.1.4.2 Remark: Mapping tori of surface homeomorphisms play a key role in the theory of 3-manifolds and have been intensely studied.


[点击展开翻译]

10.1.4.2 备注： 曲面同胚的映射环面在 3-流形理论中起着关键作用，并且已被深入研究。

title: IDENTIFYING AND ATTACHING SPACES
text:
10.2

10.2.1 Spheres and tori | 球面与环面
10.2.1.1 Example: The circle \(\mathbb{S}^1\) is one of the equivalent descriptions:

\(\{(x_0, x_1) \in \mathbb{R}^2 : x_0^2 + x_1^2 = 1\}\) with the subspace topology.
\([0, 1]/\{0, 1\}\) with the quotient topology where the equivalence is \(0 \sim 1\).
\(\mathbb{R}/ \sim_{\mathbb{Z}}\) with the quotient topology where the equivalence is \[
x \sim_{\mathbb{Z}} y \iff x - y \in \mathbb{Z}. \quad (137)
\]



[点击展开翻译]

10.2.1.1 例： 圆 \(\mathbb{S}^1\) 是以下等价描述之一：

带有子空间拓扑的 \(\{(x_0, x_1) \in \mathbb{R}^2 : x_0^2 + x_1^2 = 1\}\)。
带有商拓扑的 \([0, 1]/\{0, 1\}\)，其中等价关系为 \(0 \sim 1\)。
带有商拓扑的 \(\mathbb{R}/ \sim_{\mathbb{Z}}\)，其中等价关系为

\[
x \sim_{\mathbb{Z}} y \iff x - y \in \mathbb{Z}. \quad (137)
\]

10.2.1.2 Example: The \(n\)-sphere \(\mathbb{S}^n\) for \(n \in \mathbb{N}_0\) is one of the equivalent descriptions:

\(\{(x_0, ..., x_n) \in \mathbb{R}^{n+1} : x_0^2 + \cdots + x_n^2 = 1\}\) with the subspace topology.
\(\bar{\mathbb{B}}^n/\mathbb{S}^{n-1}\) with the quotient topology where \(\mathbb{S}^{n-1} = \partial\bar{\mathbb{B}}^n\) is the boundary sphere.



[点击展开翻译]

10.2.1.2 例： 对于 \(n \in \mathbb{N}_0\)，\(n\)-球面 \(\mathbb{S}^n\) 是以下等价描述之一：

带有子空间拓扑的 \(\{(x_0, ..., x_n) \in \mathbb{R}^{n+1} : x_0^2 + \cdots + x_n^2 = 1\}\)。
带有商拓扑的 \(\bar{\mathbb{B}}^n/\mathbb{S}^{n-1}\)，其中 \(\mathbb{S}^{n-1} = \partial\bar{\mathbb{B}}^n\) 是边界球面。


10.2.1.3 Example: The 2-torus \(\mathbb{T}^2\) is one of the equivalent descriptions:

\({\mathbb{S}^1}^2\) with the product topology.
\([0, 1]^2/[(t, 0) \sim (t, 1), (0, t) \sim (1, t)]\) with the quotient topology.
\(\mathbb{R}^2/ \sim_{\mathbb{Z}^2}\) with the quotient topology where the equivalence is \[
x \sim_{\mathbb{Z}^2} y \iff x - y \in \mathbb{Z}^2. \quad (138)
\]



[点击展开翻译]

10.2.1.3 例： 2-环面 \(\mathbb{T}^2\) 是以下等价描述之一：

带有乘积拓扑的 \({\mathbb{S}^1}^2\)。
带有商拓扑的 \([0, 1]^2/[(t, 0) \sim (t, 1), (0, t) \sim (1, t)]\)。
带有商拓扑的 \(\mathbb{R}^2/ \sim_{\mathbb{Z}^2}\)，其中等价关系为 \[
x \sim_{\mathbb{Z}^2} y \iff x - y \in \mathbb{Z}^2. \quad (138)
\]


10.2.1.4 Example: The \(n\)-torus \(\mathbb{T}^n\) for \(n \in \mathbb{N}_0\) is one of the equivalent descriptions:

\((\mathbb{S}^1)^n\) with the product topology.
\([0, 1]^n/ \sim\) with the quotient topology where the equivalence is \[
(x_0, ..., x_i, ..., x_n) \sim (x_0, ..., y_i, ..., x_n) \text{ where } x_i, y_i \in \{0, 1\}, i \in \{1, ..., n\}. \quad (139)
\]
\(\mathbb{R}^n/ \sim_{\mathbb{Z}^n}\) with the quotient topology where the equivalence is \[
x \sim_{\mathbb{Z}^n} y \iff x - y \in \mathbb{Z}^n. \quad (140)
\]



[点击展开翻译]

10.2.1.4 例： 对于 \(n \in \mathbb{N}_0\)，\(n\)-环面 \(\mathbb{T}^n\) 是以下等价描述之一：

带有乘积拓扑的 \((\mathbb{S}^1)^n\)。
带有商拓扑的 \([0, 1]^n/ \sim\)，其中等价关系为 \[
(x_0, ..., x_i, ..., x_n) \sim (x_0, ..., y_i, ..., x_n) \text{ 其中 } x_i, y_i \in \{0, 1\}, i \in \{1, ..., n\}. \quad (139)
\]
带有商拓扑的 \(\mathbb{R}^n/ \sim_{\mathbb{Z}^n}\)，其中等价关系为 \[
x \sim_{\mathbb{Z}^n} y \iff x - y \in \mathbb{Z}^n. \quad (140)
\]




10.2.2 Projective spaces | 射影空间
10.2.2.1 Example: The real projective plane \(\mathbb{R}P^2\) is one of the equivalent descriptions:

\(\mathbb{S}^2/ \sim\) with the quotient topology where the equivalence is \[
x \sim y \iff x = \pm y. \quad (141)
\]
\([0, 1]^2/[(t, 0) \sim (1 - t, 1), (0, t) \sim (1, 1 - t)]\).
\(\bar{\mathbb{B}}^2/ \sim\) with the quotient topology where the equivalence is \[
x \sim y \iff (x = y) \lor (x, y \in \mathbb{S}^1 \land x = \pm y). \quad (142)
\]
\(\mathbb{R}^3 \setminus \{0\} / \sim\) with the quotient topology where the equivalence is \[
x \sim y \iff (\exists \lambda \in \mathbb{R} \setminus \{0\})(y = \lambda x). \quad (143)
\] Then \(\mathbb{R}P^2\) is the space of lines in \(\mathbb{R}^3\) passing the origin.



[点击展开翻译]

10.2.2.1 例： 实射影平面 \(\mathbb{R}P^2\) 是以下等价描述之一：

带有商拓扑的 \(\mathbb{S}^2/ \sim\)，其中等价关系为 \[
x \sim y \iff x = \pm y. \quad (141)
\]
\([0, 1]^2/[(t, 0) \sim (1 - t, 1), (0, t) \sim (1, 1 - t)]\)。
带有商拓扑的 \(\bar{\mathbb{B}}^2/ \sim\)，其中等价关系为 \[
x \sim y \iff (x = y) \lor (x, y \in \mathbb{S}^1 \land x = \pm y). \quad (142)
\]
带有商拓扑的 \(\mathbb{R}^3 \setminus \{0\} / \sim\)，其中等价关系为 \[
x \sim y \iff (\exists \lambda \in \mathbb{R} \setminus \{0\})(y = \lambda x). \quad (143)
\] 那么 \(\mathbb{R}P^2\) 是 \(\mathbb{R}^3\) 中过原点的直线的空间。


10.2.2.2 Example: The real projective \(n\)-space \(\mathbb{R}P^n\) for \(n \in \mathbb{N}\) is one of the equivalent descriptions:

\(\mathbb{S}^n/\sim\) with the quotient topology where the equivalence is \[
x \sim y \iff x = \pm y. \quad (144)
\]
\([0, 1]^n\) identifying the antipodals on \(\partial[0, 1]^n\) with the quotient topology.
\(\bar{\mathbb{B}}^n/\sim\) with the quotient topology where the equivalence is \[
x \sim y \iff (x = y) \lor (x, y \in \mathbb{S}^{n-1} \land x = \pm y). \quad (145)
\]
\(\mathbb{R}^{n+1} \setminus \{0\} / \sim\) with the quotient topology where the equivalence is \[
x \sim y \iff (\exists \lambda \in \mathbb{R} \setminus \{0\})(y = \lambda x). \quad (146)
\] Then \(\mathbb{R}P^n\) is the space of lines in \(\mathbb{R}^{n+1}\) passing the origin.







10.2.2.3 Remark: Note that \(\mathbb{R}P^1\) is in fact homeomorphic to \(\mathbb{S}^1\). However, the higher dimensional projective spaces are complicated and \(\mathbb{R}P^n\) is not orientable for any even \(n\).


[点击展开翻译]

10.2.2.3 备注： 注意 \(\mathbb{R}P^1\) 实际上同胚于 \(\mathbb{S}^1\)。然而，更高维的射影空间是复杂的，并且对于任何偶数 \(n\)，\(\mathbb{R}P^n\) 都是不可定向的。




10.2.2.4 Example: The complex projective \(n\)-space \(\mathbb{C}P^n\) for \(n \in \mathbb{N}\) is \(\mathbb{C}^{n+1} \setminus \{0\} / \sim\) with the quotient topology where the equivalence is \[
z \sim w \iff (\exists \lambda \in \mathbb{C} \setminus \{0\})(z = \lambda w). \quad (147)
\] Then \(\mathbb{C}P^n\) is the space of complex lines in \(\mathbb{C}^{n+1}\) passing the origin.


10.2.3 Other surfaces | 其他曲面
10.2.3.1 Example: The cylinder is the product space \(\mathbb{S}^1 \times [0, 1]\).
10.2.3.2 Example: The Klein bottle is the quotient space \([0, 1]^2/[(t, 0) \sim (t, 1), (0, t) \sim (1, 1 - t)]\).
10.2.3.3 Example: The Mobiüs strip is the quotient space \([0, 1]^2/[(0, t) \sim (1, 1 - t)]\).






10.2.3.4 Proposition: The cylinder is homeomorphic to \([0, 1]^2/[(0, t) \sim (1, t)]\).


[点击展开翻译]

10.2.3.4 命题： 圆柱面同胚于 \([0, 1]^2/[(0, t) \sim (1, t)]\)。










10.2.3.5 Remark: It turns out that any (compact) surface can be constructed by starting at a suitably chosen polygon and attaching its boundary edges in suitable way. Such polygonal presentation can be used to prove the classification theorem of compact surfaces.


[点击展开翻译]

10.2.3.5 备注： 事实证明，任何（紧致）曲面都可以通过从一个适当选择的多边形开始，并以适当的方式粘合其边界边来构造。这种多边形表示可用于证明紧致曲面的分类定理。

title: IDENTIFYING AND ATTACHING SPACES
text:
10.3 Local homeomorphisms | 局部同胚






10.3.0.1 Definition: A map \(f: X \to Y\) is a local homeomorphism iff

\(f\) is continuous;
\(\mathcal{T}_X\) has a basis \(\mathcal{B}\) such that \(f(U)\) is open for any \(U \in \mathcal{B}\),
and the submap \(f|_{U, f(U)}: U \to f(U)\) is a homeomorphism.



[点击展开翻译]

10.3.0.1 定义： 映射 \(f: X \to Y\) 是一个局部同胚当且仅当

\(f\) 是连续的；
