Any continuous map \(f : X \to Y\) from a compactly generated Hausdorff space \(X\) factors as \(f = \varepsilon f'\) where \(f' : X \to KY\) is the same function (as \(f\)) and is continuous because \(X\) is compactly generated. This shows that \(\varepsilon\) is universal from \(K\) to \(Y\), so is the co unit of an adjunction which makes \(\mathbf{CGHaus}\) coreflective in \(\mathbf{Haus}\), as desired. The description of \(KY\) means also that a function \(g : Y \to Z\) to a topological space \(Z\) is continuous, on \(KY\) as \(g\varepsilon : KY \to Z\), iff the original \(g\) is continuous on all compact subsets of \(Y\). Observe also that metrizable spaces and locally compact Hausdorff spaces are compactly generated. \(\blacksquare\)







13.7.1.5 Proposition: \(\mathbf{CGHaus}\) is (small) complete and cocomplete.


[点击展开翻译]

\(\mathbf{CGHaus}\) 是（小）完备且余完备的。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: The category \(\mathbf{Haus}\) is complete [9, Propostion V.9.2] and a right adjoint such as \(K\) preserves limits. Hence \(\mathbf{CGHaus}\) is complete. In particular, the product (written \(\square\)) of two spaces \(X\) and \(Y\) in \(\mathbf{CGHaus}\) is obtained from their “ordinary” product \(X \times Y\) in \(\mathbf{Haus}\) as \[X \square Y = K(X \times Y). \qquad (220)\] In other words, the \(\square\)-product of Kelley spaces is the product of the underlying sets, with the Kelleyfication of the usual product topology. Cocompleteness follows readily. Since any coproduct in \(\mathbf{Haus}\) of compactly generated spaces is also compactly generated, it will suffice to construct the coequalizer of a parallel pair \(f, g : Y \rightrightarrows X\) in \(\mathbf{CGHaus}\). Take the coequalizer \(p : X \to Q\) in \(\mathbf{Haus}\) [9, Propostion V.9.2] and form \(KQ\). Since \(\varepsilon : KQ \to Q\) is universal, there is a unique continuous \(p' : X \to KQ\) with \(\varepsilon p' = p\) and \(p' f = p' g\). Since \(p'\) is also a map in \(\mathbf{Haus}\), and \(p\) is the coequalizer of \(f\) and \(g\) there, there is a continuous \(t : Q \to KQ\) with \(p' = tp\). Then \(p = \varepsilon p' = \varepsilon tp\), so \(\varepsilon t = 1\) and \(\varepsilon t \varepsilon = \varepsilon\). But \(\varepsilon\) is monic (in \(\mathbf{Haus}\)), so \(t\varepsilon = 1\), and \(\varepsilon\) is an isomorphism: The coequalizer in \(\mathbf{Haus}\) lies in \(\mathbf{CGHaus}\). \(\blacksquare\)

13.7.1.6 Example: If \(A\) is a subset of a compactly generated Hausdorff space \(X\), then we get an identification space \(X//A\) as a coequalizer in \(\mathbf{CGHaus}\) (collapse all of \(A\) to a point in \(\mathbf{CGHaus}\)). It is the largest Hausdorff quotient of the space \(X/A\) (collapsed in \(\mathbf{Top}\)); its topology is automatically compactly generated.






13.7.1.7 Theorem: \(\mathbf{CGHaus}\) is a cartesian closed category.


[点击展开翻译]

\(\mathbf{CGHaus}\) 是一个笛卡尔闭范畴。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: For two compactly generated Hausdorff spaces \(X\) and \(Y\) define \[X^Y = K(\text{Cop}(Y, X)), \qquad (221)\] the function space with the Kelleyfication of the compact-open topology. Define \(e : X^Y \square Y \to X\), \((f, q) \mapsto fq\) be the evaluation. We claim that \(e\) is continuous; it suffices to prove that \(e : X^Y \times Y \to X\) is continuous on compact sets. Since any compact subset of the product space is contained in the product of its projections, it suffices to show that \(e\) is continuous on any set of the form \(D \times C\), where \(D\) is compact in \(\text{Cop}(Y, X)\) and \(C\) is compact in \(Y\). Consider \((f, q) \in D \times C\), and let \(U\) be an open set of \(X\) containing \(f(q)\). Since \(f : Y \to X\) is continuous, there exists a neighborhood \(M\) of \(q\) in \(C\) whose closure satisfies \(f(M) \subseteq U\). But \(N(M, U)\) as given before is a set of the subbase for \(\text{Cop}(Y, X)\) and \((N(M, U) \cap D) \times M\) is open in \(D \times C\), contains \((f, q)\), and is mapped by \(e\) into \(U\). This proves \(e\) continuous. It remains to show \(e\) universal from \(- \square Y\) to \(X\). Consider any morphism \(h : Z \square Y \to X\) in \(\mathbf{CGHaus}\). Then we construct \(k : Z \to \mathbf{Set}(Y, X)\) as \(k = h^\sharp\); that is, so that \((kr)q = h(r, q)\) for all \(r \in Z\) and \(q \in Y\). A direct proof shows that \(kr : Y \to X\) is continuous; thus \(kr \in X^Y\). Next, we prove that \(Z \to X^Y\), \(r \mapsto kr\) is continuous. Since \(Z\) is compactly generated, it is enough to show \(Z \to \text{Cop}(Y, X)\) continuous. Let \(N(C, U)\) be one of the subbasic open sets in the compact-open topology, and suppose that \(kr \in N(C, U)\); thus \(h(\{z\} \times C) \subseteq U\). Since \(U\) is open, \(C\) compact, and \(h\) continuous, there is a neighborhood \(V\) of \(r\) such that \(h(V \times C) \subseteq U\). This implies that \(kV \subseteq N(C, U)\). Therefore \(k\) is continuous. We now have the commutative diagram by the adjunction in \(\mathbf{Set}\), there is at most one \(k\) with \(e(k \square 1) = h\), and we have just shown this \(k\) continuous. Therefore \(e\) is universal, and defines the desired adjunction \[\mathbf{CGHaus}(Z \square Y, X) \cong \mathbf{CGHaus}(Z, X^Y). \qquad (222)\] Since \(\square\) designates the product in \(\text{cat}\)(“\(\mathbf{CGHaus}\)”), this category is cartesian closed. \(\blacksquare\)

This adjunction is a bijection of sets. One also wishes the corresponding homeomorphism \[X^{Z \square Y} \to (X^Y)^Z \qquad (223)\] of function spaces. This follows from the adjunction for categorical reasons [9, Exercise IV.6.3]. This summarizes the basic properties of the category \(\mathbf{CGHaus}\). More extensive work (Steenrod [1967] and elsewhere) indicates that it is the convenient category for topological studies; Dubuc and Porta [1971] show that it is appropriate for topological algebra (extensions of the Gelfand duality). All told, this suggests that in \(\mathbf{Top}\) we have been studying the wrong mathematical objects. The right ones are the spaces in \(\mathbf{CGHaus}\).

title: METRIC SPACES
text:
15.1.1.1 Definition: Let \(X\) be a set. A metric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying

\(\mathbf{M}_1\): Reflexity. \((\forall p \in X)(d(p, p) = 0)\);
\(\mathbf{M}_2\): Triangle inequality. \((\forall p \in X)(\forall q \in X)(\forall x \in X)(d(p, x) \le d(p, q) + d(q, x))\);
\(\mathbf{M}_3\): Symmetry. \((\forall p \in X)(\forall q \in X)(d(p, q) = d(q, p))\);
\(\mathbf{M}_4\): Non-degeneracy. \((\forall p \in X)(\forall q \in X)(d(p, q) = 0 \implies p = q)\).

A quasimetric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying \(\mathbf{M}_1\), \(\mathbf{M}_2\), and \(\mathbf{M}_4\). A pseudometric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying \(\mathbf{M}_1\), \(\mathbf{M}_2\), and \(\mathbf{M}_3\). A metametric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying \(\mathbf{M}_2\), \(\mathbf{M}_3\), and \(\mathbf{M}_4\). A semimetric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying \(\mathbf{M}_1\), \(\mathbf{M}_3\), and \(\mathbf{M}_4\). A pseudoquasimetric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying \(\mathbf{M}_1\) and \(\mathbf{M}_2\). A premetric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying \(\mathbf{M}_1\). For any \(p, q \in X\), the number \(d(p, q)\) is the distance between \(p\) and \(q\).
A metric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a metric for \(X\). A quasimetric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a quasimetric for \(X\). A pseudometric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a pseudometric for \(X\). A metametric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a metametric for \(X\). A semimetric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a semimetric for \(X\). A pseudoquasimetric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a pseudoquasimetric for \(X\). A premetric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a quasimetric for \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.1.1.1 定义： 设 \(X\) 是一个集合。\(X\) 上的度量 (metric) 是一个函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)，满足：

\(\mathbf{M}_1\): 自反性。\((\forall p \in X)(d(p, p) = 0)\)；
\(\mathbf{M}_2\): 三角不等式。\((\forall p \in X)(\forall q \in X)(\forall x \in X)(d(p, x) \le d(p, q) + d(q, x))\)；
\(\mathbf{M}_3\): 对称性。\((\forall p \in X)(\forall q \in X)(d(p, q) = d(q, p))\)；
\(\mathbf{M}_4\): 非退化性。\((\forall p \in X)(\forall q \in X)(d(p, q) = 0 \implies p = q)\)。

\(X\) 上的准度量 (quasimetric) 是一个满足 \(\mathbf{M}_1\), \(\mathbf{M}_2\) 和 \(\mathbf{M}_4\) 的函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)。\(X\) 上的伪度量 (pseudometric) 是一个满足 \(\mathbf{M}_1\), \(\mathbf{M}_2\) 和 \(\mathbf{M}_3\) 的函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)。\(X\) 上的元度量 (metametric) 是一个满足 \(\mathbf{M}_2\), \(\mathbf{M}_3\) 和 \(\mathbf{M}_4\) 的函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)。\(X\) 上的半度量 (semimetric) 是一个满足 \(\mathbf{M}_1\), \(\mathbf{M}_3\) 和 \(\mathbf{M}_4\) 的函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)。\(X\) 上的伪拟度量 (pseudoquasimetric) 是一个满足 \(\mathbf{M}_1\) 和 \(\mathbf{M}_2\) 的函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)。\(X\) 上的前度量 (premetric) 是一个满足 \(\mathbf{M}_1\) 的函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)。对于任意 \(p, q \in X\)，数值 \(d(p, q)\) 即为 \(p\) 和 \(q\) 之间的距离。
度量空间 (metric space) 是由集合 \(X\) 和其上的度量 \(d\) 组成的二元组 \((X, d)\)。拟度量空间 (quasimetric space) 是配备拟度量 \(d\) 的 \((X, d)\)。伪度量空间 (pseudometric space) 是配备伪度量 \(d\) 的 \((X, d)\)。元度量空间 (metametric space) 是配备元度量 \(d\) 的 \((X, d)\)。半度量空间 (semimetric space) 是配备半度量 \(d\) 的 \((X, d)\)。伪拟度量空间 (pseudoquasimetric space) 是配备伪拟度量 \(d\) 的 \((X, d)\)。前度量空间 (premetric space) 是一对 \((X, d)\)，其中 \(d\) 是 \(X\) 的准度量（注：遵循原文拼写 quasimetric）。










15.1.1.2 Definition: Let \((X, d)\) be a premetric space. For any \(p \in X\) and \(r \in [0, \infty[\), the ball of radius \(r\) around \(p\) is the set \[B_d(p, r) = \{q \in X : d(p, q) < r\}, \qquad (226)\] the disk of radius \(r\) around \(p\) is the set \[D_d(p, r) = \{q \in X : d(p, q) \le r\}, \qquad (227)\] and the sphere of radius \(r\) around \(p\) is the set \[S_d(p, r) = \{q \in X : d(p, q) = r\}. \qquad (228)\] For \(r = 1\) we also speak of the unit ball, unit disk and the unit sphere.


[点击展开翻译]

15.1.1.2 定义： 设 \((X,d)\) 是一个前度量空间。对于任意 \(p \in X\) 和 \(r \in [0, \infty[\)，以 \(p\) 为中心、\(r\) 为半径的球 (ball) 是集合 \[B_d(p, r) = \{q \in X : d(p, q) < r\}, \qquad (226)\] 以 \(p\) 为中心、\(r\) 为半径的圆盘 (disk) 是集合 \[D_d(p, r) = \{q \in X : d(p, q) \le r\}, \qquad (227)\] 以 \(p\) 为中心、\(r\) 为半径的球面 (sphere) 是集合 \[S_d(p, r) = \{q \in X : d(p, q) = r\}. \qquad (228)\] 当 \(r = 1\) 时，我们也称其为单位球 (unit ball)、单位圆盘 (unit disk) 和单位球面 (unit sphere)。

title: METRIC SPACES
text:
15.1.1.1 Definition: Let \(X\) be a set. A metric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying

\(\mathbf{M}_1\): Reflexity. \((\forall p \in X)(d(p, p) = 0)\);
\(\mathbf{M}_2\): Triangle inequality. \((\forall p \in X)(\forall q \in X)(\forall x \in X)(d(p, x) \le d(p, q) + d(q, x))\);
\(\mathbf{M}_3\): Symmetry. \((\forall p \in X)(\forall q \in X)(d(p, q) = d(q, p))\);
\(\mathbf{M}_4\): Non-degeneracy. \((\forall p \in X)(\forall q \in X)(d(p, q) = 0 \implies p = q)\).

A quasimetric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying \(\mathbf{M}_1\), \(\mathbf{M}_2\), and \(\mathbf{M}_4\). A pseudometric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying \(\mathbf{M}_1\), \(\mathbf{M}_2\), and \(\mathbf{M}_3\). A metametric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying \(\mathbf{M}_2\), \(\mathbf{M}_3\), and \(\mathbf{M}_4\). A semimetric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying \(\mathbf{M}_1\), \(\mathbf{M}_3\), and \(\mathbf{M}_4\). A pseudoquasimetric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying \(\mathbf{M}_1\) and \(\mathbf{M}_2\). A premetric for \(X\) is a function \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) satisfying \(\mathbf{M}_1\). For any \(p, q \in X\), the number \(d(p, q)\) is the distance between \(p\) and \(q\).
A metric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a metric for \(X\). A quasimetric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a quasimetric for \(X\). A pseudometric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a pseudometric for \(X\). A metametric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a metametric for \(X\). A semimetric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a semimetric for \(X\). A pseudoquasimetric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a pseudoquasimetric for \(X\). A premetric space is a pair \((X, d)\) with \(d\) a quasimetric for \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.1.1.1 定义： 设 \(X\) 是一个集合。\(X\) 上的度量 (metric) 是一个函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)，满足：

\(\mathbf{M}_1\): 自反性。\((\forall p \in X)(d(p, p) = 0)\)；
\(\mathbf{M}_2\): 三角不等式。\((\forall p \in X)(\forall q \in X)(\forall x \in X)(d(p, x) \le d(p, q) + d(q, x))\)；
\(\mathbf{M}_3\): 对称性。\((\forall p \in X)(\forall q \in X)(d(p, q) = d(q, p))\)；
\(\mathbf{M}_4\): 非退化性。\((\forall p \in X)(\forall q \in X)(d(p, q) = 0 \implies p = q)\)。

\(X\) 上的准度量 (quasimetric) 是一个满足 \(\mathbf{M}_1\), \(\mathbf{M}_2\) 和 \(\mathbf{M}_4\) 的函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)。\(X\) 上的伪度量 (pseudometric) 是一个满足 \(\mathbf{M}_1\), \(\mathbf{M}_2\) 和 \(\mathbf{M}_3\) 的函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)。\(X\) 上的元度量 (metametric) 是一个满足 \(\mathbf{M}_2\), \(\mathbf{M}_3\) 和 \(\mathbf{M}_4\) 的函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)。\(X\) 上的半度量 (semimetric) 是一个满足 \(\mathbf{M}_1\), \(\mathbf{M}_3\) 和 \(\mathbf{M}_4\) 的函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)。\(X\) 上的伪拟度量 (pseudoquasimetric) 是一个满足 \(\mathbf{M}_1\) 和 \(\mathbf{M}_2\) 的函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)。\(X\) 上的前度量 (premetric) 是一个满足 \(\mathbf{M}_1\) 的函数 \(d: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)。对于任意 \(p, q \in X\)，数值 \(d(p, q)\) 即为 \(p\) 和 \(q\) 之间的距离。
度量空间 (metric space) 是由集合 \(X\) 和其上的度量 \(d\) 组成的二元组 \((X, d)\)。拟度量空间 (quasimetric space) 是配备拟度量 \(d\) 的 \((X, d)\)。伪度量空间 (pseudometric space) 是配备伪度量 \(d\) 的 \((X, d)\)。元度量空间 (metametric space) 是配备元度量 \(d\) 的 \((X, d)\)。半度量空间 (semimetric space) 是配备半度量 \(d\) 的 \((X, d)\)。伪拟度量空间 (pseudoquasimetric space) 是配备伪拟度量 \(d\) 的 \((X, d)\)。前度量空间 (premetric space) 是一对 \((X, d)\)，其中 \(d\) 是 \(X\) 的准度量（注：遵循原文拼写 quasimetric）。










15.1.1.2 Definition: Let \((X, d)\) be a premetric space. For any \(p \in X\) and \(r \in [0, \infty[\), the ball of radius \(r\) around \(p\) is the set \[B_d(p, r) = \{q \in X : d(p, q) < r\}, \qquad (226)\] the disk of radius \(r\) around \(p\) is the set \[D_d(p, r) = \{q \in X : d(p, q) \le r\}, \qquad (227)\] and the sphere of radius \(r\) around \(p\) is the set \[S_d(p, r) = \{q \in X : d(p, q) = r\}. \qquad (228)\] For \(r = 1\) we also speak of the unit ball, unit disk and the unit sphere.


[点击展开翻译]

15.1.1.2 定义： 设 \((X,d)\) 是一个前度量空间。对于任意 \(p \in X\) 和 \(r \in [0, \infty[\)，以 \(p\) 为中心、\(r\) 为半径的球 (ball) 是集合 \[B_d(p, r) = \{q \in X : d(p, q) < r\}, \qquad (226)\] 以 \(p\) 为中心、\(r\) 为半径的圆盘 (disk) 是集合 \[D_d(p, r) = \{q \in X : d(p, q) \le r\}, \qquad (227)\] 以 \(p\) 为中心、\(r\) 为半径的球面 (sphere) 是集合 \[S_d(p, r) = \{q \in X : d(p, q) = r\}. \qquad (228)\] 当 \(r = 1\) 时，我们也称其为单位球 (unit ball)、单位圆盘 (unit disk) 和单位球面 (unit sphere)。

title: METRIC SPACES
text:
15.2 Metric topology. | 度量拓扑






15.2.0.1 Lemma: Let \((X, d)\) be a pseudoquasimetric space. For any \(q \in B_d(p, r)\) we have \(B_d(q, r - d(p, q)) \subseteq B_d(p, r)\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.2.0.1 引理： 设 \((X, d)\) 是一个伪拟度量空间。对于任意 \(q \in B_d(p, r)\)，我们有 \(B_d(q, r - d(p, q)) \subseteq B_d(p, r)\)。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: The \(\mathbf{M}_2\)-axiom implies that for any \(q \in B_d(p, r)\) and any \(x \in B_d(q, r_1)\), \(d(p, x) \le d(p, q) + d(q, x) < r\). \(\blacksquare\)







15.2.0.2 Lemma: Let \((X, d)\) be a pseudoquasimetric space. Then the collection \(\mathcal{B}_d = \{B_d(p, r) : p \in X, r > 0\}\) is a topological base on \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.2.0.2 引理： 设 \((X, d)\) 是一个伪拟度量空间。那么集合族 \(\mathcal{B}_d = \{B_d(p, r) : p \in X, r > 0\}\) 是 \(X\) 上的一个拓扑基。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: The \(\mathbf{M}_1\)-axiom implies that \(B_d(p, r) \ni p\) for any \(p \in X\), as a result of which \(\mathcal{B}_d\) satisfies \(\mathbf{B}_1\). The \(\mathbf{M}_2\)-axiom implies that for any \(q \in B_d(p_1, r_1) \cap B_d(p_2, r_2)\), we have \[B_d(q, \min\{r_1 - d(p_1, q), r_2 - d(p_2, q)\}) \subseteq B_d(p_1, r_1) \cap B_d(p_2, r_2), \qquad (230)\] which implies the \(\mathbf{B}_2'\)-axiom. \(\blacksquare\)







15.2.0.3 Definition: The metric topology \(\mathcal{T}\) on \(X\) induced by a metric \(d\) is the topology generated by the base \(\mathcal{B}_d\). The quasimetric topology \(\mathcal{T}\) on \(X\) induced by a quasimetric \(d\) is the topology generated by the base \(\mathcal{B}_d\). The pseudometric topology \(\mathcal{T}\) on \(X\) induced by a pseudometric \(d\) is the topology generated by the base \(\mathcal{B}_d\). A topological space is metrizable iff its topology is induced by a metric.


[点击展开翻译]

15.2.0.3 定义： 由度量 \(d\) 诱导的 \(X\) 上的度量拓扑 (metric topology) \(\mathcal{T}\) 是由基 \(\mathcal{B}_d\) 生成的拓扑。由拟度量 \(d\) 诱导的 \(X\) 上的拟度量拓扑 (quasimetric topology) \(\mathcal{T}\) 是由基 \(\mathcal{B}_d\) 生成的拓扑。由伪度量 \(d\) 诱导的 \(X\) 上的伪度量拓扑 (pseudometric topology) \(\mathcal{T}\) 是由基 \(\mathcal{B}_d\) 生成的拓扑。一个拓扑空间是可度量化的 (metrizable) 当且仅当它的拓扑是由一个度量诱导的。










15.2.0.4 Proposition: A pseudometric space \((X, d)\) is a metric space iff the pseudometric topology \(\mathcal{T}_d\) is \(T_0\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.2.0.4 命题： 一个伪度量空间 \((X, d)\) 是度量空间，当且仅当该伪度量拓扑 \(\mathcal{T}_d\) 是 \(T_0\) 的。










15.2.0.5 Proposition: The standard topology \(\mathcal{T}_{\mathbb{R}}\) on \(\mathbb{R}\) is the metric topology induced by the standard metric \(d_{\mathbb{R}}\) given by \(d_{\mathbb{R}}(x, y) = |x - y|\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.2.0.5 命题： \(\mathbb{R}\) 上的标准拓扑 \(\mathcal{T}_{\mathbb{R}}\) 是由标准度量 (standard metric) \(d_{\mathbb{R}}\) 诱导的度量拓扑，其中 \(d_{\mathbb{R}}(x, y) = |x - y|\)。










15.2.0.6 Proposition: The discrete topology on \(X\) is the metric topology induced by the metric \(d(p, q) = 1\) if \(p \ne q\) and \(d(p, p) = 0\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.2.0.6 命题： \(X\) 上的离散拓扑是由以下度量诱导的度量拓扑：当 \(p \ne q\) 时 \(d(p, q) = 1\)，且 \(d(p, p) = 0\)。










15.2.0.7 Definition: Let \(d_1\) and \(d_2\) be two metric on \(X\). If there is a \(c \in ]0, \infty[\) such that \(d_1(p, q) \le c d_2(p, q)\) for any \(p, q \in X\), then \(d_1\) is coarser than \(d_2\) and \(d_2\) is finer than \(d_1\). If \(d_1\) is coarser and finer than \(d_2\), then \(d_1\) and \(d_2\) are equivalent.


[点击展开翻译]

15.2.0.7 定义： 设 \(d_1\) 和 \(d_2\) 是 \(X\) 上的两个度量。如果存在 \(c \in ]0, \infty[\) 使得对于任意 \(p, q \in X\) 都有 \(d_1(p, q) \le c d_2(p, q)\)，那么称 \(d_1\) 比 \(d_2\) 更粗 (coarser)，且 \(d_2\) 比 \(d_1\) 更细 (finer)。如果 \(d_1\) 既比 \(d_2\) 更粗又比 \(d_2\) 更细，那么 \(d_1\) 和 \(d_2\) 是等价的 (equivalent)。










15.2.0.8 Proposition: A coarser metric induce a coarser topology, and equivalent metrics induce the identical topology.


[点击展开翻译]

15.2.0.8 命题： 更粗的度量诱导更粗的拓扑，等价的度量诱导相同的拓扑。










15.2.0.9 Proposition: A neighborhood base of a metric topological space \((X, \mathcal{T}_d)\) at \(p \in X\) is \(\mathcal{B}_p = \{B_d(p, r) : r > 0\}\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.2.0.9 命题： 度量拓扑空间 \((X, \mathcal{T}_d)\) 在 \(p \in X\) 处的邻域基是 \(\mathcal{B}_p = \{B_d(p, r) : r > 0\}\)。





15.2.1 Points with respect to a set. | 关于集合的点






15.2.1.1 Definition: Let \((X, d)\) be a metric space with a subset \(A\). Let \(p \in X\) and of \(A\), \(p\) is

an adherent point iff \(A \cap B_d(p, r) \ne \emptyset\) for any \(r > 0\);
an accumulation point iff \(|A \cap B_d(p, r)| = \infty\) for any \(r > 0\);
an isolated point iff \(p \in A\) and \(|A \cap B_d(p, r)| < \infty\) for some \(r > 0\).



[点击展开翻译]

15.2.1.1 定义： 设 \((X, d)\) 是带有子集 \(A\) 的度量空间。设 \(p \in X\)，且关于 \(A\) 而言，\(p\) 是

一个附着点 (adherent point)，当且仅当对于任意 \(r > 0\) 都有 \(A \cap B_d(p, r) \ne \emptyset\)；
一个聚点 (accumulation point)，当且仅当对于任意 \(r > 0\) 都有 \(|A \cap B_d(p, r)| = \infty\)；
一个孤立点 (isolated point)，当且仅当 \(p \in A\) 且对于某些 \(r > 0\) 有 \(|A \cap B_d(p, r)| < \infty\)。











15.2.1.2 Proposition: Let \((X, d)\) be a metric space with a subset \(A\). Let \(p \in X\) and of \(A\), \(p\) is

an interior point iff there is an \(r > 0\) with \(B_d(p, r) \subseteq A\);
an exterior point iff there is an \(r > 0\) with \(B_d(p, r) \subseteq A^c\);
a boundary point iff \(A \cap B_d(p, r) \ne \emptyset\) and \(A^c \cap B_d(p, r) \ne \emptyset\) for any \(r > 0\).


[点击展开翻译]


15.2.1.2 命题： 设 \((X, d)\) 是带有子集 \(A\) 的度量空间。设 \(p \in X\)，且关于 \(A\) 而言，\(p\) 是

一个内点 (interior point)，当且仅当存在 \(r > 0\) 使得 \(B_d(p, r) \subseteq A\)；
一个外点 (exterior point)，当且仅当存在 \(r > 0\) 使得 \(B_d(p, r) \subseteq A^c\)；
一个边界点 (boundary point)，当且仅当对于任意 \(r > 0\) 都有 \(A \cap B_d(p, r) \ne \emptyset\) 且 \(A^c \cap B_d(p, r) \ne \emptyset\)。











15.2.1.3 Proposition: A sequence \(\{p_n\}_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) in a metric space \((X, d)\) converges to \(p \in X\) iff for any \(\varepsilon > 0\) there is \(N \in \mathbb{N}\) such that \(d(p_n, p) < \varepsilon\) for any \(n \ge N\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.2.1.3 命题： 度量空间 \((X, d)\) 中的序列 \(\{p_n\}_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) 收敛到 \(p \in X\)，当且仅当对于任意 \(\varepsilon > 0\)，存在 \(N \in \mathbb{N}\) 使得对于任意 \(n \ge N\) 都有 \(d(p_n, p) < \varepsilon\)。










15.2.1.4 Proposition: Let \((X, d)\) be a metric space with a subset \(A\). Let \(p \in X\) and of \(A\), \(p\) is

an adherent point iff there is a sequence \(\{p_n\}_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) in \(A\) convergent to \(p\);
an accumulation point iff there is a nonconstant sequence \(\{p_n\}_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) in \(A\) convergent to \(p\);
an isolated point iff the only sequence \(\{p_n\}_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) in \(A\) convergent to \(p\) is the constant sequence at \(p\).



[点击展开翻译]

15.2.1.4 命题： 设 \((X, d)\) 是带有子集 \(A\) 的度量空间。设 \(p \in X\)，且关于 \(A\) 而言，\(p\) 是

一个附着点，当且仅当存在 \(A\) 中的序列 \(\{p_n\}_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) 收敛于 \(p\)；
一个聚点，当且仅当存在 \(A\) 中的非常数序列 \(\{p_n\}_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) 收敛于 \(p\)；
一个孤立点，当且仅当 \(A\) 中收敛于 \(p\) 的唯一序列 \(\{p_n\}_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) 是在 \(p\) 处的常数序列。











15.2.1.5 Proposition: A subset \(A\) of a metric space \((X, d)\) is open iff for any \(p \in A\) there is \(r > 0\) with \(B_d(p, r) \subseteq A\); it is closed iff any convergent sequence in \(A\) has a limit in \(A\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.2.1.5 命题： 度量空间 \((X, d)\) 的子集 \(A\) 是开集，当且仅当对于任意 \(p \in A\)，存在 \(r > 0\) 使得 \(B_d(p, r) \subseteq A\)；它是闭集，当且仅当 \(A\) 中的任何收敛序列的极限都在 \(A\) 中。










15.2.1.6 Proposition: Let \((X, d)\) be a pseudoquasimetric space. For any \(p \in X\) and \(r \in [0, \infty[\), the ball \(B_d(p, r)\) is open, the disk \(D_d(p, r)\) and the sphere \(S_d(p, r)\) is closed.


[点击展开翻译]

15.2.1.6 命题： 设 \((X, d)\) 是一个伪拟度量空间。对于任意 \(p \in X\) 和 \(r \in [0, \infty[\)，球 \(B_d(p, r)\) 是开的，圆盘 \(D_d(p, r)\) 和球面 \(S_d(p, r)\) 是闭的。




The closed set \(D_d(p, r)\), in general, is merely a superset of \(\overline{B}_x(r)\). In fact, we have the lemma.






15.2.1.7 Lemma: For any metric space \((X, d)\), the following are equivalent:

for any \(p \in X\) and \(r > 0\), \(D_d(p, r) = \overline{B}(p, r)\);
for any \(p, q \in X\) and \(r > 0\), if \(p \ne q\) then there is a point \(x \in X\) such that \(d(x, q) < r\) and \(d(p, x) < d(p, q)\).



[点击展开翻译]

15.2.1.7 引理： 对于任何度量空间 \((X, d)\)，以下各项等价：

对于任意 \(p \in X\) 和 \(r > 0\)，\(D_d(p, r) = \overline{B}(p, r)\)；
对于任意 \(p, q \in X\) 和 \(r > 0\)，如果 \(p \ne q\)，则存在点 \(x \in X\) 使得 \(d(x, q) < r\) 且 \(d(p, x) < d(p, q)\)。

title: METRIC SPACES
section: 15.3 Maps between metric spaces. | 度量空间之间的映射
text:
15.3 Maps between metric spaces. | 度量空间之间的映射






15.3.0.1 Proposition: A map \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\)

is continuous at \(p \in X\) iff \((\forall \varepsilon > 0)(\exists \delta > 0)(\forall q \in X)(d_X(q,p) < \delta \implies d_Y(f(q),f(p)) < \varepsilon)\);
is continuous iff it is continuous at every point \(p \in X\).



[点击展开翻译]

15.3.0.1 命题： 映射 \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\)

在点 \(p \in X\) 处连续，当且仅当 \((\forall \varepsilon > 0)(\exists \delta > 0)(\forall q \in X)(d_X(q,p) < \delta \implies d_Y(f(q),f(p)) < \varepsilon)\)；
是连续的，当且仅当它在每个点 \(p \in X\) 处连续。











15.3.0.2 Proposition: A map \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\) is continuous at \(p \in X\) iff \(p_n \to p\) implies \(f(p_n) \to f(p)\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.3.0.2 命题： 映射 \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\) 在点 \(p \in X\) 处连续，当且仅当 \(p_n \to p\) 蕴含 \(f(p_n) \to f(p)\)。










15.3.0.3 Theorem: Let \(d_0\) and \(d_1\) be two metrics on \(X\). Then \(\text{id}_X: (X,d_0) \to (X,d_1)\) is continuous iff \((\forall p \in X)(\forall \varepsilon > 0)(\exists \delta > 0)(\forall q \in X)(d_0(q,p) < \delta \implies d_1(q,p) < \varepsilon)\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.3.0.3 定理： 设 \(d_0\) 和 \(d_1\) 是 \(X\) 上的两个度量。那么恒等映射 \(\text{id}_X: (X,d_0) \to (X,d_1)\) 是连续的，当且仅当 \((\forall p \in X)(\forall \varepsilon > 0)(\exists \delta > 0)(\forall q \in X)(d_0(q,p) < \delta \implies d_1(q,p) < \varepsilon)\)。










15.3.0.4 Definition: A map \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\)

is uniformly continuous iff \((\forall \varepsilon > 0)(\exists \delta > 0)(\forall p,q \in X)(d_X(q,p) < \delta \implies d_Y(f(q),f(p)) < \varepsilon)\);
is L-Lipschitz for some \(L \ge 0\) iff \((\forall p,q \in X)(d_Y(f(q),f(p)) \le L d_X(q,p))\);
is a contraction map iff is \(L\)-Lipschitz for some \(0 \le L < 1\).



[点击展开翻译]

15.3.0.4 定义： 映射 \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\)

是一致连续的 (uniformly continuous)，当且仅当 \((\forall \varepsilon > 0)(\exists \delta > 0)(\forall p,q \in X)(d_X(q,p) < \delta \implies d_Y(f(q),f(p)) < \varepsilon)\)；
对于某个 \(L \ge 0\) 是 \(L\)-李普希茨的 (\(L\)-Lipschitz)，当且仅当 \((\forall p,q \in X)(d_Y(f(q),f(p)) \le L d_X(q,p))\)；
是一个压缩映射 (contraction map)，当且仅当对于某个 \(0 \le L < 1\) 它是 \(L\)-李普希茨的。





15.3.0.5 Uniformly continuous: A continuous function \(f: I \to \mathbb{R}\) on a bounded closed interval \(I\) is uniformly continuous.






15.3.0.6 Definition: A map \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\)

is locally Lipschitz iff any \(p \in X\) has a neighborhood \(U\) such that \(f|_U\) is Lipschitz.



[点击展开翻译]

15.3.0.6 定义： 映射 \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\) * 是局部李普希茨的 (locally Lipschitz)，当且仅当任意 \(p \in X\) 都有一个邻域 \(U\) 使得 \(f|_U\) 是李普希茨的。




15.3.0.7 Example: Let \(U\) be a convex open subset of a Banach space \(E\). Then any \(f \in C^1(U; F)\) is locally Lipschitz.


[点击展开证明]

Proof: The subset \(U\) is locally convex and \(f'\), being continuous, is locally bounded. \(\blacksquare\)







15.3.0.8 Definition: The Lipschitz constant of a Lipschitz map \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\) is \[\inf\{L \ge 0 : (\forall p,q \in X)(d_Y(f(q),f(p)) \le L d_X(q,p))\}. \qquad (231)\]


[点击展开翻译]

15.3.0.8 定义： 李普希茨映射 \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\) 的李普希茨常数 (Lipschitz constant) 是 \[\inf\{L \ge 0 : (\forall p,q \in X)(d_Y(f(q),f(p)) \le L d_X(q,p))\}. \qquad (231)\]










15.3.0.9 Definition: A map \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\)

is bi-Lipschitz iff \((\exists L > 0)(\forall p,q \in X)(L^{-1} d_X(q,p) \le d_Y(f(q),f(p)) \le L d_X(q,p))\);
is an isometry iff \((\forall p,q \in X)(d_Y(f(q),f(p)) = d_X(q,p))\).



[点击展开翻译]

15.3.0.9 定义： 映射 \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\)

是双李普希茨的 (bi-Lipschitz)，当且仅当 \((\exists L > 0)(\forall p,q \in X)(L^{-1} d_X(q,p) \le d_Y(f(q),f(p)) \le L d_X(q,p))\)；
是一个等距映射 (isometry)，当且仅当 \((\forall p,q \in X)(d_Y(f(q),f(p)) = d_X(q,p))\)。











15.3.0.10 Definition: A map \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\)

is a uniform isomorphism iff \(f\) is a bijection and both \(f\) and \(f^{-1}\) are uniformly continuous;
is an isometric isomorphism iff \(f\) is a bijective isometry.



[点击展开翻译]

15.3.0.10 定义： 映射 \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\)

是一个一致同构 (uniform isomorphism)，当且仅当 \(f\) 是双射且 \(f\) 和 \(f^{-1}\) 都是一致连续的；
是一个等距同构 (isometric isomorphism)，当且仅当 \(f\) 是双射的等距映射。











15.3.0.11 Proposition: A map \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\) is a contraction map \(\implies\) Lipschitz \(\implies\) uniformly continuous \(\implies\) continuous, an isometry \(\implies\) bi-Lipschitz \(\implies\) continuous and open, and an isometric isomorphism \(\implies\) bijective and bi-Lipschitz \(\implies\) uniform isomorphism \(\implies\) a homeomorphism.


[点击展开翻译]

15.3.0.11 命题： 映射 \(f:(X,d_X) \to (Y,d_Y)\) 是压缩映射 \(\implies\) 李普希茨 \(\implies\) 一致连续 \(\implies\) 连续；是等距映射 \(\implies\) 双李普希茨 \(\implies\) 连续且开；是等距同构 \(\implies\) 双射且双李普希茨 \(\implies\) 一致同构 \(\implies\) 同胚。










15.3.0.12 Theorem: Let \(d_0\) and \(d_1\) be two metrics on \(X\). Then \(\text{id}_X: (X,d_0) \to (X,d_1)\) is Lipschitz iff \(d_0\) is coarser than \(d_1\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.3.0.12 定理： 设 \(d_0\) 和 \(d_1\) 是 \(X\) 上的两个度量。那么恒等映射 \(\text{id}_X: (X,d_0) \to (X,d_1)\) 是李普希茨的，当且仅当 \(d_0\) 比 \(d_1\) 更粗。

title: METRIC SPACES
text:
15.4 Induced metrics. | 诱导度量
Let \((X,d_X)\) and \((Y,d_Y)\) be metric spaces.

If \(A \subseteq X\), what is the most natural metric on \(A\)?
What is the most natural metric on the disjoint union \(X \sqcup Y\) of \(X\) and \(Y\)?
What is the most natural metric on the cartesian product \(X \times Y\) of \(X\) and \(Y\)?
What is the most natural metric on \(S^1\), given a map \(\pi: \mathbb{R} \to S^1\) with \(\pi(x) = e^{ix}\)?

Unlike topologies, the existance of induced metrics is quite restrictive, as a result that most induced topology of metric topologies does not remain metrizable.






15.4.0.1 Definition: Let \(X\) be a set, \((Y,d_Y)\) be a metric space, and \(f: X \to Y\) be an injection. The metric \(d\) on \(X\) given by \[d(p,q) = d_Y(f(p),f(q)) \qquad (232)\] for any \(p,q \in Y\), called the initial metric on \(X\) induced by \(f\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.4.0.1 定义： 设 \(X\) 是一个集合，\((Y,d_Y)\) 是一个度量空间，且 \(f: X \to Y\) 是一个单射。由下式给出的 \(X\) 上的度量 \(d\)： \[d(p,q) = d_Y(f(p),f(q)) \qquad (232)\] 对于任意 \(p,q \in Y\)（注：依上下文此处应为 \(p,q \in X\)），称为由 \(f\) 诱导的 \(X\) 上的初度量 (initial metric)。





15.4.1 Subspace metrics. | 子空间度量






15.4.1.1 Definition: Let \(A\) be a subset of a metric space \((X,d_X)\). Then the subspace metric \(d_A\) on \(A\) in \(X\) is the initial metric induced by \(\{\iota_{A,X}\}\), or equivalently the restriction of \(d_X\) in \(A \times A\), and then \((A,d_A)\) is a metric subspace of \((X,d_X)\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.4.1.1 定义： 设 \(A\) 是度量空间 \((X,d_X)\) 的一个子集。那么 \(X\) 中 \(A\) 上的子空间度量 (subspace metric) \(d_A\) 是由包含映射 \(\{\iota_{A,X}\}\) 诱导的初度量，或等价地，是 \(d_X\) 在 \(A \times A\) 上的限制，并且此时 \((A,d_A)\) 是 \((X,d_X)\) 的一个度量子空间 (metric subspace)。










15.4.1.2 Proposition: The subspace metric induces the subspace topology.


[点击展开翻译]

15.4.1.2 命题： 子空间度量诱导子空间拓扑。










15.4.1.3 Proposition: An injective map \(f: (A,d_A) \to (X,d_X)\) between metric spaces is an embedding if \(d_A\) is the initial metric induced by \(f\). The space \((A,d_A)\) is embeddable into \((X,d_X)\) if there is an embedding \(f: (A,d_A) \to (X,d_X)\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.4.1.3 命题： 度量空间之间的单射 \(f: (A,d_A) \to (X,d_X)\) 是一个嵌入 (embedding)，如果 \(d_A\) 是由 \(f\) 诱导的初度量。如果存在嵌入 \(f: (A,d_A) \to (X,d_X)\)，则称空间 \((A,d_A)\) 是可嵌入的 (embeddable) 到 \((X,d_X)\) 中。






15.4.2 Product metrics. | 积度量






15.4.2.1 Definition: Let \((X_0,d_0)\) and \((X_1,d_1)\) be metric spaces. The product metric on \(X_0 \times X_1\) is the metric \(d_{\text{prod}}\) defined by \[d_{\text{prod}}((p_0,p_1), (q_0,q_1)) = d_0(p_0,q_0) + d_1(p_1,q_1). \qquad (233)\]


[点击展开翻译]

15.4.2.1 定义： 设 \((X_0,d_0)\) 和 \((X_1,d_1)\) 是度量空间。\(X_0 \times X_1\) 上的积度量 (product metric) 是由下式定义的度量 \(d_{\text{prod}}\)： \[d_{\text{prod}}((p_0,p_1), (q_0,q_1)) = d_0(p_0,q_0) + d_1(p_1,q_1). \qquad (233)\]










15.4.2.2 Proposition: Let \((X_0,d_0)\) and \((X_1,d_1)\) be metric spaces. A function \(F: \mathbb{R}^2 \to \mathbb{R}\) such as add and max yields a metric \(d((p_0,p_1), (q_0,q_1)) = F(d_0(p_0,q_0), d_1(p_1,q_1))\) on \(X_0 \times X_1\) that induces the product topology.


[点击展开翻译]

15.4.2.2 命题： 设 \((X_0,d_0)\) 和 \((X_1,d_1)\) 是度量空间。形如加法和取最大值的函数 \(F: \mathbb{R}^2 \to \mathbb{R}\) 会在 \(X_0 \times X_1\) 上产生一个度量 \(d((p_0,p_1), (q_0,q_1)) = F(d_0(p_0,q_0), d_1(p_1,q_1))\)，该度量诱导乘积拓扑。




15.4.2.3 Example: The standard topology \(\mathcal{T}_{\mathbb{R}^2}\) on \(\mathbb{R}^2\) is induced by the product metric \(d_{\mathbb{R}^2}\) of two \(d_{\mathbb{R}}\).






15.4.2.4 Proposition: There is a metric on \([0,1]^{\mathbb{N}}\) which generates the product topology.


[点击展开翻译]

15.4.2.4 命题： 在 \([0,1]^{\mathbb{N}}\) 上存在一个度量，它生成乘积拓扑。






15.4.3 Quotient pseudometrics. | 商伪度量






15.4.3.1 Definition: Let \((X,d)\) be a (symmetric) premetric space. The (symmetric) premetric \(\mathcal{P}(d): \mathcal{P}(X) \times \mathcal{P}(X) \to [0,\infty[\) defined by for \(A,B \subseteq X\), \[\mathcal{P}(d)(A,B) = \inf_{p \in A, q \in B} d(p,q) \qquad (234)\] the distance function between subsets of \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.4.3.1 定义： 设 \((X,d)\) 是一个（对称）前度量空间。由下式定义的（对称）前度量 \(\mathcal{P}(d): \mathcal{P}(X) \times \mathcal{P}(X) \to [0,\infty[\)，对于 \(A,B \subseteq X\)， \[\mathcal{P}(d)(A,B) = \inf_{p \in A, q \in B} d(p,q) \qquad (234)\] 称为 \(X\) 的子集之间的距离函数 (distance function)。










15.4.3.2 Definition: Let \(b: X \times X \to [0,\infty[\) be a function, and denote by \(D_b(X)\) the set of all pseudometrics on \(X\) bounded above by \(b\). Then \(d_b(p,q) = \sup_{d \in D_b(X)} d(p,q)\) is the maximal pseudometric with respect to \(b\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.4.3.2 定义： 设 \(b: X \times X \to [0,\infty[\) 是一个函数，并用 \(D_b(X)\) 表示 \(X\) 上所有在上方被 \(b\) 有界的伪度量集合。那么 \(d_b(p,q) = \sup_{d \in D_b(X)} d(p,q)\) 是关于 \(b\) 的最大伪度量 (maximal pseudometric)。










15.4.3.3 Definition: Let \((X,d)\) be a pseudometric space with an equivalence relation \(\sim\). The quotient pseudometric on \(X/{\sim}\) is the pseudometric \(d_{\sim}\) defined by for \([p],[q] \in X/{\sim}\), \[d_{\sim}([p],[q]) = d_{\mathcal{P}(d)}([p],[q]), \qquad (235)\] where \(d_{\mathcal{P}(d)}\) is the maximal pseudometric with respect to \(\mathcal{P}(d)\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.4.3.3 定义： 设 \((X,d)\) 是带有等价关系 \(\sim\) 的伪度量空间。\(X/{\sim}\) 上的商伪度量 (quotient pseudometric) 是由下式定义的伪度量 \(d_{\sim}\)：对于 \([p],[q] \in X/{\sim}\)， \[d_{\sim}([p],[q]) = d_{\mathcal{P}(d)}([p],[q]), \qquad (235)\] 其中 \(d_{\mathcal{P}(d)}\) 是关于 \(\mathcal{P}(d)\) 的最大伪度量。










15.4.3.4 Proposition: Let \((X,d)\) be a pseudometric space with an equivalence relation \(\sim\). Then the quotient pseudometric is indeed a pseudometric equal to \[d_{\sim}([p],[q]) = \inf \sum_{n=0}^N d(p_n, q_n) \qquad (236)\] for \(N \in \mathbb{N}\), \((p_n)_{n=0}^N, (q_n)_{n=0}^N \subseteq X\) with \(p_0 = p\), \(q_N = q\) and \((\forall n \in \{1,...,N\})(p_n \sim q_{n-1})\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.4.3.4 命题： 设 \((X,d)\) 是带有等价关系 \(\sim\) 的伪度量空间。那么商伪度量确实是一个伪度量，等于 \[d_{\sim}([p],[q]) = \inf \sum_{n=0}^N d(p_n, q_n) \qquad (236)\] 其中 \(N \in \mathbb{N}\)，\((p_n)_{n=0}^N, (q_n)_{n=0}^N \subseteq X\)，满足 \(p_0 = p\)，\(q_N = q\)，且 \((\forall n \in \{1,...,N\})(p_n \sim q_{n-1})\)。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \(d_{\text{quot}}([p],[q]) = \inf \sum_{n=0}^N d(p_n, q_n)\). Since \[\inf_{p_1 \in [p], q_1 \in [q]} d(p_1, q_1) = \inf\{d(p,p) + d(p_1, q_1) + d(q,q) : p \sim p_1, q_1 \sim q\} \qquad (237)\] we obtain that \[d_{\mathcal{P}(d)}([p],[q]) \ge \mathcal{P}(d)([p],[q]) = \inf_{p_1 \in [p], q_1 \in [q]} d(p_1, q_1) \ge d_{\text{quot}}([p],[q]). \qquad (238)\] We show that \(d_{\text{quot}}\) is a pseudometric and prove the triangle inequality. Let \([p],[q],[r] \in X/{\sim}\). For any \(\varepsilon > 0\), there are \(N,M \in \mathbb{N}\), \((p_n)_{n=0}^N\), \((q_n)_{n=0}^{N+M}\), and \((r_n)_{n=N}^{N+M}\) in \(X\) with \(p_0 = p\), \(q_N = q\), and \(r_{N+M} = r\), and \(p_n \sim q_{n-1}\) for any \(n \in \{1,...,N\}\), \(q_n \sim r_{n-1}\) for any \(n \in \{N+1,...,N+M\}\), such that \[\sum_{n=0}^N d(p_n, q_n) \le d_{\text{quot}}([p],[q]) + \frac{\varepsilon}{2}, \quad \sum_{n=N}^{N+M} d(q_n, r_n) \le d_{\text{quot}}([q],[r]) + \frac{\varepsilon}{2}. \qquad (239)\] Then using \(q_N \sim q_N\) we have \[d_{\text{quot}}([p],[r]) \le \sum_{n=0}^N d(p_n, q_n) + \sum_{n=N}^{N+M} d(q_n, r_n) \le d_{\text{quot}}([p],[q]) + d_{\text{quot}}([q],[r]) + \varepsilon. \qquad (240)\] As \(\varepsilon \to 0\) we obtain the triangle inequality. If \(d \le \mathcal{P}(d)\) is a pseudometric on \(X/{\sim}\), then for any \([p],[q] \in X/{\sim}\) letting \(N \in \mathbb{N}\), \((p_n)_{n=0}^N, (q_n)_{n=0}^N\) in \(X\) with \(p_0 = p, q_N = q\) and \(p_n \sim q_{n-1}\) for any \(n \in \{1,...,N\}\) we have \[d([p],[q]) \le \sum_{n=0}^N d([p_n], [q_n]) \le \sum_{n=0}^N d(p_n, q_n). \qquad (241)\] Taking the infimum we obtain that \(d \le d_{\text{quot}}\). By the definition of the maximal pseudometric we obtain that \(d_{\text{quot}} = d_{\sim}\). \(\blacksquare\)

title: METRIC SPACES
text:
15.5 Complete metrics. | 完备度量

15.5.1 Complete metric spaces. | 完备度量空间






15.5.1.1 Definition: A sequence \(\{p_n\}_{n\in\mathbb{N}}\) in a metric space \((X,d)\) is a Cauchy sequence iff for any \(\varepsilon > 0\) there is \(N \in \mathbb{N}\) such that \(d(p_n, p_m) < \varepsilon\) for any \(n, m \ge N\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.1.1 定义： 序列 \(\{p_n\}_{n\in\mathbb{N}}\) 在度量空间 \((X,d)\) 中是一个柯西列 (Cauchy sequence)，当且仅当对于任意 \(\varepsilon > 0\)，存在 \(N \in \mathbb{N}\) 使得对于任意 \(n, m \ge N\) 都有 \(d(p_n, p_m) < \varepsilon\)。










15.5.1.2 Proposition: A convergent sequence in a metric space is a Cauchy sequence.


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.1.2 命题： 度量空间中的收敛序列是柯西列。










15.5.1.3 Definition: A metric space \((X,d)\) is complete iff every Cauchy sequence is convergent.


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.1.3 定义： 一个度量空间 \((X,d)\) 是完备的 (complete)，当且仅当每个柯西列都是收敛的。










15.5.1.4 Definition: Let \((X,d)\) be a metric space. A complete metric space \((\hat{X}, \hat{d})\) with an isometric embedding \(i: (X,d) \to (\hat{X}, \hat{d})\) is called a completion of \((X,d)\) iff \(i(X)\) is dense in \((\hat{X}, \mathcal{T}_{\hat{d}})\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.1.4 定义： 设 \((X,d)\) 是一个度量空间。带有一个等距嵌入 \(i: (X,d) \to (\hat{X}, \hat{d})\) 的完备度量空间 \((\hat{X}, \hat{d})\) 称为 \((X,d)\) 的完备化 (completion)，当且仅当 \(i(X)\) 在 \((\hat{X}, \mathcal{T}_{\hat{d}})\) 中稠密。










15.5.1.5 Proposition: Completions of a metric space are unique up to a canonical isometry. In other words, if \((Y_0, d_0)\) with \(i_0: (X,d) \to (Y_0, d_0)\) and \((Y_1, d_1)\) with \(i_1: (X,d) \to (Y_1, d_1)\) are completions of \((X,d)\), then there is an isometry \(f: (Y_0, d_0) \to (Y_1, d_1)\) with \(f \circ i_0 = i_1\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.1.5 命题： 度量空间的完备化在相差一个典范等距映射的意义下是唯一的。换言之，如果带有 \(i_0: (X,d) \to (Y_0, d_0)\) 的 \((Y_0, d_0)\) 和带有 \(i_1: (X,d) \to (Y_1, d_1)\) 的 \((Y_1, d_1)\) 都是 \((X,d)\) 的完备化，那么存在一个等距映射 \(f: (Y_0, d_0) \to (Y_1, d_1)\) 使得 \(f \circ i_0 = i_1\)。










15.5.1.6 Proposition: Let \((X,d)\) be a metric space. The metric space \((\hat{X}, \hat{d})\) where \(\hat{X}\) is the equivalence classes of Cauchy sequences in \((X,d)\) under the relation \[\{p_n\}_{n\in\mathbb{N}} \sim \{q_n\}_{n\in\mathbb{N}} \iff \lim_{n\to\infty} d(p_n, q_n) = 0, \qquad (243)\] and \[\hat{d}\left([p_n]_{\{n\in\mathbb{N}\}}, [q_n]_{\{n\in\mathbb{N}\}}\right) = \lim_{n\to\infty} d(p_n, q_n) \qquad (244)\] is a completion of \((X,d)\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.1.6 命题： 设 \((X,d)\) 是一个度量空间。度量空间 \((\hat{X}, \hat{d})\) 是 \((X,d)\) 的一个完备化，其中 \(\hat{X}\) 是 \((X,d)\) 中柯西列在以下等价关系下的等价类： \[\{p_n\}_{n\in\mathbb{N}} \sim \{q_n\}_{n\in\mathbb{N}} \iff \lim_{n\to\infty} d(p_n, q_n) = 0, \qquad (243)\] 并且 \[\hat{d}\left([p_n]_{\{n\in\mathbb{N}\}}, [q_n]_{\{n\in\mathbb{N}\}}\right) = \lim_{n\to\infty} d(p_n, q_n) \qquad (244)\]










15.5.1.7 Proposition: A metric space \((X,d)\) is complete iff every Cauchy sequence has a convergent subsequence.


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.1.7 命题： 一个度量空间 \((X,d)\) 是完备的，当且仅当每个柯西列都有一个收敛子列。










15.5.1.8 Proposition: Let \((X, d_X)\) and \((Y, d_Y)\) be metric spaces. Any uniformly continuous map \(f: (X, d_X) \to (Y, d_Y)\) has a unique extension \(\hat{f}: (\hat{X}, \hat{d}_X) \to (\hat{Y}, \hat{d}_Y)\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.1.8 命题： 设 \((X, d_X)\) 和 \((Y, d_Y)\) 是度量空间。任何一致连续映射 \(f: (X, d_X) \to (Y, d_Y)\) 都有一个唯一的扩张 \(\hat{f}: (\hat{X}, \hat{d}_X) \to (\hat{Y}, \hat{d}_Y)\)。






15.5.2 The contraction lemma. | 压缩引理.
A fixed point of a map \(f: X \to X\) is a point \(p \in X\) such that \(f(p) = p\).






15.5.2.1 Contraction lemma: Let \((X,d)\) be a nonempty complete metric space. Every contraction \(f: (X,d) \to (X,d)\) has a unique fixed point, which equals to \(\lim_{n \to \infty} f^{(n)}(p)\) for every \(p \in X\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.2.1 压缩引理： 设 \((X,d)\) 是一个非空的完备度量空间。每一个压缩映射 \(f: (X,d) \to (X,d)\) 都有唯一的固定点，该固定点对于每一个 \(p \in X\) 都等于 \(\lim_{n \to \infty} f^{(n)}(p)\)。






15.5.3 Bounded metric spaces. | 有界度量空间.






15.5.3.1 Definition: A metric space \((X,d)\) is bounded iff \(d\) is a bounded function. A metric space \((X,d)\) is totally bounded iff for any \(\varepsilon > 0\) there is a finite set \(A\) in \(X\) such that \(\{B_d(p, \varepsilon) : p \in A\}\) covers \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.3.1 定义： 一个度量空间 \((X,d)\) 是有界的 (bounded)，当且仅当 \(d\) 是一个有界函数。一个度量空间 \((X,d)\) 是完全有界的 (totally bounded)，当且仅当对于任意 \(\varepsilon > 0\)，存在 \(X\) 中的有限集 \(A\) 使得 \(\{B_d(p, \varepsilon) : p \in A\}\) 覆盖 \(X\)。










15.5.3.2 Proposition: A totally bounded metric space is bounded.


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.3.2 命题： 完全有界的度量空间是有界的。










15.5.3.3 Definition: Let \((X,d)\) be a metric space. Then the function \(\overline{d}: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\) given by \[\overline{d}(p,q) = \frac{d(p,q)}{1 + d(p,q)} \qquad (245)\] for any \(p,q \in X\) is a bounded metric on \(X\) equivalent to \(d\), called the standed bounded metric of \(d\) on \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.3.3 定义： 设 \((X,d)\) 是一个度量空间。那么由下式给出的函数 \(\overline{d}: X \times X \to [0, \infty[\)： \[\overline{d}(p,q) = \frac{d(p,q)}{1 + d(p,q)} \qquad (245)\] 对于任意 \(p,q \in X\)，它是 \(X\) 上一个与 \(d\) 等价的有界度量，称为 \(d\) 在 \(X\) 上的标准有界度量 (standed bounded metric)。










15.5.3.4 Proposition: A metric space is compact iff it is complete and totally bounded.


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.3.4 命题： 一个度量空间是紧的，当且仅当它是完备且完全有界的。










15.5.3.5 Banach fixed point theorem: A contraction map \(f: (X,d) \to (X,d)\) has at most one fixed point. If \((X,d)\) is nonempty and complete then the fixed point exists, which is equal to the limit of the iterations \(f^{(n)}(p)\) as \(n \to \infty\) for any \(p \in X\).


[点击展开翻译]

15.5.3.5 Banach 不动点定理： 一个压缩映射 \(f: (X,d) \to (X,d)\) 至多有一个不动点。如果 \((X,d)\) 是非空且完备的，那么该不动点存在，并且对于任意 \(p \in X\)，它等于迭代 \(f^{(n)}(p)\) 当 \(n \to \infty\) 时的极限。

title: SPACES OF METRICS
text:
17.1.0.1 Definition: Let \((X, d)\) be a premetric space. Let \(p \in X\), and \(A, B \subseteq X\). The distance \(d(p, A)\) between \(p\) and \(A\) and the distance \(d(A, B)\) between \(A\) and \(B\) are \[d(p, B) = \inf_{q \in B} d(p, q),\] \[d(A, q) = \inf_{p \in A} d(p, q), \qquad (249)\] \[d(A, B) = \inf_{p \in A} d(p, B) = \inf_{p \in A, q \in B} d(p, q).\]


[点击展开翻译]

17.1.0.1 定义： 设 \((X, d)\) 是一个前度量空间。设 \(p \in X\)，且 \(A, B \subseteq X\)。\(p\) 与 \(A\) 之间的距离 \(d(p, A)\) 以及 \(A\) 与 \(B\) 之间的距离 \(d(A, B)\) 为 \[d(p, B) = \inf_{q \in B} d(p, q),\] \[d(A, q) = \inf_{p \in A} d(p, q), \qquad (249)\] \[d(A, B) = \inf_{p \in A} d(p, B) = \inf_{p \in A, q \in B} d(p, q).\]










17.1.0.2 Proposition: The distance between a point and a set satisfies a version of the triangle inequality \[d(p, A) \le d(p, q) + d(q, A). \qquad (250)\] The distance between sets is a (symmetric) premetric on \(\mathcal{P}(X)\) when \(d\) is a (symmetric) premetric on \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

17.1.0.2 命题： 点与集合之间的距离满足一种形式的三角不等式 \[d(p, A) \le d(p, q) + d(q, A). \qquad (250)\] 当 \(d\) 是 \(X\) 上的（对称）前度量时，集合之间的距离是幂集 \(\mathcal{P}(X)\) 上的一个（对称）前度量。










17.1.0.3 Proposition: In a metric space \((X, d)\), for \(p \in X\) and \(A \subseteq X\), the distance \(d(p, A) = 0\) iff \(p \in \text{Cl}(A)\).


[点击展开翻译]

17.1.0.3 命题： 在度量空间 \((X, d)\) 中，对于 \(p \in X\) 和 \(A \subseteq X\)，距离 \(d(p, A) = 0\) 当且仅当 \(p \in \text{Cl}(A)\)。










17.1.0.4 Proposition: In a metric space \((X, d)\), if \((A, \mathcal{T}_A)\) is a compact subspace and \(B\) is a closed subset, then \(d(A, B) = 0\) iff \(A \cap B \ne \emptyset\).


[点击展开翻译]

17.1.0.4 命题： 在度量空间 \((X, d)\) 中，如果 \((A, \mathcal{T}_A)\) 是紧子空间且 \(B\) 是闭子集，那么 \(d(A, B) = 0\) 当且仅当 \(A \cap B \ne \emptyset\)。

title: SPACES OF METRICS
text:
17.1.0.1 Definition: Let \((X, d)\) be a premetric space. Let \(p \in X\), and \(A, B \subseteq X\). The distance \(d(p, A)\) between \(p\) and \(A\) and the distance \(d(A, B)\) between \(A\) and \(B\) are \[d(p, B) = \inf_{q \in B} d(p, q),\] \[d(A, q) = \inf_{p \in A} d(p, q), \qquad (249)\] \[d(A, B) = \inf_{p \in A} d(p, B) = \inf_{p \in A, q \in B} d(p, q).\]


[点击展开翻译]

17.1.0.1 定义： 设 \((X, d)\) 是一个前度量空间。设 \(p \in X\)，且 \(A, B \subseteq X\)。\(p\) 与 \(A\) 之间的距离 \(d(p, A)\) 以及 \(A\) 与 \(B\) 之间的距离 \(d(A, B)\) 为 \[d(p, B) = \inf_{q \in B} d(p, q),\] \[d(A, q) = \inf_{p \in A} d(p, q), \qquad (249)\] \[d(A, B) = \inf_{p \in A} d(p, B) = \inf_{p \in A, q \in B} d(p, q).\]










17.1.0.2 Proposition: The distance between a point and a set satisfies a version of the triangle inequality \[d(p, A) \le d(p, q) + d(q, A). \qquad (250)\] The distance between sets is a (symmetric) premetric on \(\mathcal{P}(X)\) when \(d\) is a (symmetric) premetric on \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

17.1.0.2 命题： 点与集合之间的距离满足一种形式的三角不等式 \[d(p, A) \le d(p, q) + d(q, A). \qquad (250)\] 当 \(d\) 是 \(X\) 上的（对称）前度量时，集合之间的距离是幂集 \(\mathcal{P}(X)\) 上的一个（对称）前度量。










17.1.0.3 Proposition: In a metric space \((X, d)\), for \(p \in X\) and \(A \subseteq X\), the distance \(d(p, A) = 0\) iff \(p \in \text{Cl}(A)\).


[点击展开翻译]

17.1.0.3 命题： 在度量空间 \((X, d)\) 中，对于 \(p \in X\) 和 \(A \subseteq X\)，距离 \(d(p, A) = 0\) 当且仅当 \(p \in \text{Cl}(A)\)。










17.1.0.4 Proposition: In a metric space \((X, d)\), if \((A, \mathcal{T}_A)\) is a compact subspace and \(B\) is a closed subset, then \(d(A, B) = 0\) iff \(A \cap B \ne \emptyset\).


[点击展开翻译]

17.1.0.4 命题： 在度量空间 \((X, d)\) 中，如果 \((A, \mathcal{T}_A)\) 是紧子空间且 \(B\) 是闭子集，那么 \(d(A, B) = 0\) 当且仅当 \(A \cap B \ne \emptyset\)。

title: SPACES OF METRICS
text:
17.2 Hausdorff distances. | Hausdorff 距离






17.2.0.1 Definition: Let \((X, d)\) be a premetric space with \(\mathcal{CB}\) be the collection of nonempty, closed, and bounded subsets. Let \(A, B \in \mathcal{CB}\). The Hausdorff distance \(d_{\text{H}}(A, B)\) between \(A\) and \(B\) is \[d_{\text{H}}(A, B) = \max \left( \sup_{p \in A} d(p, B), \sup_{q \in B} d(A, q) \right). \qquad (251)\]


[点击展开翻译]

17.2.0.1 定义： 设 \((X, d)\) 是一个前度量空间，\(\mathcal{CB}\) 为非空有界闭子集的收集。设 \(A, B \in \mathcal{CB}\)。\(A\) 与 \(B\) 之间的Hausdorff 距离 (Hausdorff distance) \(d_{\text{H}}(A, B)\) 为 \[d_{\text{H}}(A, B) = \max \left( \sup_{p \in A} d(p, B), \sup_{q \in B} d(A, q) \right). \qquad (251)\]










17.2.0.2 Theorem: In a metric space \((X, d)\), the Hausdorff distance \(d_{\text{H}}\) is a metric on \(\mathcal{CB}\).


[点击展开翻译]

17.2.0.2 定理： 在度量空间 \((X, d)\) 中，Hausdorff 距离 \(d_{\text{H}}\) 是 \(\mathcal{CB}\) 上的一个度量。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: The finiteness and other properties of \(d_{\text{H}}\) are left as exercises. For \(A, B \in \mathcal{CB}\) let \(r(A, B) = \sup_{p \in A} d(p, B)\). We deduce the triangle inequality. Let \(A, B, C \in \mathcal{CB}\). For any \(p \in A\), since \(d(p, C) \le d(p, q) + d(q, C) \le d(p, q) + r(B, C)\), by the arbitrarity of \(q \in B\), we obtain \(d(p, C) \le d(p, B) + r(B, C)\). Taking the supremum over \(p \in A\) we have \(r(A, C) \le r(A, B) + r(B, C)\), which is sufficient for the triangle inequality. \(\blacksquare\)

title: SPACES OF METRICS
section: 17.3 The Gromov–Hausdorff distance. | Gromov-Hausdorff 距离
text:
17.3 The Gromov–Hausdorff distance. | Gromov-Hausdorff 距离






17.3.0.1 Definition: Let \((X, d_X)\) and \((Y, d_Y)\) be metric spaces. The Gromov–Hausdorff distance between \((X, d_X)\) and \((Y, d_Y)\) is \[d_{\text{GH}}((X, d_X), (Y, d_Y)) = \inf_{i, j} d_{\text{H}}(i(X), j(Y)) \qquad (252)\] where the infimum is taken among all metric spaces \((Z, d_Z)\) and isometries \(i: (X, d_X) \to (Z, d_Z), j: (Y, d_Y) \to (Z, d_Z)\).


[点击展开翻译]

17.3.0.1 定义： 设 \((X, d_X)\) 和 \((Y, d_Y)\) 是度量空间。\((X, d_X)\) 与 \((Y, d_Y)\) 之间的Gromov-Hausdorff 距离 (Gromov-Hausdorff distance) 为 \[d_{\text{GH}}((X, d_X), (Y, d_Y)) = \inf_{i, j} d_{\text{H}}(i(X), j(Y)) \qquad (252)\] 其中下确界取遍所有度量空间 \((Z, d_Z)\) 以及等距映射 \(i: (X, d_X) \to (Z, d_Z), j: (Y, d_Y) \to (Z, d_Z)\)。




It turns out that, to define the Gromov–Hausdorff distance, it suffices to consider only metric spaces of the form \((X \sqcup Y, \rho)\), where \(\rho\) extends \(d_X\) and \(d_Y\), called an admissible metric, and the set of all admissible metrics is denoted by \(D(X, Y)\).






17.3.0.2 Lemma: Let \((X, d_X)\) and \((Y, d_Y)\) be metric spaces. Then \[d_{\text{GH}}((X, d_X), (Y, d_Y)) = \inf_{\rho} \rho_{\text{H}}(X, Y) \qquad (253)\] where \(\rho_{\text{H}}\) is the Hausdorff distance in \((X \sqcup Y, \rho)\).


[点击展开翻译]

17.3.0.2 引理： 设 \((X, d_X)\) 和 \((Y, d_Y)\) 是度量空间。那么 \[d_{\text{GH}}((X, d_X), (Y, d_Y)) = \inf_{\rho} \rho_{\text{H}}(X, Y) \qquad (253)\] 其中 \(\rho_{\text{H}}\) 是 \((X \sqcup Y, \rho)\) 中的 Hausdorff 距离。










17.3.0.3 Theorem: The Gromov–Hausdorff distance \(d_{\text{GH}}\) is a metric among the isometric isomorphism classes of compact metric spaces. Moreover, the metric is complete.


[点击展开翻译]

17.3.0.3 定理： Gromov-Hausdorff 距离 \(d_{\text{GH}}\) 是紧度量空间的等距同构类之间的一个度量。此外，该度量是完备的。






[点击展开证明]

Proof: Let \((X, d_X)\), \((Y, d_Y)\), and \((Z, d_Z)\) be compact metric spaces. We prove the triangle inequality \[d_{\text{GH}}((X, d_X), (Z, d_Z)) \le d_{\text{GH}}((X, d_X), (Y, d_Y)) + d_{\text{GH}}((Y, d_Y), (Z, d_Z)) \qquad (254)\] Let \(\mu \in D(X, Y)\) and \(\nu \in D(Y, Z)\) be admissible metrics. Consider the metric space \(A = X \sqcup Y \sqcup Z\) with metric \(\rho\) extending both \(\mu\) and \(\nu\), and therefore \[\rho(p, r) = \inf_{q \in Y} \{\mu(p, q) + \nu(q, r)\}, \quad \forall p \in X, r \in Z. \qquad (255)\] We leave to the reader that \(\rho\) is a metric. Then the inclusions \(i: (X \sqcup Y, \mu) \to (A, \rho)\) and \(j: (Y \sqcup Z, \nu) \to (A, \rho)\) are isometries. \[d_{\text{GH}}((X, d_X), (Z, d_Z)) \le \rho_{\text{H}}(X, Z) \le \mu_{\text{H}}(X, Y) + \nu_{\text{H}}(Y, Z). \qquad (256)\] Taking the infimums over all \(\mu \in D(X, Y)\) and \(\nu \in D(Y, Z)\) we obtain the triangle inequality. \(\blacksquare\)

title: TOPOLOGY OF FUNCTION SPACES
text:
19.1.0.1 Definition: For sets \(X\) and \(Y\), the power set denoted by \(Y^X\) is the set \(\text{Map}(X; Y)\) of maps \(f: X \to Y\). For any \(p \in X\), the evaluation map at \(p\) is \[\text{ev}_p: Y^X \to Y, \quad \text{ev}_p(f) = f(p), \qquad (258)\] which is nothing but \(\text{pr}_p\) written in a more comprehensible way.


[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.1 定义： 对于集合 \(X\) 和 \(Y\)，记为 \(Y^X\) 的幂集是映射 \(f: X \to Y\) 的集合 \(\text{Map}(X; Y)\)。对于任意 \(p \in X\)，在 \(p\) 处的赋值映射 (evaluation map) 是 \[\text{ev}_p: Y^X \to Y, \quad \text{ev}_p(f) = f(p), \qquad (258)\] 这只不过是 \(\text{pr}_p\) 用一种更容易理解的方式写出来而已。










19.1.0.2 Definition: The uniform topology \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{uni}}\) on \(\mathbb{R}^I\) is the topology generated by the base \[\mathcal{S}_{\text{uni}} = \left\{ \left\{ f \in \mathbb{R}^I : \sup_{i \in I}(f(i) - f_0(i)) < \varepsilon \right\} : f_0 \in \mathbb{R}^I, \varepsilon > 0 \right\}. \qquad (259)\]


[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.2 定义： \(\mathbb{R}^I\) 上的一致拓扑 (uniform topology) \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{uni}}\) 是由以下基生成的拓扑： \[\mathcal{S}_{\text{uni}} = \left\{ \left\{ f \in \mathbb{R}^I : \sup_{i \in I}(f(i) - f_0(i)) < \varepsilon \right\} : f_0 \in \mathbb{R}^I, \varepsilon > 0 \right\}. \qquad (259)\]










19.1.0.3 Theorem: Let \((f_n)_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) be a sequence in \(Y^X\), that is, a sequence of maps \(X \to Y\), and let \(f \in Y^X\). Then \(f_n \to f\) as \(n \to \infty\)

in the product topology \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{prod}}\) iff it converges pointwisely;
in the box topology \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{box}}\) when \(X\) is Hausdorff iff it has a subsequence eventually constant for all but finitely many points and in a uniform way; or
in the uniform topology \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{uni}}\) when \(Y = \mathbb{R}\) iff it converges uniformly.



[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.3 定理： 设 \((f_n)_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) 是 \(Y^X\) 中的一个序列，即一系列映射 \(X \to Y\)，且设 \(f \in Y^X\)。那么当 \(n \to \infty\) 时 \(f_n \to f\)：

在乘积拓扑 \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{prod}}\) 中，当且仅当它逐点收敛；
在盒子拓扑 \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{box}}\) 中（当 \(X\) 是 Hausdorff 空间时），当且仅当它有一个子序列除了有限多个点外最终是常数，并且是以一致的方式；或者
在一致拓扑 \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{uni}}\) 中（当 \(Y = \mathbb{R}\) 时），当且仅当它一致收敛。











19.1.0.4 Remark: Recall in linear algebra, for a family \(\{X_i\}_{i \in I}\) of linear spaces, we define their direct sum as \[\bigoplus_{i \in I} X_i = \left\{ p \in \prod_{i \in I} X_i : (\exists J \subseteq I)(|J| < \infty) \wedge (\forall i \in I \setminus J)(p(i) = 0) \right\} \qquad (260)\] which is a proper subset of their direct product \(\prod_{i \in I} X_i\), which coincides with their cartesian product. We use \(\mathbb{R}^\infty\) to denote the direct sum of \(\mathbb{N}\)-copies of \(\mathbb{R}\) while \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\) for the direct product of \(\mathbb{N}\)-copies of \(\mathbb{R}\). Then \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\) coincides with the \(\mathbb{R}^{\mathbb{N}}\) notation.


[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.4 备注： 回顾线性代数中，对于线性空间族 \(\{X_i\}_{i \in I}\)，我们将它们的直和 (direct sum) 定义为 \[\bigoplus_{i \in I} X_i = \left\{ p \in \prod_{i \in I} X_i : (\exists J \subseteq I)(|J| < \infty) \wedge (\forall i \in I \setminus J)(p(i) = 0) \right\} \qquad (260)\] 它是它们的直积 (direct product) \(\prod_{i \in I} X_i\) 的真子集，其中直积与它们的笛卡尔积一致。 我们使用 \(\mathbb{R}^\infty\) 来表示 \(\mathbb{R}\) 的 \(\mathbb{N}\) 个副本的直和，而用 \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\) 表示 \(\mathbb{R}\) 的 \(\mathbb{N}\) 个副本的直积。那么 \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\) 与 \(\mathbb{R}^{\mathbb{N}}\) 记号一致。










19.1.0.5 Proposition: For a set \(X\), the power set \(X^{\mathbb{N}}\) is the set of sequences on \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.5 命题： 对于集合 \(X\)，幂集 \(X^{\mathbb{N}}\) 是 \(X\) 上序列的集合。










19.1.0.6 Remark: Recall in functional analysis we learnt on \(\mathbb{R}\) spaces of

sequences \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\),
eventually zero sequences \(c_c(\mathbb{R})\),
summable sequences \(l^1(\mathbb{R})\),
square summable sequences \(l^2(\mathbb{R})\),
sequences converge to zero \(c_0(\mathbb{R})\),
bounded sequences \(l^\infty(\mathbb{R})\). We have \[\mathbb{R}^\infty = c_c(\mathbb{R}) \subset l^1(\mathbb{R}) \subset l^2(\mathbb{R}) \subset c_0(\mathbb{R}) \subset l^\infty(\mathbb{R}) \subset \mathbb{R}^\omega. \qquad (261)\]



[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.6 备注： 回顾在泛函分析中，我们学习了关于 \(\mathbb{R}\) 的以下空间：

序列 \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\)，
最终为零的序列 \(c_c(\mathbb{R})\)，
可和序列 \(l^1(\mathbb{R})\)，
平方可和序列 \(l^2(\mathbb{R})\)，
收敛到零的序列 \(c_0(\mathbb{R})\)，
有界序列 \(l^\infty(\mathbb{R})\)。 我们有 \[\mathbb{R}^\infty = c_c(\mathbb{R}) \subset l^1(\mathbb{R}) \subset l^2(\mathbb{R}) \subset c_0(\mathbb{R}) \subset l^\infty(\mathbb{R}) \subset \mathbb{R}^\omega. \qquad (261)\]











19.1.0.7 Theorem: Let \(\left(x^{(i)}\right)_{i \in \mathbb{N}}\) be a sequence in \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\) and for every \(i \in \mathbb{N}\), write \(x^{(i)} = \left(x_n^{(i)}\right)_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\). Then \(\left(x^{(i)}\right)_{i \in \mathbb{N}}\) converges to \(0^\omega\) in the box topology iff it converges to \(0^\omega\) in the product topology and there are \(I, N \in \mathbb{N}\) such that if \(i > I\) and \(n > N\) then \(x_n^{(i)} = 0\).


[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.7 定理： 设 \(\left(x^{(i)}\right)_{i \in \mathbb{N}}\) 是 \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\) 中的一个序列，并且对于每个 \(i \in \mathbb{N}\)，记 \(x^{(i)} = \left(x_n^{(i)}\right)_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\)。那么 \(\left(x^{(i)}\right)_{i \in \mathbb{N}}\) 在盒子拓扑中收敛到 \(0^\omega\) 当且仅当它在乘积拓扑中收敛到 \(0^\omega\) 并且存在 \(I, N \in \mathbb{N}\) 使得如果 \(i > I\) 且 \(n > N\)，则有 \(x_n^{(i)} = 0\)。

title: TOPOLOGY OF FUNCTION SPACES
text:
19.1.0.1 Definition: For sets \(X\) and \(Y\), the power set denoted by \(Y^X\) is the set \(\text{Map}(X; Y)\) of maps \(f: X \to Y\). For any \(p \in X\), the evaluation map at \(p\) is \[\text{ev}_p: Y^X \to Y, \quad \text{ev}_p(f) = f(p), \qquad (258)\] which is nothing but \(\text{pr}_p\) written in a more comprehensible way.


[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.1 定义： 对于集合 \(X\) 和 \(Y\)，记为 \(Y^X\) 的幂集是映射 \(f: X \to Y\) 的集合 \(\text{Map}(X; Y)\)。对于任意 \(p \in X\)，在 \(p\) 处的赋值映射 (evaluation map) 是 \[\text{ev}_p: Y^X \to Y, \quad \text{ev}_p(f) = f(p), \qquad (258)\] 这只不过是 \(\text{pr}_p\) 用一种更容易理解的方式写出来而已。










19.1.0.2 Definition: The uniform topology \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{uni}}\) on \(\mathbb{R}^I\) is the topology generated by the base \[\mathcal{S}_{\text{uni}} = \left\{ \left\{ f \in \mathbb{R}^I : \sup_{i \in I}(f(i) - f_0(i)) < \varepsilon \right\} : f_0 \in \mathbb{R}^I, \varepsilon > 0 \right\}. \qquad (259)\]


[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.2 定义： \(\mathbb{R}^I\) 上的一致拓扑 (uniform topology) \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{uni}}\) 是由以下基生成的拓扑： \[\mathcal{S}_{\text{uni}} = \left\{ \left\{ f \in \mathbb{R}^I : \sup_{i \in I}(f(i) - f_0(i)) < \varepsilon \right\} : f_0 \in \mathbb{R}^I, \varepsilon > 0 \right\}. \qquad (259)\]










19.1.0.3 Theorem: Let \((f_n)_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) be a sequence in \(Y^X\), that is, a sequence of maps \(X \to Y\), and let \(f \in Y^X\). Then \(f_n \to f\) as \(n \to \infty\)

in the product topology \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{prod}}\) iff it converges pointwisely;
in the box topology \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{box}}\) when \(X\) is Hausdorff iff it has a subsequence eventually constant for all but finitely many points and in a uniform way; or
in the uniform topology \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{uni}}\) when \(Y = \mathbb{R}\) iff it converges uniformly.



[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.3 定理： 设 \((f_n)_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\) 是 \(Y^X\) 中的一个序列，即一系列映射 \(X \to Y\)，且设 \(f \in Y^X\)。那么当 \(n \to \infty\) 时 \(f_n \to f\)：

在乘积拓扑 \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{prod}}\) 中，当且仅当它逐点收敛；
在盒子拓扑 \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{box}}\) 中（当 \(X\) 是 Hausdorff 空间时），当且仅当它有一个子序列除了有限多个点外最终是常数，并且是以一致的方式；或者
在一致拓扑 \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{uni}}\) 中（当 \(Y = \mathbb{R}\) 时），当且仅当它一致收敛。











19.1.0.4 Remark: Recall in linear algebra, for a family \(\{X_i\}_{i \in I}\) of linear spaces, we define their direct sum as \[\bigoplus_{i \in I} X_i = \left\{ p \in \prod_{i \in I} X_i : (\exists J \subseteq I)(|J| < \infty) \wedge (\forall i \in I \setminus J)(p(i) = 0) \right\} \qquad (260)\] which is a proper subset of their direct product \(\prod_{i \in I} X_i\), which coincides with their cartesian product. We use \(\mathbb{R}^\infty\) to denote the direct sum of \(\mathbb{N}\)-copies of \(\mathbb{R}\) while \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\) for the direct product of \(\mathbb{N}\)-copies of \(\mathbb{R}\). Then \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\) coincides with the \(\mathbb{R}^{\mathbb{N}}\) notation.


[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.4 备注： 回顾线性代数中，对于线性空间族 \(\{X_i\}_{i \in I}\)，我们将它们的直和 (direct sum) 定义为 \[\bigoplus_{i \in I} X_i = \left\{ p \in \prod_{i \in I} X_i : (\exists J \subseteq I)(|J| < \infty) \wedge (\forall i \in I \setminus J)(p(i) = 0) \right\} \qquad (260)\] 它是它们的直积 (direct product) \(\prod_{i \in I} X_i\) 的真子集，其中直积与它们的笛卡尔积一致。 我们使用 \(\mathbb{R}^\infty\) 来表示 \(\mathbb{R}\) 的 \(\mathbb{N}\) 个副本的直和，而用 \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\) 表示 \(\mathbb{R}\) 的 \(\mathbb{N}\) 个副本的直积。那么 \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\) 与 \(\mathbb{R}^{\mathbb{N}}\) 记号一致。










19.1.0.5 Proposition: For a set \(X\), the power set \(X^{\mathbb{N}}\) is the set of sequences on \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.5 命题： 对于集合 \(X\)，幂集 \(X^{\mathbb{N}}\) 是 \(X\) 上序列的集合。










19.1.0.6 Remark: Recall in functional analysis we learnt on \(\mathbb{R}\) spaces of

sequences \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\),
eventually zero sequences \(c_c(\mathbb{R})\),
summable sequences \(l^1(\mathbb{R})\),
square summable sequences \(l^2(\mathbb{R})\),
sequences converge to zero \(c_0(\mathbb{R})\),
bounded sequences \(l^\infty(\mathbb{R})\). We have \[\mathbb{R}^\infty = c_c(\mathbb{R}) \subset l^1(\mathbb{R}) \subset l^2(\mathbb{R}) \subset c_0(\mathbb{R}) \subset l^\infty(\mathbb{R}) \subset \mathbb{R}^\omega. \qquad (261)\]



[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.6 备注： 回顾在泛函分析中，我们学习了关于 \(\mathbb{R}\) 的以下空间：

序列 \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\)，
最终为零的序列 \(c_c(\mathbb{R})\)，
可和序列 \(l^1(\mathbb{R})\)，
平方可和序列 \(l^2(\mathbb{R})\)，
收敛到零的序列 \(c_0(\mathbb{R})\)，
有界序列 \(l^\infty(\mathbb{R})\)。 我们有 \[\mathbb{R}^\infty = c_c(\mathbb{R}) \subset l^1(\mathbb{R}) \subset l^2(\mathbb{R}) \subset c_0(\mathbb{R}) \subset l^\infty(\mathbb{R}) \subset \mathbb{R}^\omega. \qquad (261)\]











19.1.0.7 Theorem: Let \(\left(x^{(i)}\right)_{i \in \mathbb{N}}\) be a sequence in \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\) and for every \(i \in \mathbb{N}\), write \(x^{(i)} = \left(x_n^{(i)}\right)_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\). Then \(\left(x^{(i)}\right)_{i \in \mathbb{N}}\) converges to \(0^\omega\) in the box topology iff it converges to \(0^\omega\) in the product topology and there are \(I, N \in \mathbb{N}\) such that if \(i > I\) and \(n > N\) then \(x_n^{(i)} = 0\).


[点击展开翻译]

19.1.0.7 定理： 设 \(\left(x^{(i)}\right)_{i \in \mathbb{N}}\) 是 \(\mathbb{R}^\omega\) 中的一个序列，并且对于每个 \(i \in \mathbb{N}\)，记 \(x^{(i)} = \left(x_n^{(i)}\right)_{n \in \mathbb{N}}\)。那么 \(\left(x^{(i)}\right)_{i \in \mathbb{N}}\) 在盒子拓扑中收敛到 \(0^\omega\) 当且仅当它在乘积拓扑中收敛到 \(0^\omega\) 并且存在 \(I, N \in \mathbb{N}\) 使得如果 \(i > I\) 且 \(n > N\)，则有 \(x_n^{(i)} = 0\)。

title: TOPOLOGY OF FUNCTION SPACES
text:
19.2 Compact-open topology | 紧开拓扑

19.2.1 Definition of the compact-open topology | 紧开拓扑的定义
The compact-open topology is one of the commonly used topologies on function spaces, and is applied in homotopy theory and functional analysis. It was introduced by Ralph Fox in 1945.


[点击展开翻译]

紧开拓扑是函数空间上最常用的拓扑之一，应用于同伦论和泛函分析。它由 Ralph Fox 于 1945 年引入。







19.2.1.1 Definition: Let \(X\) and \(Y\) be two topological spaces. The compact-open topology \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{co}}\) on \(\mathrm{C}(X;Y)\) is the topology generated by the subbase
\[\mathcal{S} = \{V(K;U) : \text{compact } K \subseteq X, \text{open } U \subseteq Y\} \tag{262}\]
where
\[V(K;U) = \{f \in \mathrm{C}(X;Y) : f(K) \subseteq U\}. \tag{263}\]


[点击展开翻译]

设 \(X\) 与 \(Y\) 是两个拓扑空间。\(\mathrm{C}(X;Y)\) 上的紧开拓扑 \(\mathcal{T}_{\text{co}}\) 是由以下子基生成的拓扑：
\[\mathcal{S} = \{V(K;U) : \text{紧集 } K \subseteq X,\, \text{开集 } U \subseteq Y\}\]
其中
\[V(K;U) = \{f \in \mathrm{C}(X;Y) : f(K) \subseteq U\}.\]




A subbase for the open sets consists of the sets \(N(C,U)\) where \(C\) is any compact subset of \(Y\), \(U\) any open subset of \(Z\), and \(N(C,U)\) consists of all those continuous \(h: Y \to Z\) for which \(hC \subseteq U\).


[点击展开翻译]

开集的一个子基由集合 \(N(C,U)\) 构成，其中 \(C\) 是 \(Y\) 的任意紧子集，\(U\) 是 \(Z\) 的任意开子集，\(N(C,U)\) 由所有满足 \(hC \subseteq U\) 的连续映射 \(h: Y \to Z\) 组成。







19.2.1.2 Remark: We can write \(V(K;U) = \mathrm{C}(K;U) \times_{\mathrm{C}(K;Y)} \mathrm{C}(X;Y)\).


[点击展开翻译]

我们可以将 \(V(K;U)\) 写作 \(\mathrm{C}(K;U) \times_{\mathrm{C}(K;Y)} \mathrm{C}(X;Y)\)。




If the codomain of the functions under consideration has a uniform structure or a metric structure then the compact-open topology is the “topology of uniform convergence on compact sets.” That is to say, a sequence of functions converges in the compact-open topology precisely when it converges uniformly on every compact subset of the domain.


[点击展开翻译]

若所考虑函数的值域具有一致结构或度量结构，则紧开拓扑即为”紧集上一致收敛的拓扑”。也就是说，一列函数在紧开拓扑下收敛，当且仅当它在定义域的每个紧子集上一致收敛。




19.2.2 Properties of the compact-open topology | 紧开拓扑的性质






19.2.2.1 Proposition: The compact-open topology on \(\mathrm{C}(*,Y)\) where \(*\) is the point space agrees with the topology on \(Y\).


[点击展开翻译]

\(\mathrm{C}(*,Y)\) 上的紧开拓扑（其中 \(*\) 为单点空间）与 \(Y\) 上的拓扑一致。










19.2.2.2 Proposition: If \(X\) is a discrete space, then \(\mathrm{C}(X;Y)\) is identified with the product space \(Y^X\).


[点击展开翻译]

若 \(X\) 是离散空间，则 \(\mathrm{C}(X;Y)\) 与乘积空间 \(Y^X\) 等同。










19.2.2.3 Proposition: If \(Y\) is \(\mathrm{T}_0\), \(\mathrm{T}_1\), Hausdorff, regular, or Tychonoff, then the compact-open topology satisfies the same separation axiom.


[点击展开翻译]

若 \(Y\) 满足 \(\mathrm{T}_0\)、\(\mathrm{T}_1\)、Hausdorff、正则或 Tychonoff 分离公理，则紧开拓扑也满足相同的分离公理。










19.2.2.4 Proposition: If \(X\) is Hausdorff and \(\mathcal{S}\) is a subbase for the topology on \(Y\), then
\[\mathcal{S} = \{V(K;U) : \text{compact } K \subseteq X,\, U \in \mathcal{S}\} \tag{264}\]
is a subbase for the compact-open topology on \(\mathrm{C}(X;Y)\).


[点击展开翻译]

若 \(X\) 是 Hausdorff 空间，且 \(\mathcal{S}\) 是 \(Y\) 上拓扑的一个子基，则
\[\mathcal{S} = \{V(K;U) : \text{紧集 } K \subseteq X,\, U \in \mathcal{S}\}\]
是 \(\mathrm{C}(X;Y)\) 上紧开拓扑的一个子基。










19.2.2.5 Proposition: If \((Y,d)\) is a metric space, then the compact-open topology is equal to the topology of compact convergence, in the sense that a sequence \(\{f_n\} \subseteq Y\) converges to \(f \in Y\) in the compact-open topology iff for every compact subset \(K\) of \(X\), \(\{f_n\}\) converges uniformly to \(f\) on \(K\).


[点击展开翻译]

若 \((Y,d)\) 是度量空间，则紧开拓扑等于紧收敛拓扑，即序列 \(\{f_n\} \subseteq Y\) 在紧开拓扑下收敛到 \(f \in Y\)，当且仅当对 \(X\) 的每个紧子集 \(K\)，\(\{f_n\}\) 在 \(K\) 上一致收敛到 \(f\)。










19.2.2.6 Proposition: If \(X\), \(Y\) and \(Z\) are topological spaces, with \(Y\) locally compact Hausdorff, then the composition map
\[\mathrm{C}(Y,Z) \times \mathrm{C}(X;Y) \to \mathrm{C}(X,Z), \quad (f,g) \mapsto f \circ g, \tag{265}\]
is continuous with the compact-open topology on all the function spaces and the product topology on the cartesian product.


[点击展开翻译]

若 \(X\)、\(Y\)、\(Z\) 是拓扑空间，且 \(Y\) 是局部紧 Hausdorff 空间，则复合映射
\[\mathrm{C}(Y,Z) \times \mathrm{C}(X;Y) \to \mathrm{C}(X,Z), \quad (f,g) \mapsto f \circ g\]
在所有函数空间上赋予紧开拓扑、笛卡尔积上赋予乘积拓扑时是连续的。










19.2.2.7 Proposition: If \(X\) is a locally compact Hausdorff space, then the evaluation map
\[\mathrm{ev}: \mathrm{C}(X;Y) \times X \to Y, \quad \mathrm{ev}(f,p) = f(p), \tag{266}\]
is continuous.


[点击展开翻译]

若 \(X\) 是局部紧 Hausdorff 空间，则赋值映射
\[\mathrm{ev}: \mathrm{C}(X;Y) \times X \to Y, \quad \mathrm{ev}(f,p) = f(p)\]
是连续的。










19.2.2.8 Proposition: If \(X\) is compact, and \((Y,d)\) is a metric space, then the compact-open topology on \(\mathrm{C}(X;Y)\) is induced by the metric \(e\) given by
\[e(f,g) = \sup\{d(f(p), g(p)) : p \in X\} \tag{267}\]
for \(f, g \in \mathrm{C}(X;Y)\).


[点击展开翻译]

若 \(X\) 是紧空间，\((Y,d)\) 是度量空间，则 \(\mathrm{C}(X;Y)\) 上的紧开拓扑由以下度量 \(e\) 诱导：
\[e(f,g) = \sup\{d(f(p), g(p)) : p \in X\}\]
其中 \(f, g \in \mathrm{C}(X;Y)\)。







19.2.3 Applications of the compact-open topology | 紧开拓扑的应用
The compact open topology can be used to topologize the following sets:

the loop space of \(X\) at \(p\) is \(\Omega_p(X) = \{f{:}[0,1] \to X : f(0) = f(1) = p\}\) (Definition 21.5.1.1),
the path space of \(X\) from \(p\) to \(q\) is \(\Omega_{p,q}(X) = \{f{:}[0,1] \to X : f(0) = p, f(1) = q\}\) (Definition 21.5.1.1), and
the path space of \(X\) from \(p\) is \(E_p(X) = \{f{:}[0,1] \to X : f(0) = p\}\).

In addition, there is a homotopy equivalence between the spaces \(\mathrm{C}(\Sigma X; Y) \simeq \mathrm{C}(X; \Omega Y)\). The topological spaces \(\mathrm{C}(X;Y)\) are useful in homotopy theory because they can be used to form a topological space and a model for the homotopy type of the set of homotopy classes of maps
\[\pi(X;Y) = \{[f]: X \to Y : f \text{ is a homotopy class}\}. \tag{268}\]
This is because \(\pi(X;Y)\) is the set of path components in \(\mathrm{C}(X;Y)\); that is, there is an isomorphism of sets \(\pi(X;Y) \to \mathrm{C}([0,1]; \mathrm{C}(X;Y))/{\sim}\), where \(\sim\) is the homotopy equivalence.


[点击展开翻译]

紧开拓扑可用于对以下集合赋予拓扑结构：

\(X\) 在 \(p\) 处的环路空间：\(\Omega_p(X) = \{f{:}[0,1] \to X : f(0) = f(1) = p\}\)（定义 21.5.1.1），
\(X\) 从 \(p\) 到 \(q\) 的路径空间：\(\Omega_{p,q}(X) = \{f{:}[0,1] \to X : f(0) = p,\, f(1) = q\}\)（定义 21.5.1.1），以及
\(X\) 从 \(p\) 出发的路径空间：\(E_p(X) = \{f{:}[0,1] \to X : f(0) = p\}\)。

此外，空间 \(\mathrm{C}(\Sigma X; Y) \simeq \mathrm{C}(X; \Omega Y)\) 之间存在同伦等价。拓扑空间 \(\mathrm{C}(X;Y)\) 在同伦论中十分有用，因为它们可以用来构成一个拓扑空间，并作为映射同伦类集合的同伦型模型：
\[\pi(X;Y) = \{[f]: X \to Y : f \text{ 是一个同伦类}\}.\]
这是因为 \(\pi(X;Y)\) 是 \(\mathrm{C}(X;Y)\) 中路径连通分支的集合；即存在集合同构 \(\pi(X;Y) \to \mathrm{C}([0,1]; \mathrm{C}(X;Y))/{\sim}\)，其中 \(\sim\) 为同伦等价关系。

title: CATEGORY THEORY
text:
pixiv@TOMB@AI




Category theory is an appropriate setting where to discuss an age-old question.
4.1.0.1 Question: When are two objects really the same?


[点击展开翻译]

问题： 两个对象何时才是真正的“相同”？

The concept of “sameness” being a special kind of relationship means that objects are the same if there is a particular morphism between them. How we talk about sameness is at the heart of category theory. We take Wittgenstein’s (1922) critique, roughly speaking, to say of two things that they are identical is nonsense, and to say of one thing that it is identical with itself is to say nothing at all as an invitation to ask for less, namely isomorphic (or uniquely isomorphic) objects, rather than identical objects. In this chapter, which is mostly adapted from [9, Chapter I], we will give the formal definition of a category along with several examples.


[点击展开翻译 - 正文部分]

“相同性”的概念作为一种特殊的关系，意味着如果对象之间存在某种特定的态射，那么它们就是相同的。我们如何讨论相同性是范畴论的核心。我们采纳维特根斯坦（1922）的批判，粗略地说，认为两个事物是恒等的是无意义的，而说一个事物与其自身恒等则什么也没表达；这启发我们去追求更弱的条件，即同构（或唯一同构）的对象，而非完全恒等的对象。在本章（主要改编自 [9, 第一章]）中，我们将给出范畴的正规定义以及若干示例。



First we describe categories directly by means of axioms, without using any set theory, and call them “metacategories”. Actually, we begin with a simpler notion, a metagraph.


[点击展开翻译]

首先，我们直接通过公理而不使用任何集合论来描述范畴，并称之为“元范畴”。实际上，我们从一个更简单的概念——元图（metagraph）开始。









Metagraphs: A metagraph consists of objects \(a, b, c, \dots\), morphisms (or arrows) \(f, g, h, \dots\), and two operations, as follows:

Domain, which assigns to each morphism \(f\) an object \(a = \text{dom } f\);
Codomain, which assigns to each morphism \(f\) an object \(b = \text{cod } f\).



[点击展开翻译 - 浅绿定义块]

元图： 一个元图由对象 \(a, b, c, \dots\)，态射（或称箭头） \(f, g, h, \dots\) 以及以下两种操作组成：

定义域（Domain）：为每个态射 \(f\) 指定一个对象 \(a = \text{dom } f\)；
陪域（Codomain）：为每个态射 \(f\) 指定一个对象 \(b = \text{cod } f\)。





These operations on \(f\) are indicated by displaying \(f\) as an actual morphism starting at its domain (or source) and ending at its codomain (or target) as \[f: a \to b \quad \text{or} \quad a \xrightarrow{f} b.\]


[点击展开翻译]

针对 \(f\) 的这些操作通过将 \(f\) 展示为一个从其定义域（或称源）开始并终止于其陪域（或称靶）的实际态射来表示： \[f: a \to b \quad \text{或} \quad a \xrightarrow{f} b。\]










4.1.1.2 Metacategories: A metacategory is a metagraph with two additional operations as:

Identity, which assigns to each object \(a\) a morphism \(\text{id}_a : a \to a\);
Composition, which assigns to each pair \((g, f)\) of morphisms with \(\text{dom } g = \text{cod } f\) a morphism \(g \circ f : \text{dom } f \to \text{cod } g\), called their composite.

These operations in a metacategory are subject to the two following axioms as:

Associativity. For given objects and morphisms in the configuration \[a \xrightarrow{f} b \xrightarrow{g} c \xrightarrow{h} d, \quad \] one always has the equality \(h \circ (g \circ f) = (h \circ g) \circ f\).
Unit law. For all morphisms \(f : a \to b\) and \(g : b \to c\) composition with the identity morphism \(\text{id}_b\) gives \(\text{id}_b \circ f = f\) and \(g \circ \text{id}_b = g\).



[点击展开翻译]

4.1.1.2 元范畴： 一个 元范畴 是一个带有如下两种额外运算的元图：

恒等运算：为每个对象 \(a\) 指定一个态射 \(\text{id}_a : a \to a\)；
复合运算：为每一对满足 \(\text{dom } g = \text{cod } f\) 的态射 \((g, f)\) 指定一个态射 \(g \circ f : \text{dom } f \to \text{cod } g\)，称为它们的复合态射。

元范畴中的这些运算须满足以下两条公理： * 结合律：对于给定配置中的对象与态射 \[a \xrightarrow{f} b \xrightarrow{g} c \xrightarrow{h} d, \quad \] 恒有等式 \(h \circ (g \circ f) = (h \circ g) \circ f\)。 * 单位律：对于所有态射 \(f : a \to b\) 与 \(g : b \to c\)，与恒等态射 \(\text{id}_b\) 的复合满足 \(\text{id}_b \circ f = f\) 以及 \(g \circ \text{id}_b = g\)。










4.1.1.3 Proposition: For any object \(a\), the identity morphism \(\text{id}_a\) is unique.
Proof: If \(\text{id}'_a : a \to a\) is another identity morphism, then \(\text{id}'_a = \text{id}_a \circ \text{id}'_a = \text{id}_a\). ■


[点击展开翻译]

4.1.1.3 命题： 对于任何对象 \(a\)，恒等态射 \(\text{id}_a\) 是唯一的。
证明： 若 \(\text{id}'_a : a \to a\) 是另一个恒等态射，则有 \(\text{id}'_a = \text{id}_a \circ \text{id}'_a = \text{id}_a\)。■










4.1.1.4 The metacategory of sets: The metacategory of sets has all sets as objects and all maps between sets as morphisms. The identity takes the identity map \(\text{id}_X : X \to X, p \mapsto p\) at each set \(X\), and the composition is the composition of maps.


[点击展开翻译]

4.1.1.4 集合元范畴： 集合元范畴以所有集合为对象，以集合之间的所有映射为态射。恒等运算在每个集合 \(X\) 上取 恒等映射 \(\text{id}_X : X \to X, p \mapsto p\)，而复合运算即映射的复合。




Note that, in any compatible set theory, such as Zermelo–Fraenkel set theory, there is no set of all sets, to avoid the Russell’s paradox. Russell found in Frege’s earlier axiomatic system of set theory a paradox that demonstrated an inconsistency in it. In Frege’s system there is an unrestricted comprehension principle that, given any condition expressible by a predicate \(P(X)\) on any set \(X\), there is a set of all sets meeting that condition, denoted by \(\{X : P(X)\}\). This principle is the cause of the inconsistency. Instead, we shall call the class of all sets instead. In general, a metacategory has a class of objects and a class of morphisms, not sets.


[点击展开翻译]

请注意，在任何相容的集合论（如 Zermelo–Fraenkel 集合论）中，为了避免罗素悖论，并不存在“所有集合的集合”。罗素在弗雷格早期的集合论公理体系中发现了一个悖论，证明了该体系的不自洽性。在弗雷格的体系中存在一个无限制概括原则，即给定任何可在集合 \(X\) 上由谓词 \(P(X)\) 表达的条件，都存在一个由满足该条件的所有集合组成的集合，记作 \(\{X : P(X)\}\)。这一原则是不自洽性的根源。相反，我们应将其称为所有集合的 类 (class)。通常情况下，一个元范畴拥有一类对象和一类态射，而非集合。







4.1.1.5 Russell’s paradox: There is no set of all non-self-membered sets.


[点击展开证明]

Proof: Suppose there is one, denoted by \(\mathcal{R} = \{X \text{ is a set} : X \notin X\}\). Then either \(\mathcal{R} \in \mathcal{R}\) or \(\mathcal{R} \notin \mathcal{R}\). If \(\mathcal{R} \in \mathcal{R}\), then by the construction of \(\mathcal{R}\) we have \(\mathcal{R} \notin \mathcal{R}\). If \(\mathcal{R} \notin \mathcal{R}\) , then by the construction of \(\mathcal{R}\) we have \(\mathcal{R} \in \mathcal{R}\). Either way leads to a contradiction. ■



[点击展开翻译]

4.1.1.5 罗素悖论： 不存在由所有不属于自身的集合构成的集合。
证明： 假设存在这样一个集合，记作 \(\mathcal{R} = \{X \text{ 是一个集合} : X \notin X\}\)。那么要么 \(\mathcal{R} \in \mathcal{R}\)，要么 \(\mathcal{R} \notin \mathcal{R}\)。若 \(\mathcal{R} \in \mathcal{R}\)，根据 \(\mathcal{R}\) 的构造可知 \(\mathcal{R} \notin \mathcal{R}\)。若 \(\mathcal{R} \notin \mathcal{R}\)，根据 \(\mathcal{R}\) 的构造可知 \(\mathcal{R} \in \mathcal{R}\)。无论哪种情况都会导致矛盾。■








A category is meant by any interpretation of the category axioms within set theory, as distinguished from a metacategory. To avoid the foundational problems in set theory, we shall assume that there is a big enough set \(\mathcal{U}\), called the universe satisfying certain closedness properties.


[点击展开翻译]

范畴是指在集合论框架内对范畴公理的任何解释，以此与元范畴相区分。为了避免集合论中的基础性问题，我们应当假设存在一个足够大的集合 \(\mathcal{U}\)，称为宇宙（universe），它满足特定的封闭性性质。







4.1.3.1 Universes: A universe is a set \(\mathcal{U}\) such that * \(x \in u \in \mathcal{U}\) implies \(x \in \mathcal{U}\); * \(u \in \mathcal{U}\) and \(v \in \mathcal{U}\) imply that \(\{u, v\}, (u, v), u \times v \in \mathcal{U}\); * \(x \in \mathcal{U}\) implies \(\mathcal{P}x \in \mathcal{U}\) and \(\bigcup x \in \mathcal{U}\); * \(\mathbb{N}_0 \in \mathcal{U}\); * if \(f : a \to b\) is a surjection with \(a \in \mathcal{U}\) and \(b \subseteq \mathcal{U}\), then \(b \in \mathcal{U}\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.1.3.1 宇宙： 宇宙是一个满足以下条件的集合 \(\mathcal{U}\)：

\(x \in u \in \mathcal{U}\) 蕴含 \(x \in \mathcal{U}\)；
\(u \in \mathcal{U}\) 且 \(v \in \mathcal{U}\) 蕴含 \(\{u, v\}, (u, v), u \times v \in \mathcal{U}\)；
\(x \in \mathcal{U}\) 蕴含 \(\mathcal{P}x \in \mathcal{U}\) 且 \(\bigcup x \in \mathcal{U}\)；
\(\mathbb{N}_0 \in \mathcal{U}\)；
若 \(f : a \to b\) 是满射，且 \(a \in \mathcal{U}, b \subseteq \mathcal{U}\)，则 \(b \in \mathcal{U}\)。





In particular, if \(X, Y \in \mathcal{U}\), then any relation from \(X\) to \(Y\), including any map \(f : X \to Y\), belongs to \(\mathcal{U}\).


[点击展开翻译]

特别地，若 \(X, Y \in \mathcal{U}\)，则从 \(X\) 到 \(Y\) 的任何关系（包括任何映射 \(f : X \to Y\)）都属于 \(\mathcal{U}\)。







4.1.3.2 Small sets: A set \(X\) is small if it is a member of the universe \(\mathcal{U}\); it is large if it is not a member of \(\mathcal{U}\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.1.3.2 小集合： 若集合 \(X\) 是宇宙 \(\mathcal{U}\) 的一个元素，则称其为 小集合；若它不是 \(\mathcal{U}\) 的元素，则称其为 大集合。




We use the word class instead of set for the collections of objects and morphisms in a category because in some categories they are “too large” to be considered sets.


[点击展开翻译]

我们对范畴中对象和态射的汇集使用“类（class）”而非“集合”一词，是因为在某些范畴中，它们的规模“太大”以至于不能被视为集合。







4.1.3.3 Directed graphs: A directed graph is a quadruple \(\mathsf{C} = (O, A, \text{dom}, \text{cod})\) where \(O\) is a set of objects, \(A\) is a set of morphisms, and two functions \(\text{dom}, \text{cod} : A \to O\). In this graph, the set of composable pairs of morphisms is the set \[A \times_O A = \{ (g, f) : g, f \in A \wedge \text{dom } g = \text{cod } f \}. \quad (24)\]


[点击展开翻译]

4.1.3.3 有向图： 有向图是一个四元组 \(\mathsf{C} = (O, A, \text{dom}, \text{cod})\)，其中 \(O\) 是对象的集合，\(A\) 是态射的集合，以及两个函数 \(\text{dom}, \text{cod} : A \to O\)。在此图中，可复合态射对的集合为 \[A \times_O A = \{ (g, f) : g, f \in A \wedge \text{dom } g = \text{cod } f \}。 \quad (24)\]










4.1.3.4 Categories: A category is a graph \(\mathsf{C} = (O, A, \text{dom}, \text{cod})\) with two maps \[
\begin{aligned}
\text{id} : O \to A, & \quad \circ : A \times_O A \to A, \\
c \mapsto \text{id}_c, & \quad (g, f) \mapsto g \circ f,
\end{aligned} \quad (25)
\] called the identity and the composition, such that \[\text{dom id}_a = \text{cod id}_a = a, \text{dom}(g \circ f) = \text{dom } f, \text{cod}(g \circ f) = \text{cod } g \quad (26)\] for all objects \(a \in O\) and all composable pairs of morphisms \((g, f) \in A \times_O A\), and such that the associativity and unit axioms in Definition 4.1.1.2 hold.


[点击展开翻译]

4.1.3.4 范畴： 一个 范畴 是一个图 \(\mathsf{C} = (O, A, \text{dom}, \text{cod})\)，并带有两个映射： \[
\begin{aligned}
\text{id} : O \to A, & \quad \circ : A \times_O A \to A, \\
c \mapsto \text{id}_c, & \quad (g, f) \mapsto g \circ f,
\end{aligned} \quad (25)
\] 分别称为 恒等 和 复合，使得对于所有对象 \(a \in O\) 以及所有可复合态射对 \((g, f) \in A \times_O A\)，均满足： \[\text{dom id}_a = \text{cod id}_a = a, \text{dom}(g \circ f) = \text{dom } f, \text{cod}(g \circ f) = \text{cod } g \quad (26)\] 且满足定义 4.1.1.2 中的结合律与单位元公理。




In treating a category \(\mathsf{C}\), we usually drop the letters \(A\) and \(O\), and write \(c \in \mathsf{C}\) for \(c\) being an object of \(\mathsf{C}\) and \(f \in \mathsf{C}\) for \(f\) being a morphism of \(\mathsf{C}\). A category is distinguished from [a metacategory] in that the classes of objects and morphisms are actually sets.


[点击展开翻译]

在处理范畴 \(\mathsf{C}\) 时，我们通常省略字母 \(A\) 和 \(O\)，用 \(c \in \mathsf{C}\) 表示 \(c\) 是 \(\mathsf{C}\) 的一个对象，用 \(f \in \mathsf{C}\) 表示 \(f\) 是 \(\mathsf{C}\) 的一个态射。范畴与元范畴的区别在于，前者的对象类和态射类实际上是 集合。







4.1.3.5 Hom-sets: For objects \(a\) and \(b\) in a category \(\mathsf{C}\) the hom-set \[\mathsf{C}(a, b) = \{ f \in \mathsf{C} : a \to b \} \quad (27)\] consists of all morphisms of the category with domain \(a\) and codomain \(b\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.1.3.5 Hom-集： 对于范畴 \(\mathsf{C}\) 中的对象 \(a\) 和 \(b\)，hom-集 \[\mathsf{C}(a, b) = \{ f \in \mathsf{C} : a \to b \} \quad (27)\] 由该范畴中所有以 \(a\) 为定义域、以 \(b\) 为陪域的态射组成。










4.1.3.6 Small and locally small categories: A category is small if it has a small set of objects and a small set of morphisms; it is large if the set of objects or morphisms is large. A category is locally small if all of its hom-sets are small.


[点击展开翻译]

4.1.3.6 小范畴与局部小范畴： 若一个范畴的对象集合和态射集合都是小集合，则称其为 小范畴；若对象集合或态射集合是大集合，则称其为 大范畴。若一个范畴的所有 hom-集都是小集合，则称其为 局部小范畴。








We list a few examples of small categories.


[点击展开翻译]

我们列举一些小范畴的例子。







4.1.4.1 Some finite categories:

0 is the empty category (no objects, no morphisms);
1 is the category \(\circlearrowleft\) with one object and one identity morphism;
2 is the category \(\circlearrowleft \to \circlearrowleft\) with two objects \(a, b\), and just one morphism \(a \to b\) not the identity;
3 is the category with three objects whose non-identity morphisms are from one to any other;
\(\downdownarrows\) is the category with two objects \(a, b\) and just two morphisms \(a \to b\) not the identity morphisms. We call two such morphisms parallel morphisms.

In each of the cases above there is only one possible definition of composition.


[点击展开翻译]

4.1.4.1 一些有限范畴：

0 是空范畴（无对象，无态射）；
1 是只有一个对象和其唯一恒等态射的范畴 \(\circlearrowleft\)；
